subject: See you at the library
body:

| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d783eb89134049fc9430839595aaabb7&_e=W8K5neKe6c9Mu_YFu32XxpfVHN69EpdpcQVLcAGK5Gp6d7AopD7yskLbXre1vshiz_4wWqyl_ZmPZ_IwI9gjpNvTaDBvJKNAYEBf5BQBjBl1M36dbCvwe1AnSCe6tR3tk6hk6HXA4taZv04Z7CoGgPde12yPuoNvc0U2_h7yOFThVFijvgv3hEtuNDM0wUfsHyUHtWw_v7cX5jHZ6LBRs6c2lk3gmJMzJUhZ-VAKMc3pNFnAPOyw_UbgeOF-aWwpY40sMuIcFPzblHsp83Womb5xD1HGOyTPoRZicc8wrETyk3UMIrb3rAPZSE0BYW_OsT7I0snsTeWnvzdfJaW0N0Aw304e5Ddth0Id4x7smeUoL8TQsbScBZw_d3hr0QaFc2OliL5R7mh3v3X-MrZIkg%3D%3D)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d783eb89134049fc9430839595aaabb7&_e=W8K5neKe6c9Mu_YFu32XxpfVHN69EpdpcQVLcAGK5Gp6d7AopD7yskLbXre1vshiz_4wWqyl_ZmPZ_IwI9gjpNvTaDBvJKNAYEBf5BQBjBl1M36dbCvwe1AnSCe6tR3tk6hk6HXA4taZv04Z7CoGgPde12yPuoNvc0U2_h7yOFThVFijvgv3hEtuNDM0wUfsHyUHtWw_v7cX5jHZ6LBRs6c2lk3gmJMzJUhZ-VAKMc3pNFnAPOyw_UbgeOF-aWwp0M504lfQCKTdWEv2wm4CYdjNKk9uaS8NqpJ2_usrmotBqPutZPeTwzW_qhocaRqpFVAUsHDeQFM2MbYM3ao0glqqXHG2Rc2yj564ffVGCnwKOSJRMKOzCK58srx8ULyCyQApC7i83y0tMHdLNcgPzA%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d783eb89134049fc9430839595aaabb7&_e=W8K5neKe6c9Mu_YFu32XxpfVHN69EpdpcQVLcAGK5Gp6d7AopD7yskLbXre1vshiz_4wWqyl_ZmPZ_IwI9gjpNvTaDBvJKNAYEBf5BQBjBl1M36dbCvwe1AnSCe6tR3tk6hk6HXA4taZv04Z7CoGgPde12yPuoNvc0U2_h7yOFThVFijvgv3hEtuNDM0wUfsHyUHtWw_v7cX5jHZ6LBRs6c2lk3gmJMzJUhZ-VAKMc3pNFnAPOyw_UbgeOF-aWwp0QtFFzuZFxaH6GdNx0_E5IeNU0CiJtzwbvAou4Pl2M4W4gHLZ4GB72nSn14cJ0q0nN-NPABgCe3vuPxO8vWT73mu7innZndN0pX1u8bQdnE3I23BMPyNuCMq7orqPl6cXixTAwiVoQGRYhqYp-gnog%3D%3D)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d783eb89134049fc9430839595aaabb7&_e=W8K5neKe6c9Mu_YFu32XxpfVHN69EpdpcQVLcAGK5Gp6d7AopD7yskLbXre1vshiz_4wWqyl_ZmPZ_IwI9gjpNvTaDBvJKNAYEBf5BQBjBl1M36dbCvwe1AnSCe6tR3tk6hk6HXA4taZv04Z7CoGgPde12yPuoNvc0U2_h7yOFThVFijvgv3hEtuNDM0wUfsHyUHtWw_v7cX5jHZ6LBRs6c2lk3gmJMzJUhZ-VAKMc3pNFnAPOyw_UbgeOF-aWwp4rXeel-loX19ucctFDVbwvh5wZbp3yHCUhVdzP5mWOa7RUipTULiQejyjFtjENoKonpgxXLBLE3WBShArazMNsVdve0S-idUTYCMhGyAPHwcAZz0lT3OPg67WGIEqTy3HPnHy4YGXaviIgzE6rRyPQ%3D%3D)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d783eb89134049fc9430839595aaabb7&_e=W8K5neKe6c9Mu_YFu32XxpfVHN69EpdpcQVLcAGK5Gp6d7AopD7yskLbXre1vshiz_4wWqyl_ZmPZ_IwI9gjpNvTaDBvJKNAYEBf5BQBjBl1M36dbCvwe1AnSCe6tR3tk6hk6HXA4taZv04Z7CoGgPde12yPuoNvc0U2_h7yOFThVFijvgv3hEtuNDM0wUfsHyUHtWw_v7cX5jHZ6LBRs6c2lk3gmJMzJUhZ-VAKMc3pNFnAPOyw_UbgeOF-aWwpduFkAKuZGkmUVQmwpY9c7HEUgTuFQ1lxmbAbgwCnN3hQ0AYVET2cwFC7S8oVZMcvDCj4NUsO9okPRvVLsdkU_0G8lHVV2zq53U29ur367euCbRcXTjPdW9Cb-ab2MFdqhT0Eu2VPf56SuW0k9Nf8Ow%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The counter to drag queen story hour | | | | | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

body:

| Thank you for everything. We know we reached out a lot last month about the importance of raising grassroots dollars, but we do it because we know you share our goal of safeguarding our democracy and taking back control of the U.S. House. Your support funds our candidates, our programs, and our victories – **and your support is why we've been successful!** In the coming months, we will be finalizing our 2026 Strategy to take back control of the U.S. House. We will make early decisions about how many districts we can target and what types of resources we can deploy — regional offices, organizers, and more. We have a proven gameplan from our red-to-blue flips in 2024, and we’re now prepared to double our effort in 2025 and 2026. After all, we all know how critically important it is to secure Democratic victories, fire Speaker Mike Johnson, and place a critical “check” on President Trump. Thank you for your support so far, and for being with us in what we know will be a long but rewarding journey. More soon, and with much gratitude, \- Yvette

We know we reached out a lot last month about the importance of raising grassroots dollars, but we do it because we know you share our goal of safeguarding our democracy and taking back control of the U.S. House. Your support funds our candidates, our programs, and our victories – and your support is why we've been successful! In the coming months, we will be finalizing our 2026 Strategy to take back control of the U.S. House. We will make early decisions about how many districts we can target and what types of resources we can deploy — regional offices, organizers, and more. We have a proven gameplan from our red-to-blue flips in 2024, and we’re now prepared to double our effort in 2025 and 2026. After all, we all know how critically important it is to secure Democratic victories, fire Speaker Mike Johnson, and place a critical “check” on President Trump. Thank you for your support so far, and for being with us in what we know will be a long but rewarding journey. More soon, and with much gratitude, \- Yvette | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Dayna Colbert
subject: We must stand for the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Last week, Indiana Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith publicly defended the Three-Fifths Compromise — a now defunct provision of the Constitution that dehumanized enslaved people by reducing them to fractions in our nation’s founding document — as a “great move” by America’s founders. **As a proud Black Hoosier, this is more than a misunderstanding of history. It’s an alarming attempt to rewrite it.** What’s really curious to me is why LG Beckwith would pounce on one line of a floor speech and turn it into a bizarre history lesson that he posts on social media? And while he’s at it, he generally gets the history wrong. The Three-Fifths Compromise was a historical anomaly, enacted in order to get 13 colonies to agree on a Constitution. This was all repealed by the 14th Amendment. **What he’s really doing is trying to justify his extreme, racist vision by re-writing history.** Beckwith’s remarks represent a dangerous distortion. The 3/5 Compromise actually helped southern states entrench slavery, and any defense of that is an insult to nearly 250 years of progress toward civil rights for everyone. We cannot let Beckwith and his colleagues twist history to justify Division, Exclusion, and Insults. **In this critical moment, Hoosier Democrats are worthy of your investment.**
[_A contribution of**$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will help us fight this growing wave of distortion and division with facts, advocacy, and community power._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106922275/543050008/1764064610?refcode=250501truth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmFlYTQ5Zi1lOTI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IycdGvGlvLXwCD8X-i70nu0GaSGUCrOH0CrGwgVw6i0=) [_**👉 Donate Today**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106922276/543050009/1764064610?refcode=250501truth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmFlYTQ5Zi1lOTI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IycdGvGlvLXwCD8X-i70nu0GaSGUCrOH0CrGwgVw6i0=) We cannot let Republicans twist history to justify exclusion and injustice. In his first 100 days, Donald Trump has drastically weakened the position of the United States at home and abroad — he’s cozied up to Putin, alienated our allies, and illegally implemented a tariff tax on the American people, sending our economy into a tailspin.
He is methodically sabotaging every form of accountability so that he can use the Office of the Presidency to get revenge on his enemies, to protect his friends and supporters, and to corruptly line his pockets.
He is ripping away the benefits that hard-working Americans rely on in order to fund tax breaks for himself and his billionaire buddies.
And he is trampling on our democracy, denying basic due process rights, defying court orders, and emulating Putin by usurping all government power.
It’s hard to say whether Trump’s devastation of our country is due to incompetence, ignorance, cognitive decline, or just plain lying — but one thing is clear as day: _Trump’s first 100 days have been a disaster for the American people._
**I’m not afraid to talk to _Fox News_ or any other platform to shed light on Trump’s broken promises to the American people, but taking it right to them increases the attacks from Trump’s MAGA allies. clean_body: | Peter, this week marked 100 days of Donald Trump’s second term. The last 100 days have been a complete disaster for the American people — and despite my best efforts to go on Fox News , none of their shows would take me. Yesterday, I finally joined Fox News to talk about Trump’s first 100 days of tanking the economy, slashing and burning the federal government, and assaulting our Constitution. If you agree that Trump’s first 100 days were dangerous and disastrous, = = | = In his first 100 days, Donald Trump has drastically weakened the position of the United States at home and abroad — he’s cozied up to Putin, alienated our allies, and illegally implemented a tariff tax on the American people, sending our economy into a tailspin. He is methodically sabotaging every form of accountability so that he can use the Office of the Presidency to get revenge on his enemies, to protect his friends and supporters, and to corruptly line his pockets. He is ripping away the benefits that hard-working Americans rely on in order to fund tax breaks for himself and his billionaire buddies. And he is trampling on our democracy, denying basic due process rights, defying court orders, and emulating Putin by usurping all government power. It’s hard to say whether Trump’s devastation of our country is due to incompetence, ignorance, cognitive decline, or just plain lying — but one thing is clear as day: Trump’s first 100 days have been a disaster for the American people. I’m not afraid to talk to Fox News or any other platform to shed light on Trump’s broken promises to the American people, but taking it right to them increases the attacks from Trump’s MAGA allies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Trump's First 100 Days
body:
The U.S Economy shrinks as Tariffs take toll.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=edbde6c9b1&u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=22abb4ca1f)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# The first 100 days
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=55018b2185&e=edbde6c9b1)
| The cover of the [Wall Street Journal](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3d18f63c51&e=edbde6c9b1) reported that the economy shrunk last quarter for the first time in three years as imports surged ahead of tariffs, and companies added just 62,000 jobs, half of what was projected by economists. Nearly 300,000 federal workers have lost their jobs, including 93% of Americorps vistas - nearly 20 of whom support the [Spartanburg community ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3e35d31f48&e=edbde6c9b1)and our nonprofit and education institutions through the United Way of the Piedmont. During [Timmons Tele-Town Hall](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8f8c7424d7&e=edbde6c9b1) on Tuesday Trudy Crow, of Lyman, was critical of cuts DOGE has made to programs “providing medication and feeding children.” Timmons replied that DOGE, led by billionaire Elon Musk, was cutting “tens of billions of dollars” in wasteful spending.
* Timmons cited USAID programs like translating Sesame Street into Arabic and LGBTQ comic books as examples of wasteful spending.
* Timmons praised the Trump administration's border security and trade policies.
* He acknowledged potential "pain" from tariffs but deemed the changes necessary.

Reflecting on his first 100 days, [Musk acknowledged](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4d48236d8c&e=edbde6c9b1) that while his team had made progress, claiming to have saved the American taxpayers $160 billion so far, "we haven't been as effective as I'd like." The goal was $2 trillion, then $1 trillion, and now $160 billion has been claimed, but [the website ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8886dbf7bd&e=edbde6c9b1)only accounts for $60 Billion. And according to [The Guardian](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5bfbc09a61&e=edbde6c9b1) Elon Musk and his companies face at least $2.37bn in legal exposure from federal investigations, litigation and regulatory oversight, according to a new report from [Senate Democrats.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fb63a7e0ea&e=edbde6c9b1)And Musk is slated to step back from DOGE by May 30, so who’s in charge and what’s the plan?
---
|
---
|
# An evening of conversation with Bakari Sellers and Trey Gowdy
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3495ba3fa1&e=edbde6c9b1)
| It was a pleasure to help host Wofford’s newest political series, “Candid Conversations” with Trey Gowdy, political commentator on Fox and former Congressman for SC-04 alongside Bakari Sellers, political commentator for CNN and former SC Representative for HD 90, and our moderator Billy Webster, Wofford professor and former White House aid. Open dialogue is integral to our democracy. Open dialogue can help us reach across our differences to counter polarization. Thank you to Wofford College, Billy Webster, Bakari Sellers, and Trey Gowdy for being willing to have these tough but necessary conversations. Save the date for September 29 when we’ll be joined by the Sister Senators.
---
| [Read about the evening](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9de785beea&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# Due process is integral to our democracy
---
| | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3e684793d0&e=edbde6c9b1)
| We talked a lot about due process on Tuesday night with Sellers and Gowdy. “Due process is the language of a constitutional democracy, and so we have to speak that language so people can understand other people’s situations,” Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.) said in an interview. “And I do believe that if we don’t stand up for the due process rights of non-citizens, they will quickly trample the due process rights of citizens.”
I had the honor of interviewing David Blanton, former pastor and DOJ accredited legal representative for immigrants in the Upstate, for this week’s episode of the Upstate Tea. Our conversation dives into this very topic: What can we do to support our neighbors locally and defend due process? Make sure to Tune in **Every Wednesday** as I join the crew from [**Frogmore Stew - SC’s pop-politics podcast**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d409827a92&e=edbde6c9b1) \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate.
---
| [Click here to listen to my new episode! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a5d40809de&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---

---
| | | | | | | | | | | **SPCDP Monthly Meeting****May 5 at 6pm, Dr. T.K Gregg Community Center** Join us the first Monday of the month for our Spartanburg County Democratic Party Meeting at the Dr. TK Gregg Community Center from 6-7:30pm 650 Howard Street.
---

Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage.

[RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=efab9b82c3&e=edbde6c9b1)May 20 SPCDP Tiny Town Hall Middle Tyger Library at 6pm [RSVP here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=05684d084e&e=edbde6c9b1)May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. [RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0ce9da59f9&e=edbde6c9b1)June 28 Greenville Black Pride Festival. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=befc7a648b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | [**Private school vouchers to exclude disability protections**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=61972d2b9b&e=edbde6c9b1)**PASSES** State lawmakers have been pushing bill ([Senate Bill 62](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f9dd09af50&e=edbde6c9b1)) that would send public funds to private K-12 schools, including religious schools. **Today, the House concurred with Senate and it has passed.**. Now goes to McMaster's desk. Spartanburg legislators from The Freedom Caucus such as Representative Edgerton and Magnuson voted yes. Representative Chumley, Moss (who voted no earlier this year), Harris (who voted no earlier this year), and Montgomery abstained from the vote.**Doge cuts AmeriCorps funding— our Upstate nonprofits need help**
---
AmeriCorps announced late on April 25, 2025 that our United Way of the Piedmont AmeriCorps grants have been terminated. The termination of our United Way’s local grants is part of widespread cuts to more than $400 million in grant funding to AmeriCorps services across the United States. Tens of thousands of service members nationwide have suddenly lost their living allowances, benefits, and workforce development opportunities. Looking for ways to support AmeriCorps amid these devastating cuts? [Contact your Members of Congress](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e213728c08&e=edbde6c9b1) or please consider [donating to the State Commission new national emergency assistance fund for AmeriCorps members. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b3d6b1ed0a&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | [**House Bill 3645**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7dce3e3f38&e=edbde6c9b1)**\- 12-week paid family PASSES in the House** State employees in South Carolina who newly become parents could get twice as much paid leave under [a bill](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c8f962b7dc&e=edbde6c9b1) the House passed this week.The bipartisan bill sent to the Senate on Wednesday by a [vote of 86-18](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e8bd7ccbb9&e=edbde6c9b1) would give employees of K-12 schools, state agencies, and public colleges 12 weeks of paid leave after giving birth instead of six. Non-birthing parents, including fathers and adoptive parents, would qualify for four weeks instead of two. With four working days left in the 2025 session and no movement on an identical bill in the Senate, passage this year is highly unlikely. But the bill remains alive for 2026. It does not need to be reintroduced.[**Contact your legislators**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=33e8d580f0&e=edbde6c9b1)**about**[**House Bill 4397**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ed1c61cba5&e=edbde6c9b1)**\- Protect Greenville County Public Schools** South Carolina House Bill 4397 (H. 4397) amends Act 602 of 1992, which governs the [Greenville County School District](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=396f91fda1&e=edbde6c9b1). Specifically, the bill requires the Greenville County Council to approve the school district's budget. Moms for Liberty is in support of the bill — Greenville's conservative county council would use this power to censor and control what children in the public school system could learn.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9e316fb795&e=edbde6c9b1)
|

| | | | | | | | | | |

| Today, I protested alongside folks in Greenville at The May Day Rally. If you were unable to attend, consider participating in Resist Spartanburg’s protest this Saturday from 4-6pm at 180 Magnolia St.

| | | | | | | | | | |
---

Thank you to Wofford College, Billy Webster, Bakari Sellers, and Trey Gowdy for being willing to have these tough but necessary conversations. Save the date for September 29 when we’ll be joined by the Sister Senators. | | | Due process is integral to our democracy | | | | | We talked a lot about due process on Tuesday night with Sellers and Gowdy. “Due process is the language of a constitutional democracy, and so we have to speak that language so people can understand other people’s situations,” Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.) said in an interview. “And I do believe that if we don’t stand up for the due process rights of non-citizens, they will quickly trample the due process rights of citizens.” I had the honor of interviewing David Blanton, former pastor and DOJ accredited legal representative for immigrants in the Upstate, for this week’s episode of the Upstate Tea. Our conversation dives into this very topic: What can we do to support our neighbors locally and defend due process? Make sure to Tune in Every Wednesday as I join the crew from \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let Your Voice be Heard Protest**May 3 at 4pm, 180 Magnolia St. Join us for a conversation on how to know what’s true. Wednesday, April 30th 6pm at Hughes Main Library Greenville. This event is live but a recording will be available after the event. | | | | | | | | | | | SPCDP Monthly MeetingMay 5 at 6pm, Dr. T.K Gregg Community Center Join us the first Monday of the month for our Spartanburg County Democratic Party Meeting at the Dr. TK Gregg Community Center from 6-7:30pm 650 Howard Street. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser with Representative Justin PearsonMay 29 at 6:00 pm Chapman Cultural Center Join us for a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage. | | May 3 Resistance Protest at 180 Magnolia St., 4:00pmMay 5 SPCDP Monthly Meeting at TK Gregg Community Center at 6pm. 20 SPCDP Tiny Town Hall Middle Tyger Library at 6pm 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. 28 Greenville Black Pride Festival. | | | | | | | | | | | | | State lawmakers have been pushing bill () that would send public funds to private K-12 schools, including religious schools. Today, the House concurred with Senate and it has passed.. Now goes to McMaster's desk. Spartanburg legislators from The Freedom Caucus such as Representative Edgerton and Magnuson voted yes. Representative Chumley, Moss (who voted no earlier this year), Harris (who voted no earlier this year), and Montgomery abstained from the vote.Doge cuts AmeriCorps funding— our Upstate nonprofits need help AmeriCorps announced late on April 25, 2025 that our United Way of the Piedmont AmeriCorps grants have been terminated. The termination of our United Way’s local grants is part of widespread cuts to more than $400 million in grant funding to AmeriCorps services across the United States. Tens of thousands of service members nationwide have suddenly lost their living allowances, benefits, and workforce development opportunities. Looking for ways to support AmeriCorps amid these devastating cuts? or please consider | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | \- 12-week paid family PASSES in the House State employees in South Carolina who newly become parents could get twice as much paid leave under the House passed this week.The bipartisan bill sent to the Senate on Wednesday by a would give employees of K-12 schools, state agencies, and public colleges 12 weeks of paid leave after giving birth instead of six. Non-birthing parents, including fathers and adoptive parents, would qualify for four weeks instead of two. With four working days left in the 2025 session and no movement on an identical bill in the Senate, passage this year is highly unlikely. But the bill remains alive for 2026. It does not need to be reintroduced.\- Protect Greenville County Public Schools South Carolina House Bill 4397 (H. 4397) amends Act 602 of 1992, which governs the . Specifically, the bill requires the Greenville County Council to approve the school district's budget. Moms for Liberty is in support of the bill — Greenville's conservative county council would use this power to censor and control what children in the public school system could learn. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Today, I protested alongside folks in Greenville at The May Day Rally. If you were unable to attend, consider participating in Resist Spartanburg’s protest this Saturday from 4-6pm at 180 Magnolia St. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you to WREN and Wofford College for an incredible evening. WREN’s CEO Dr. Amalia Luxardo shared her inspiring story of being a first-generation Latina, breaking barriers throughout her career. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: : Greenville Online: : SC Daily Gazette: : SC Daily Gazette: : The Weekly Show with Jon Stewart: : CNN: READ: The Washington Post: : WSPA: : FitsNews: | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Kathryn for SC. This year for [OLCV’s Annual Celebration](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922628/543072988/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiM2E1ZTVmLWYwMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nugBVPVbFI7nhRiYfL4TVj4hxtP9BdrxnQLq5BlPAkg=&emci=874b4406-4826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=6b3a5e5f-f026-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230) on May 2nd we're giving away this unforgettable glamping trip! This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. By buying a raffle ticket today, you're not only entering to win a once in a lifetime trip, but you are supporting our work of protecting Oregon's natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. You don't have to attend the event to win, but tickets are limited so get yours now!

body:
We must take this seriously.
| Folks, Adam Schiff just issued a DIRE warning for all Democrats: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89683?t=6&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf) Team, we need to take his warning seriously! **Things are going to get _worse and worse_ for hardworking Americans — and _better and better_ for BILLIONAIRES — if we don’t take _immediate_ action!**

[**The ONLY way to hold Trump & his administration accountable is to FIGHT BACK and build grassroots power NOW! That’s why we launched our Anti-Trump Task Force, and we’re still waiting on 9 Democrats in your city to step up. Please, friend: Join the Anti-Trump Task Force to fight back! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89683?t=7&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf) | [9 top DEMOCRATS NEEDED: JOIN THE ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE ASAP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89683?t=8&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf)
---
__Look, we only have two options right now:__

**OPTION 1:** Trump DROWNS OUT grassroots supporters like you, letting billionaires like Elon Musk swoop in and buy our elections! **[No action required]**

**OPTION 2:** Thousands of Democrats across the country step up RIGHT NOW and commit to fighting back before it’s too late! [**[Click here to select option 2]**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89683?t=9&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf)

[**Top Democrats like Bernie Sanders, Adam Schiff, Jamie Raskin, and so many more are counting on you to step up _today_! Click here before midnight to join our critical Anti-Trump Task Force and take action against Trump’s MAGA madness »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89683?t=10&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf)
[9 top DEMOCRATS NEEDED: JOIN THE ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE ASAP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89683?t=11&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19720%2E878179%2EC1yKIf).**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The counter to drag queen story hour
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAQhp_G3hHZ4xtZeME51L0KVaiLsnRsA65iEuKQFJ6-gtJsZ76Z_9NvU1vH7Vkj9Q8B7KPPCACxBQI4bsbUnb7S6-OMys3L7ChXSVy38P-ODjDBB2fZw-fzonozTWary5PftONAJ7w_t2GC76FFSDbW16laYq_Z1hOOg6aKS8pLEBTvtQ1zSStfMi8sAeAcAmWlUuDASrkFHDUQEEQQIBQUIwXMK1FZQVglhCgpIE5uOYVNoYvO0tyPtuuaJhWuSbjW-75v803MIDBj1xSHk6vDKf-euSYhMHdlBGZAYHbOfpfhcFkLxMytNLZchLX_eFetx5327RjrOmapECe7vzd40PATAAD__26Obe8)
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j12PoyAUhn8N3mHgAFIvvLCrdj9m56IzabZXBgGn7Ep1UGu6v35iY3pDwnOenPe8yg-da-8ZknsEcHFmRACI5Qjg87z4MP_1vw6YJuef-DN59WKdwrdNvcFTvmrFyj8_8ual6kf2-v-7OQ_LjT716T7Yp7yFxtYr161UFpHJWGsIj2xGJU8oT0HQ6JJZzRvKW5C7NGkp1cRyQ-mOSqGE1VJGLgMCgggChIJkJIZdIxolCGuEECkFxMkjJ1beBqcVHadFhdD3Pta9j7rsMk3D-DisQlCNVs_BxupqTT-tBoKqCepmcdP3_0YElVQCFG1arNKUYc50gtWOpFgzTVIqARQ36y5WzZOvx34O2iJW7IsDPpYnBMmKvTVu9ogV5e-NTDas_yXABrTyg3IfV8SKR0UOrN4Xh3p_zE9l_XbO319A1MfyVL-950e8PlHIzLC4rnNjIhEnH4_ia81bBl8BAAD__9QbkbA)
---
| | Patriot, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j12PoyAUhn8N3mHgAFIvvLCrdj9m56IzabZXBgGn7Ep1UGu6v35iY3pDwnOenPe8yg-da-8ZknsEcHFmRACI5Qjg87z4MP_1vw6YJuef-DN59WKdwrdNvcFTvmrFyj8_8ual6kf2-v-7OQ_LjT716T7Yp7yFxtYr161UFpHJWGsIj2xGJU8oT0HQ6JJZzRvKW5C7NGkp1cRyQ-mOSqGE1VJGLgMCgggChIJkJIZdIxolCGuEECkFxMkjJ1beBqcVHadFhdD3Pta9j7rsMk3D-DisQlCNVs_BxupqTT-tBoKqCepmcdP3_0YElVQCFG1arNKUYc50gtWOpFgzTVIqARQ36y5WzZOvx34O2iJW7IsDPpYnBMmKvTVu9ogV5e-NTDas_yXABrTyg3IfV8SKR0UOrN4Xh3p_zE9l_XbO319A1MfyVL-950e8PlHIzLC4rnNjIhEnH4_ia81bBl8BAAD__9QbkbA)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j12PoyAUhn8N3mHgAFIvvLCrdj9m56IzabZXBgGn7Ep1UGu6v35iY3pDwnOenPe8yg-da-8ZknsEcHFmRACI5Qjg87z4MP_1vw6YJuef-DN59WKdwrdNvcFTvmrFyj8_8ual6kf2-v-7OQ_LjT716T7Yp7yFxtYr161UFpHJWGsIj2xGJU8oT0HQ6JJZzRvKW5C7NGkp1cRyQ-mOSqGE1VJGLgMCgggChIJkJIZdIxolCGuEECkFxMkjJ1beBqcVHadFhdD3Pta9j7rsMk3D-DisQlCNVs_BxupqTT-tBoKqCepmcdP3_0YElVQCFG1arNKUYc50gtWOpFgzTVIqARQ36y5WzZOvx34O2iJW7IsDPpYnBMmKvTVu9ogV5e-NTDas_yXABrTyg3IfV8SKR0UOrN4Xh3p_zE9l_XbO319A1MfyVL-950e8PlHIzLC4rnNjIhEnH4_ia81bBl8BAAD__9QbkbA)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. **I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...** ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children. The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you! It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j12PoyAUhn8N3mHgAFIvvLCrdj9m56IzabZXBgGn7Ep1UGu6v35iY3pDwnOenPe8yg-da-8ZknsEcHFmRACI5Qjg87z4MP_1vw6YJuef-DN59WKdwrdNvcFTvmrFyj8_8ual6kf2-v-7OQ_LjT716T7Yp7yFxtYr161UFpHJWGsIj2xGJU8oT0HQ6JJZzRvKW5C7NGkp1cRyQ-mOSqGE1VJGLgMCgggChIJkJIZdIxolCGuEECkFxMkjJ1beBqcVHadFhdD3Pta9j7rsMk3D-DisQlCNVs_BxupqTT-tBoKqCepmcdP3_0YElVQCFG1arNKUYc50gtWOpFgzTVIqARQ36y5WzZOvx34O2iJW7IsDPpYnBMmKvTVu9ogV5e-NTDas_yXABrTyg3IfV8SKR0UOrN4Xh3p_zE9l_XbO319A1MfyVL-950e8PlHIzLC4rnNjIhEnH4_ia81bBl8BAAD__9QbkbA)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **Brave Books** is a small Christian company. clean_body: | | | | | Patriot, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true. \- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | But that’s just not true. THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots... ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children. The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you! It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Save the Date: Fredrick Douglass Celebration June 5th in Branford
body:
Branford Republicans 2nd Annual Event

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1585e71ea291/when-we-vote-we-win-14763360?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ““We are one, our cause is one, and we must help each other if we are to succeed.””Fredrick Douglass
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **Save the Date Now**
**SECOND-ANNUAL**
**Frederick Douglass Celebration Event****Thursday, June 5, 2025 | Oceanside at The Owenego, 40 Linden Ave., Branford, CT 06405**
_**Join the Branford Republicans in Celebrating a Great American and Great Republican**_
[**BUY TICKETS**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=3ba4c8c66f&e=8763c56857)

## **About Frederick**
## **Douglass**
**A Force for Uniting the United States** Frederick Douglass, born into slavery in 1818, became a leading advocate for uniting our nation after the Civil War. His conviction in our founding values and principles helped guide the Republican party to win a second term under Abraham Lincoln’s leadership. Lincoln faced the challenge of rescuing a divided nation.
**Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party** The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign.
**Believed in American Principles** Lincoln embraced Douglass’s message of preserving our nation’s values, and it became a roadmap for reunification. Today, Douglass’s contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds.
**A Symbol of Republican Values** Republicans can use Frederick Douglass as a symbol to unite the voters and realize the greatness of our country, just like Lincoln did.

name: Care in Action
subject: May Day is about resisting worker exploitation.
body:
Take action with us to support care workers today.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922909/543085447/664783965?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
Peter — This May Day, **we rise in solidarity with all workers—especially care workers and immigrant workers—who are coming together in a shared fight for our futures: for fair wages, safe workplaces, dignity on the job, and a pathway to citizenship**. As we honor the legacy of workers who, over a century ago, stood up against exploitation for fair wages and humane conditions, we recognize that this fight is far from over.
**Today, one of the most urgent battles for worker justice is the fight to protect Medicaid.** Tens of millions of working people—including domestic workers and care workers—rely on Medicaid for essential healthcare, to care for their families, and to maintain their livelihoods. Stripping Medicaid means stripping the dignity and stability that so many workers have fought hard to gain.
**That's why fighting to stop GOP efforts to gut Medicaid and hand tax breaks to billionaires is a fight for workers' rights.** It's a fight rooted in the same spirit of resistance that gave rise to May Day—a fight to ensure that care work is valued, protected, and sustained for generations to come.
These cuts are President Trump and Speaker Mike Johnson’s top legislative priority. Final considerations before a vote on a budget bill are happening right now in Congress. **Republicans will succeed in taking away our essential health care programs to fund billionaire tax cuts unless our supporters send a flood of messages to their elected officials right now.**
**[**_Can you take a minute to urge your representatives to protect Medicaid and stand up for care workers before the GOP takes away our healthcare? >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922910/543085448/29127930?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[Contact your representatives](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922911/543085449/29127930?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)__**********_**
**The Trump-GOP plan to cut Medicaid is a blatant attack on care workers and their families.** It disproportionately harms women, immigrants, and workers of color — many of whom both rely on and provide care. These workers are the backbone of our care system, yet they face systemic barriers to health care, fair wages, and immigration relief.
**Medicaid is a lifeline for care workers.** It’s often the only accessible health care option available, covering essential services like prenatal care, cancer screenings, mental health care, and treatment for chronic illnesses. It also funds the very jobs that sustain care work—many home care workers are paid through Medicaid programs.
**On this May Day, we affirm that protecting Medicaid is part of a broader fight for justice and dignity for all care workers—including immigrant care workers who deserve a pathway to citizenship.** These workers are valued members of our communities and have long cared for our loved ones while living in fear and insecurity themselves.
Across the country today, workers are fighting for their rights and fighting to protect their health care. We cannot allow our government **to take away Medicaid and the livelihoods of so many care workers in favor of tax cuts for billionaires** — _destroying services and jobs for millions in order to benefit a wealthy few._
**[**_This May Day, take action. Contact your representatives and demand they protect Medicaid, care jobs, and immigrant care workers. We need to speak up for care workers, their families, and millions more before it's too late, Peter! >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922912/543085450/29127930?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[Contact your representatives](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922913/543085451/29127930?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)__**********_**
There's a reason that Medicaid is an essential program — it touches nearly every part of our health care system and directly supports the care workers, many of them immigrants, who keep our communities strong and our families cared for. Protecting Medicaid means protecting their health, their jobs, and their right to live and work with dignity.
Thank you for standing up for workers,
Care in Action
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922914/543085452/-1554439957?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922915/543085453/326371895?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922916/543085454/955979663?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
This email was sent by [Care in Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922917/543085455/664783965?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787). Care In Action was founded by progressive women of color. Care in Action is the policy and advocacy home for women who care, working on behalf of more than 2 million domestic workers and care workers in America. Care in Action is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization. Donations to Care in Action are not tax-deductible.
Learn more about our [privacy policy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922918/543085456/1824245643?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787).
Care in Action | 45 Broadway, Suite 2240 | New York, NY 10006 | [CareInAction.us](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106922919/543085457/664783965?ms=050125_maydaymedicaid_cia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmFjOGM3Yy1mYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0CtxfRn_eytqUf1ueLYWA1Zckhcq6w0IM0JSFTPoq4=&emci=ff37c1e8-f226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=96ac8c7c-fc26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.domesticworkers.org/p/2a41OdSfQkGfxxEzLZYGsg2?unsubscribedata=hxrPNHIJ6wRhGFF3hHapUH7zqPvbEE1zlkgNJEjAiKIJQSN7FaZB5IFq%2FhIWpI58nHlMlF0J%2FN8MAx%2Fn1GMIlKcy1%2BQcmhjrI5lJWQV8n%2B%2BrYZz04rIYsoudelMRXkWi6llCqYiugtmvGnJ8zi5LJprMDMHeFTkmRoqNdEv6hGlnf%2F%2FQqXL8GriRUhArnOI6CJYZfMrHG7VharuswyNK51591v0oDSojUWaoWdlxtvLfDEToThLzdC89%2FdsYeHOHvLqs04%2Fn5fjeQML0j5S9vuc5R0752Kr%2FNwpb8%2BsRYKqoXDVyvKjOG15KKmWp8iJ4J66jAd7IKf4al0hoNKeQC5jLsOziBfIfu519Ej5lSPtSZxmyi7rPtkhKMRv581Xw%2BczEU2Jn7nmIUVjTrabvNr47MxvSc1WdJ51UDIyAH7E%3D).

Across the country today, workers are fighting for their rights and fighting to protect their health care. We cannot allow our government to take away Medicaid and the livelihoods of so many care workers in favor of tax cuts for billionaires — destroying services and jobs for millions in order to benefit a wealthy few. ************ There's a reason that Medicaid is an essential program — it touches nearly every part of our health care system and directly supports the care workers, many of them immigrants, who keep our communities strong and our families cared for. Protecting Medicaid means protecting their health, their jobs, and their right to live and work with dignity. Thank you for standing up for workers, Care in Action

body:

### **Update on Filming, please share with friends and family**
---
#### **Get your ticket today, there are $50 tickets and $100 tickets available. Every ticket sold helps us expand our filming. So far we have invested in 2 cameras, professional audio equipment, lenses, and have secured locations for our film to be filmed, and screened.**
#### **First Movie - “Frozen Odds - Ranked Choice Voting & Foreign National Influence in Alaska” - Coming August 2025**
#### **Second Movie - “The Permanent Short - Alaska PFD movie covering the $25 billion reallocated since 2016” - Coming October 2025**
#### **We have multiple movies coming out in 2025. So far we have sold all our Angel Tickets ($250), we only have 22 Golden Tickets left. These come with special perks like future invites and tickets to future movies and much more.**
#### **So far we have Seth Keshel, Scott Presler, and more coming to either be in the movie or be at a screening. We plan to add even more names, all Angel Ticket and Golden Ticket holders will be invited to future events.**
---
---
|
---

This ultra-exclusive experience is designed for those who believe in the story, the mission, and want front-row access to something special.
#### **Golden Ticket Benefits:**
* 🧥 **Exclusive “Frozen Odds” Limited-Edition Merchandise**
(Only available to Golden Ticket holders)
* 🎬 **Private Screening of “Frozen Odds”**
Watch the premiere _before anyone else_ , in an intimate VIP setting.
* 🍽️ **Catered Dinner Experience**
Share a gourmet meal with fellow supporters and filmmakers.
* 🤝 **Private VIP Event with Special Guests**
Rub shoulders with the director, crew, and hand-selected VIPs. This invite-only evening will include personal insights, behind-the-scenes reveals, and interactive conversations.

> ⚠️ Only **25 tickets** will ever be issued. Once they're gone, they're gone.

---
#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 40% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**

name: The Flyover Podcast
subject: Finally a Podcast for the Everyday American!
body:
The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

| [No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zejv31ivgsah35nag8ii0uqs37areaght2l12b78_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chjm6ob6clh2bs)

| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb3a4shoc9pmaqkkorqf7a3r1hevnc0fjn2p775o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chjm6ob6clh2bs)
**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**Now ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn’t it be nice to trust the voices you're listening to?
---|---
2. | Wouldn’t it be even better if you didn’t have to dig through biased, clickbait headlines to understand what’s really going on?
3. | How much time have you wasted trying to figure out what's true and what’s noise?

[There is a better way!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zutbs87uuigo8mqkq16pgbm147oajkrifur0el9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chjm6ob6clh2bs)

Instead of being just another victim of the mainstream media spin, listen to [**The Flyover Podcast**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3b2qd8qhclbg3bnspm0llerfgt0934mpub782tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chjm6ob6clh2bs) — your free, go-to audio and video podcast for the day’s most important stories.

No slant. Just facts, context, and common sense conversation across politics, business, culture, and beyond. Each episode is designed to be quick, clear, and actually helpful—so you can stay informed without the BS.
