|
### **Only three more until I have 100 Supporters for my movies. Order #100 will receive a special gift.**
---
|
---
### **Update on Filming, please share with friends and family**
---
#### **Get your ticket today, there are $50 tickets and $100 tickets available. Every ticket sold helps us expand our filming. So far we have invested in 2 cameras, professional audio equipment, lenses, and have secured locations for our film to be filmed, and screened.**
#### **First Movie - “Frozen Odds - Ranked Choice Voting & Foreign National Influence in Alaska” - Coming August 2025**
#### **Second Movie - “The Permanent Short - Alaska PFD movie covering the $25 billion reallocated since 2016” - Coming October 2025**
#### **We have multiple movies coming out in 2025. So far we have sold all our Angel Tickets ($250), we only have 22 Golden Tickets left. These come with special perks like future invites and tickets to future movies and much more.**
#### **So far we have Seth Keshel, Scott Presler, and more coming to either be in the movie or be at a screening. We plan to add even more names, all Angel Ticket and Golden Ticket holders will be invited to future events.**
---
---
|
---
["Frozen Odds" Golden Ticket](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681456ccba2b2930093d7cf6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Four-store%2Fp%2Ffrozen-odds-golden-ticket&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68145686e89a1d5f87f408d4&l=en-US&s=EK7XFNveApe47rFclsBYaOLMZrI%3D)$500.00Limited to 25 Tickets🎟️ **Golden Ticket – $500****LIMITED TO 25 MEMBERS ONLY** Become one of only **25 elite supporters** to hold the **Frozen Odds Golden Ticket**. This ultra-exclusive experience is designed for those who believe in the story, the mission, and want front-row access to something special.
#### **Golden Ticket Benefits:**
* 🧥 **Exclusive “Frozen Odds” Limited-Edition Merchandise**
(Only available to Golden Ticket holders)
* 🎬 **Private Screening of “Frozen Odds”**
Watch the premiere _before anyone else_ , in an intimate VIP setting.
* 🍽️ **Catered Dinner Experience**
Share a gourmet meal with fellow supporters and filmmakers.
* 🤝 **Private VIP Event with Special Guests**
Rub shoulders with the director, crew, and hand-selected VIPs. This invite-only evening will include personal insights, behind-the-scenes reveals, and interactive conversations.

> ⚠️ Only **25 tickets** will ever be issued. Once they're gone, they're gone.
🔒 **Reserve your Golden Ticket today** and become part of the story that’s rewriting Alaska’s future.
---
[_ _ Get Your Golden Ticket Today _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681456ccba2b2930093d7cf6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68145686e89a1d5f87f408d4&l=en-US&s=XCiabsbpCuGAjhuYNWmScsMM_1c%3D)
---
#### **Nearly 100 People Have Contributed to Make “Frozen Odds” a Reality. Thank You.**
---
[**Click Here to Help Finance the Film Project**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681456ccba2b2930093d7cf6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68145686e89a1d5f87f408d4&l=en-US&s=XCiabsbpCuGAjhuYNWmScsMM_1c%3D)
---
#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 40% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**
---
[_ _ Click Here to Join Frozen Odds Film Project _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681456ccba2b2930093d7cf6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_68145686e89a1d5f87f408d4&l=en-US&s=XCiabsbpCuGAjhuYNWmScsMM_1c%3D)
---
---

This is the story they didn’t want you to know.Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zll83sbr3lcr28jp43g55g85mbs0rdskhs8b69bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0o35chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4ofngte2qb381r02vs0s27gj4p9rivg6t7hkv00_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0o35chh2bs) [NO](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs3ncrn4j1eh0el3phfvuusmaqrdhdljrl6pkug8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0o35chh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3mclces4k5t3mth0ev2gi0fa40ruiuje3ksver8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0o35chh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It pains me to announce this…
body:
But the numbers don’t lie.

But the numbers don’t lie.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1hrg11j7cfu7v7a8rkpqmrqnl00vfpojt0gk77o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
It pains me to announce this...
---
But numbers don’t lie. And __these__ numbers tell a deeply troubling story:
---
[**“House Democratic campaign arm raises $36.9M in first quarter” – _The Hill_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrpccb1n3phaj0gd5u3ff96jgli32uhrhrmjrk58_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs)
---
The radical Democrats have gone on an all-out fundraising BLITZ over the past few months.
---
_We saw what that meant for the recent special elections where the Left was able to OUTSPEND us in Florida by 1000%!_
---
_And now, I worry what it means for our TOSS-UP majority of just a handful of seats._
---
When the Democrats came for our majority in November, I transferred **$2.5 million** of my own campaign funds to ensure we could protect key battleground races from their massive warchest.
---
But after House Democrats just released their target list of vulnerable Republicans for the midterms (_and with their fundraising haul of nearly $40 MILLION!_), I won’t lie, my personal commitment alone would be a mere drop in the bucket.
---
That’s why at this pivotal moment for our majority, I have no choice but to turn to grassroots conservatives like YOU to take a stand with us.
---
If we fail to act right now, a Democrat majority would freeze President Trump’s agenda in the blink of an eye – and all our hard work would be for _NOTHING_.
---
**So, before tonight’s deadline, I’m calling on _2.5 MILLION PATRIOTS_ to MATCH my 2024 commitment by making a grassroots contribution of any amount to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority.**
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to MATCH my commitment to DEFEND our razor-thin House majority.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z39a646k16erj09ksjqm457224g1h3lj6u1d9lhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs)

---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd1sdsu1hp0auk93mqfp9n82sf36r7ots9oubm8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmtn6il18d6ie12g7vjnb1na3gi4sdl6hva0e45o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2iqc8otpc0ug2e5r368hq03p9pkkj5aa6tvgk2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu52uoil8p57e2vnhaud6k79rmhluqo08plji5n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu8hndthhg52gcoeui8of0rlp6r546pslam4scr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chge0p76cph2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: 🏅 Nominate a Republican Hero for the Lincoln-Reagan Award!
body:
May 29th: Honoring Legacy & Celebrating Leadership
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQW1L-5_7xpiMSGY8MDbbisYeBkD8FIz9AwdW9zeIAm2i3kUraeNllFn2dXg-Z5rlRr1l-tngPP4DBxn10LSn9ll4KcYeUsEC6s6HzNM9wvpcY4BH3HwcGbiI0Xmqu9uetWwxDJwY8HDTw0BLtQwJw==&c=Q7I6qFrtjx1vZjDtUlqZPs01ySD97BBiJpx9BSpPi4EBMFUCAgK3-Q==&ch=OSMKxCD8WtIpv7W_7NJeXPCEOkIG_adHs9_xc1E0kVgM6FnWsYnFVw==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Each year, the Massachusetts Republican Party bestows its highest honor upon a Republican who exemplifies the values, vision, and tireless dedication of our Party's greatest icons: Abraham Lincoln and Ronald Reagan.
The Lincoln-Reagan Award is more than just a distinction -- it's a celebration of Republican excellence. It's a moment to honor those who go above and beyond to advance our principles of freedom, opportunity, and constitutional government here in the Commonwealth.
This year's event is on Thursday, May 29th at the Lenox Hotel in Boston. More on that later...
Right now, we're turning to you.
Do you know a standout Republican who has made a powerful impact in your community or across our state? It could be an elected official who's led with integrity, a grassroots warrior who never backs down, or an activist whose passion has inspired the next generation. Whether they're in the trenches or behind the scenes, we want to hear about them.
Nominations are officially open for this year's Lincoln-Reagan Award!
---
| | [NOMINATE A REPUBLICAN FOR THIS YEAR'S AWARD](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQW1L-5_7xpiMSGY8MDbbisYeBkD8FIz9AwdW9zeIAm2i3kUraeNlh59MAxFAIZciswZ9TMhCYrienVBVeejc2IZvbi9M1QzIDzqJKXRj17Zytu2EjY9-IXfAQCDe9q2UcUlIW_z8Q1CUlJxzdP1ASR84ALSb6zIbqXZKIy41yAImdp5neMmxS5OvzoDqmnIoVcejXIrnTs=&c=Q7I6qFrtjx1vZjDtUlqZPs01ySD97BBiJpx9BSpPi4EBMFUCAgK3-Q==&ch=OSMKxCD8WtIpv7W_7NJeXPCEOkIG_adHs9_xc1E0kVgM6FnWsYnFVw==)
---
| Let's honor the best among us -- the bold leaders, the tireless volunteers, and the unwavering voices who make the MassGOP stronger every single day. And don't forget to RSVP [by donating online](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQW1L-5_7xpiMSGY8MDbbisYeBkD8FIz9AwdW9zeIAm2i3kUraeNljKcN8xyjTOqN8odOeB5HiElAL5SlxryXlxFOp1ZPQC_UU6k3oLTdlvURnGGJVU6Rq8RYeSJoindId4OC-3g3Fv1aIzwF_wDWicFae0CZim3k7uon2JElfyjUPPs_3dWocy9IeMusaZH-776-lVKjjjwlf-V8y0X0Q==&c=Q7I6qFrtjx1vZjDtUlqZPs01ySD97BBiJpx9BSpPi4EBMFUCAgK3-Q==&ch=OSMKxCD8WtIpv7W_7NJeXPCEOkIG_adHs9_xc1E0kVgM6FnWsYnFVw==) or emailing [finance@massgop.com](mailto:finance@massgop.com) today to reserve your spot at this year's event. I've included a copy of your invitation below.
Yours in service,
---
| | |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP
| |
---
| | [RSVP](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQW1L-5_7xpiMSGY8MDbbisYeBkD8FIz9AwdW9zeIAm2i3kUraeNljKcN8xyjTOqN8odOeB5HiElAL5SlxryXlxFOp1ZPQC_UU6k3oLTdlvURnGGJVU6Rq8RYeSJoindId4OC-3g3Fv1aIzwF_wDWicFae0CZim3k7uon2JElfyjUPPs_3dWocy9IeMusaZHDXLzVqJb0n8NUeHVfvSyTg==&c=Q7I6qFrtjx1vZjDtUlqZPs01ySD97BBiJpx9BSpPi4EBMFUCAgK3-Q==&ch=OSMKxCD8WtIpv7W_7NJeXPCEOkIG_adHs9_xc1E0kVgM6FnWsYnFVw==)

subject: Who's Really in Charge?
body:
Here is some valuable info we are using to fight dark money in politics.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xfddr-wkwgmr-kyd76rh2/)
---
# **So... Who's Really In Charge?**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xfddr-wkwgms-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | friend, Politicians promise change, but too often, the status quo remains. The real question is: who’s truly in control? Is it the voters, or is it the shadowy interest groups flooding our elections with unlimited, undisclosed money? Dark money is the secret weapon of the wealthy few, and it’s time we pay attention.
**What is Dark Money?** Dark money refers to political donations that hide their source. Unlike most donations, dark money flows from politically active nonprofits and LLCs, which are not required to disclose their donors. This means we have no way of knowing who’s really funding political campaigns, leaving voters in the dark about who’s pulling the strings.
**How Does Dark Money Work?** Dark money is funneled through nonprofits and LLCs, often in states with loose regulations. These funds are used to run ads and influence campaigns without revealing who’s behind them. This creates a system where the public has no insight into who’s shaping our elections.
**Why Does Dark Money Matter?** Dark money is poisoning our democracy. It allows corporations and wealthy elites to influence elections without accountability. Voters deserve transparency, but as long as dark money thrives, our political system is hijacked by those who can afford to keep their identities hidden. History proves that secret donations are a formula for corruption.
**Who Benefits?** The ones defending dark money are the very ones benefiting from it—corporations and the ultra-wealthy. They argue for anonymity, but this only protects their ability to manipulate elections without consequence.
**What Can We Do?** While tracking dark money is difficult, watchdogs like AIPAC Tracker continue to expose the influence of these secret donations. We can push for transparency, but we also need to focus on local elections where we can make a real impact. Education is key. When we understand the corrupt systems in place, we can fight back. [**_It's time to reclaim our democracy. Let’s stand up to dark money and ensure that the voices of the many, not the few, are heard. Together, we can make a difference._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xfddr-wkwgmt-kyd76rh4/)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I don’t negotiate with bureaucrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
It’s time to dismantle the fourth branch of government

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTIyLTg4OTk5MTFkMjRkMDQyZDU4OWI1OTZkNzRiNjMxYTdmIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2Rpc21hbnRsZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUwMl9WTS1HMy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzQ0ODktMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MDJfVk0tRzMuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM0NDg5LTM2MjMifQ/Mo4RTvPBAZYQ-x_dNqNKdQ)I'm not running for Governor to "manage" the decline of our great state.
[**I 'm running to dismantle the corrupt system that's crushing small businesses, punishing innovators, and putting unelected bureaucrats in charge of your life.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTIyLTg4OTk5MTFkMjRkMDQyZDU4OWI1OTZkNzRiNjMxYTdmIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2Rpc21hbnRsZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUwMl9WTS1HMy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzQ0ODktMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MDJfVk0tRzMuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM0NDg5LTM2MjMifQ/4kMAM71qnDOjcwkyhcA7zQ)
In today's America, the administrative state isn't solving problems -- **it IS the problem.**
Our system was supposed to be built on checks and balances. However, in practice, it is often the unelected bureaucrats who do the checking, with no one overseeing them.
These so-called "public servants" don't answer to voters. They aren't subject to term limits. And they don't take recesses. They are in session every single week -- quietly issuing rules that reach into nearly every corner of our lives, with the force of law but none of the accountability.
_Let me give you a real example from here in Ohio:_
A small engineering firm in Cincinnati hired a licensed engineer as an independent contractor. Totally legal under Ohio law. But a state licensing board decided to punish them anyway, not because they broke the law, but because the board didn't like how they followed it.
**That 's the regulatory state in action: not enforcing the law, but rewriting it in real time.**
Thankfully, the Ohio Supreme Court got it right. They ruled that bureaucrats don't get to "interpret" the law however they want. They have to follow it.
That ruling was a big win, not just for one business, but for every entrepreneur in this state who's tired of battling a system rigged against them.
But make no mistake: this problem is bigger than one board.
Ohio has 222 state boards and commissions -- each one with the power to create new rules, delay permits, and bury small businesses in red tape.
**This is what happens when we allow a "fourth branch" of government to grow unchecked. The Founding Fathers never envisioned it. The Constitution doesn't authorize it. And if we don't stop it now, it will strangle what's left of our economic engine.**
_So here 's my plan:_[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTIyLTg4OTk5MTFkMjRkMDQyZDU4OWI1OTZkNzRiNjMxYTdmIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2Rpc21hbnRsZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUwMl9WTS1HMy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzQ0ODktMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MDJfVk0tRzMuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM0NDg5LTM2MjMifQ/UTTYin4ljgO91c3sBiqKcg)
* **Repeal** 10 regulations for every new one proposed, like Trump did at the federal level****
* **Enforce** strict timelines on permitting decisions -- no more endless delays
* **Cut** funding to agencies that drag their feet
* Let businesses challenge bureaucratic overreach locally, not just in Columbus
* **Protect** honest citizens from being punished for good-faith mistakes

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTIyLTg4OTk5MTFkMjRkMDQyZDU4OWI1OTZkNzRiNjMxYTdmIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2Rpc21hbnRsZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUwMl9WTS1HMy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzQ0ODktMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MDJfVk0tRzMuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM0NDg5LTM2MjMifQ/8OXpsonh_ciIk6bsEhWpXQ)And I'll go even further: I'll push for a state-level version of the REINS Act, which would require elected lawmakers to approve any major new regulation before it takes effect.
This is how we revive Ohio's economy.
This is how we defend individual liberty.
And this is how we take a sledgehammer to the administrative state -- not just in D.C., but right here in our backyard.
[I'm not running for Governor to manage decline. I'm running to dismantle the system that's holding our people back.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTIyLTg4OTk5MTFkMjRkMDQyZDU4OWI1OTZkNzRiNjMxYTdmIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2Rpc21hbnRsZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUwMl9WTS1HMy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzQ0ODktMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MDJfVk0tRzMuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM0NDg5LTM2MjMifQ/w-noMBy0qxnrbZj0o_uHrg)
But I can't do it alone.
The bureaucrats aren't going quietly. And the career politicians in Columbus? Most of them won't even touch this fight.
That's why I'm asking you to join me -- [right now.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTIyLTg4OTk5MTFkMjRkMDQyZDU4OWI1OTZkNzRiNjMxYTdmIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2Rpc21hbnRsZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUwMl9WTS1HMy4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzQ0ODktMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MDJfVk0tRzMuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM0NDg5LTM2MjMifQ/FI-xnguwjNREeGKaf4zSHg)
If you believe it's time to take power out of the hands of unelected bureaucrats and return it to We the People, now's the time to act.

clean_body: It’s time to dismantle the fourth branch of government not running for Governor to "manage" the decline of our great state. In today's America, the administrative state isn't solving problems -- it IS the problem. Our system was supposed to be built on checks and balances. However, in practice, it is often the unelected bureaucrats who do the checking, with no one overseeing them. These so-called "public servants" don't answer to voters. They aren't subject to term limits. And they don't take recesses. They are in session every single week -- quietly issuing rules that reach into nearly every corner of our lives, with the force of law but none of the accountability. Let me give you a real example from here in Ohio: A small engineering firm in Cincinnati hired a licensed engineer as an independent contractor. Totally legal under Ohio law. But a state licensing board decided to punish them anyway, not because they broke the law, but because the board didn't like how they followed it. That 's the regulatory state in action: not enforcing the law, but rewriting it in real time. Thankfully, the Ohio Supreme Court got it right. They ruled that bureaucrats don't get to "interpret" the law however they want. They have to follow it. That ruling was a big win, not just for one business, but for every entrepreneur in this state who's tired of battling a system rigged against them. But make no mistake: this problem is bigger than one board. Ohio has 222 state boards and commissions -- each one with the power to create new rules, delay permits, and bury small businesses in red tape. This is what happens when we allow a "fourth branch" of government to grow unchecked. The Founding Fathers never envisioned it. The Constitution doesn't authorize it. And if we don't stop it now, it will strangle what's left of our economic engine. So here 's my plan: Repeal 10 regulations for every new one proposed, like Trump did at the federal level Enforce strict timelines on permitting decisions -- no more endless delays Cut funding to agencies that drag their feet Let businesses challenge bureaucratic overreach locally, not just in Columbus Protect** honest citizens from being punished for good-faith mistakes I'll go even further: I'll push for a state-level version of the REINS Act, which would require elected lawmakers to approve any major new regulation before it takes effect. This is how we revive Ohio's economy. This is how we defend individual liberty. And this is how we take a sledgehammer to the administrative state -- not just in D.C., but right here in our backyard. But I can't do it alone. The bureaucrats aren't going quietly. And the career politicians in Columbus? Most of them won't even touch this fight. That's why I'm asking you to join me -- If you believe it's time to take power out of the hands of unelected bureaucrats and return it to We the People, now's the time to act. The regulatory machine has had its run. Let's shut it down and spark a new era of growth, freedom, and prosperity. Thank you, VivekCandidate for Governor of Ohio P.S. The next chapter of the American Dream starts here -- by restoring accountable government. I'm ready to lead. | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 To unsubscribe from Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio,

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What I do when protestors show up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Echo chambers don’t solve anything. Real conversations do.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-l4LbeFMmqCg7HzQ)Peter -
When protestors show up at my events, I don't hide. I don't shut off their microphones. I walk right up to them and start the conversation.
Because this campaign isn't about echo chambers. It's about building something bigger - a movement rooted in truth, courage, and open debate.
**That 's how I've always operated.** [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-zbCX4E9wZtAUeatGBJ4Og)Back in 2024, I joined Charlie Kirk on campuses across the country to take on the tough questions, face protestors head-on, and speak truth without fear.
Now I'm doing the same thing here in Ohio. And I won't stop.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-EMGUz10GRjw)Because we're not just trying to win an election.
We're trying to revive a broken culture - and that starts with showing up, speaking clearly, and refusing to back down.
But I can't do this alone.
If you believe in this movement - if you believe in leading with conviction and not censorship - I'm asking two things of you:
**FIRST:** [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-41caIAYZYdDQ)[Chip in any amount you can comfortably spare to help us grow this campaign across Ohio.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
**SECOND:** Do something even more important: **Talk.**
Talk about this campaign. Talk about what President Trump is doing at the federal level. Talk about what we stand for - even with the folks who disagree with you.
Because that's how we build a movement that can't be ignored. **That 's how we win in 2026 (and beyond)!**
It won't always be easy. You might get pushback. You might get some raised eyebrows. But when people hear the truth - when they see you stand proudly for what you believe - they listen.
We don't win by staying quiet.
[We win by showing up.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
Together, we'll make history!
God bless you,
**Vivek Ramaswamy** Candidate for Governor of Ohio[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-gWyqg)| | |

# Friday, May 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1933, the [Loch Ness Monster](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQxfGnMZ3ReMB8FC62ocu2WyIHD2FWBkf2JIh9-lWu7hvc-iedI_3_3Oab58jH47ffycma5oPOEkmE8nz6KP-4pJe8jkD59EL5neLiZwS0GqwGnIPneM1tFdxKhNRU5EzfdmYAO47V5rAZkHrjTWfCOHSrIeNt2yHYoQkWoGL3WQMLaABG29d-6Bdawd9phSW0d9UCBZaU67-JD9lojVd6U66XtFfRbSLPoppfCieF03me9cZFUr4-rnCSjYsO_tJ86G9ROO3-0qhwimnZ9EGl6D0dRSjrwo9NKFTZhefJMXLpetXCY_ccvy7lR53eDv8HAAD__9HkfkU) was first sighted near Inverness, Scotland, igniting a media frenzy that included a £20,000 reward for capturing “Nessie.” [Strict rules govern secrecy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR3ILHYIhYu_ocvfXokWex182mBkNqDc05-SV7h2RppPmq_bdMPEab3_xwc5iXla6dyZRKhMJ7L8pD0_5bkGKicKlSOzxwk02FrbWsMUMPFrMlVwkQioq8i1vbm0V22HoVqc9tgFay_WE9jQm84MPYBpe4zhasBUyb3XtNXQaj3YvsFr7ylqnClqH8ysjKaQJJfmO6dVFor8ygeVxudHxW4R2XbV_VMwKhjP82zm2b87BaMUPIgVjFgkeSYF4wczna5loXonX0j2Osc6EoW03j_xhhty7fPqGQ-qigvbmZjTfumV0fcHJv7g8qfHDge_AQAA__9GYICa)—and supper—inside the Vatican’s conclave, set to begin on May 7. To guard against outside influence and interference, every detail is tightly controlled—because even a cardinal’s ravioli was once suspected of hiding an illicit message. Learn more in _Et Cetera_. Today's sponsor is [David](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuiw4YAg4dWEVu6dkSHfRBXNkbmAKVPX5Elytz5fzr99H3fuhs676bxCwNpHmI30b54YqbU7ej51y1x5XWylHZkSlv0BjsJsjxBeQLZWXT-0RWZ1QORJJWRzqviktdQNk1213lRmhorMk1fybw3DeSyrknZAmmQgJnTxzcoQeYATVmdsa4MDYA9DWBs0YsCyDqO6fwT3cR3GvwjbpTOJobM6zvzvAj1IWQrZGtxc3ZOkclNx4GQ7YwjLUK2gYhPzy5UO_dCXUHIC4ZZqM-VQ2cwzOjGQ3KI3log69Yg1PU1z1tf4poMCXV98bKk7bw7791yqUQBY0Dnn2b-19Cbln8BAAD__0zwlAc), a _Flyover_ -endorsed product. We’ve got several _Flyover_ team members who love them, and there’s even an internal debate over which flavor reigns supreme—some are loyal to chocolate chip cookie dough, while others back blueberry pie. [Pick up a box today and be the judge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuiw4YAg4dWEVu6dkSHfRBXNkbmAKVPX5Elytz5fzr99H3fuhs676bxCwNpHmI30b54YqbU7ej51y1x5XWylHZkSlv0BjsJsjxBeQLZWXT-0RWZ1QORJJWRzqviktdQNk1213lRmhorMk1fybw3DeSyrknZAmmQgJnTxzcoQeYATVmdsa4MDYA9DWBs0YsCyDqO6fwT3cR3GvwjbpTOJobM6zvzvAj1IWQrZGtxc3ZOkclNx4GQ7YwjLUK2gYhPzy5UO_dCXUHIC4ZZqM-VQ2cwzOjGQ3KI3log69Yg1PU1z1tf4poMCXV98bKk7bw7791yqUQBY0Dnn2b-19Cbln8BAAD__0zwlAc)!

## Severe Weather Kills Five
Severe weather turned deadly this week [as storms in Oklahoma](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQQL_GbEaHwQYGD13Y0rUjOvAR3Bgugkus9Our9Bc6P-k96X1dxgvGFPfrJ27kZeFxp3wmEqFjzJjkJ578kMce6MgodDw5zTgaMFaD1WDGgDG9xqYIfiEyVBfkq7ZxVQe274vV1xarCV29uD6EydoeyXada2aCCYIxRfRvG1gwFUBv2xK7dqYFcKIF5tBMqgEKUfgovznustKSXvyko5x5K5JfRe6nqj-UGZQZcs7ljWd-Q2UGPCTOiZQZ-JZw5Q31kphD3K86EMp66sc9oNCp84qiM-nbzlmZwTWu7p2F4vDhnmNK8XStauC6YUx_afnXr6c3vwEAAP__mRyBGQ) and Pennsylvania left at least five people dead and hundreds of thousands without power. Slow-moving [thunderstorms flooded](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFu6zAQRE8jdTRWlETKBYvfuPNvUwprcWkxWYkGuZbgnD5wAsQHSPsGGLyZt_N4xshxvf7HhZyENK60FyYRyuOOLJ-xpLvcV095R6G8JZ5w1KB7Bb0CPXqM_Bi72rtApKmtyTW2M80A_fFYz84aY0OABjG0fTDtYKj39oKNsYMfgq6je7ZBD7oBOPb2gIOdKABeKMDku0vVAfkoKR_eU1xlpsCPtFE-TGmp2c0it1K1_yp9qvRpJ5T5J6v06TnmBV_g179RhTbKpIqkvBQ14b2Q8oSeHyowllkFTskXFVeVPhjntGCdnb_tkTkWY6sOrgtG_raRP124Of0VAAD__8fLh4I) dozens of Oklahoma roads Wednesday, drowning at least two people trapped in their cars. At least three people died in [Tuesday night storms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GOw2ijFpQ_I3d_O2W5gIXZYNi4Dpk9uk3brf1tt9Jzsn5Pp7LE3zwx_ofdlTk4nJgyQGJMC0FAn35HC-6DoupAGF6xWBgEVzImsuai8WCD--lr6xyiAK7ClU79I925HKaqk25aZT9w7Sd04MejYNeQzu0He-MBiux8upu45KLlvNJDg2Mg0HHQaPjxvaa9Rytp5iaz-gP2tCFd3xhakzcq6A2ojOz7h8TMxNzKaUxOt8v7pyJ-fREWV9p3ZiYb_6L1WcsmOp4EayY60wx7bWFHVZkYq6SsmfxIfj8GFjP1x18-NmlP8l6KfEdAAD__y5rgic) across Pennsylvania, which knocked out power to 400,000, with 71 mph winds damaging buildings, toppling trees, and blowing the roof off a beloved Pittsburgh pizzeria. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GOw2ijFpQ_I3d_O2W5gIXZYNi4Dpk9uk3brf1tt9Jzsn5Pp7LE3zwx_ofdlTk4nJgyQGJMC0FAn35HC-6DoupAGF6xWBgEVzImsuai8WCD--lr6xyiAK7ClU79I925HKaqk25aZT9w7Sd04MejYNeQzu0He-MBiux8upu45KLlvNJDg2Mg0HHQaPjxvaa9Rytp5iaz-gP2tCFd3xhakzcq6A2ojOz7h8TMxNzKaUxOt8v7pyJ-fREWV9p3ZiYb_6L1WcsmOp4EayY60wx7bWFHVZkYq6SsmfxIfj8GFjP1x18-NmlP8l6KfEdAAD__y5rgic). Pennsylvania officials said Thursday that [more than 400 crews](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU9jOtDgxbAULtLQbdqUaMBjcGRsZM9ibU4fba6Q8utL70nv6zE_0HkXtk88SLONc6CSPTFTmgt6_nE5PvkZDKWCTOmKfsVZglQ1qBrkbND519xVRlsiSbeKdDt0fXsHNY7VrnsAoxQRLONgB6UUGGvNvbfGkCU0ldNvGiiQLcCohgbvw0oWcCELq-kW0QEZxzE139EF3sn6V7woNWs8Kq935jOL24eQk5BTKaUpjPQ-hZwwsVs9CTmdjjkvz7Tt9Ukh5Je_MDisM8d01AYP3KhO9J7ILgYhp77rOzmotkranMV573I_iA62A53_s_O_kl1a_gYAAP__ZPeD6A) were working to restore power to over 100,000 customers, with recovery threatened by ongoing strong winds, heavy rain, and possible isolated tornadoes.
## Trump Removes Waltz, Taps Rubio Instead
National Security Advisor Mike Waltz and his deputy, Alex Wong, were ousted Thursday [following fallout from a Signal group chat leak](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcGK3DAQRL9GvvWgke0Zz8GHDYtvm0sggVxMW2rZnZUlI7XHTL4-eH8ht4KCB6_q18f4gRw4zt9xpV58GiMdJZAI5fHAIH-5pF326CgfKJSfKVgcjTYt6Ba0GR1yeI1N5XpPZKiuqL_em9u10-3jUS09uc502FJz841B20zGeXTdY5pahzeqK-5Pmm61uWr9aO8X7O6WvMaJvLaumVSjybGkfPmTOMpCPrzSk_LFprUK_SKyFVW_KTMoMxzHcVlLPDtlBoqwF2WGU0qZYUuBhe0ZV_4k-BKEJAtliCicIgYoZPfM8gKb9mg5QBH0nnKBtAtwhIBCRUDyvm6w7Xkm8CmEdHCcofB8QuyCAoHwU5kBM7y9Xd9_S_1T1UOy7FT9_u3cnI7yg_JW5d5tB4fA5XZXjZ5X5PBlJ_91ybM3_wIAAP__wRSnCA) involving U.S. strike plans in Yemen. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has been tapped to serve as acting national security adviser while holding his current role. Waltz, who took responsibility for adding a journalist to the group thread, will now be nominated as U.S. ambassador to the United Nations. Waltz was reportedly spared an earlier dismissal because Trump [didn't want to sack a high-profile figure before reaching his 100-day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOmzAQhp_GbI7sA0IYPHRhS9eO6MBHcq2xkX0kok9fwSt0ueWTPt33_3qOT-TA8fUTV3KypDHStwQSoTx-MchfLmmXPXrKXxTKnxRmHMFAq02rDYweORxjU3m3EAHVFTnbNXf7MG3fV28HxsIyT829h8fd1rb1FqHrmrr3xtf4qNidNtMasMb0bXfDRzfTYnCixcy-mVRjyLOkfPudOMqblnCkD-XbnNYquLfIVlT9Q8GgYIjHloqcSMFwihUM5jpWwbAXffYpGCTv66YFt6JX_kP6atV4cb1HjeuEpaBPWed94qRxFo4vHVE4RQy60LxnlkOj_3ChrGCosvPbl0Pgcu9UY14rcri-lP-a9uPgXwAAAP__dyWPJw) milestone in office, which he reached Tuesday.
## World’s Oldest Person Dies at 116
Brazilian nun Sister Inah Canabarro Lucas, who [was the world’s oldest person](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO8yAUBOCnwV2sAwZfCoq_cZe_3RJxOSSsiInwidns06-8r7DdSCN90szH1Vxtymm7_bcP1BSL2bDtGYmwmmYzfae9vOi1BazNEtajZG-NAKEuoC4gTLApv43sgo6IAocONZ_kyGdQy9Ld9ezj6JCjGxeJAWYrhhAGmIJDF5aZd0mfGigQHGBRU2_nyWME6zCCD9IxCRgSldp_lrTRHWN-lwNr78ujy_pO9NzZ8I-JlYm1tdY758-OifUcw8RqKyWf8Yy-yu2AG1df79JVHZ4t5Zz2cWISbg-b8q9Kf7ri0OInAAD__0SCdJM), died in Porto Alegre at age 116 on Wednesday. A lifelong member of the Teresian Sisters and a devoted soccer fan, Sister Inah credited her longevity to faith, routine, and discipline. Her passing passes the title to [115-year-old Ethel Caterham of Surrey](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb8GOqPHwzamcLENXbbdEj3sR_DK4Mg4sTJfP8r8wtRXukfn_LstNwoxnPe_dLAtW1pOrlfkUjgvlWL5Cld6lufpOVcqnF8pOloQUAlQAnDxFOJ7ka23GzPy0LLtR6l7A2qa2t1KPWjQmhDB6NFsgzEOJ-15daS8dG2wnzdQgD3ApMaOzOh4A1p5A-fl2khgH0rK3f8UzrLzFt_pxblz6Wij3Ut5XM3wp8G5wbnW2r1pT-mzNjh_dBqc1xxKuHZR00Gn6HslTjrYi5py9AIMql6NRnZ7OWKbrX_UEGO49NhIuB8U4g-s_KrQy-J3AAAA__-a_nqt), England. Caterham, born in 1909, is the last living subject of Edward VII. A former au pair and Army wife who lived in India, Gibraltar, and Hong Kong, Caterham now resides in a nursing home and says her secret is “never arguing with anyone” and simply doing what she likes.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d4ec539-d5c1-4a02-a94f-5d7be0cb2860/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: History Facts
subject: Lincoln's balloon corps 🎈
body:
In 1861, shortly after the start of the Civil War, President Abraham Lincoln authorized the creation of an aerial surveillance organization known as the Union Army Balloon Corps.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ojmepq88peby23t1p8fpz0gihi40uj139bybym41q8jsry3j0ls5qyc5vswmx6vi8r6rju390oaag9f33cfc34ltbmjej5lgntzdkno5cjj0xml5y1mn7187bp2fk6f9arshyle7r8d6gxh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [Abraham Lincoln approved a balloon corps during the Civil War.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n 1861, shortly after the start of the Civil War, President Abraham Lincoln authorized the creation of an aerial surveillance organization known as the [Union Army Balloon Corps](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Before the war, balloonists were usually carnival performers, but that all changed thanks to aeronaut Thaddeus S.C. Lowe. On July 11, 1861, Lowe was invited to demonstrate his ballooning skills for the president, who hoped to use hot-air balloons for aerial reconnaissance missions in the war.
---
During his demonstration, Lowe ascended 500 feet into the air and relayed a telegraph about what he saw to Lincoln’s staff. After the successful showcase, Lincoln offered Lowe the role of chief aeronaut in the Balloon Corps, which formally began operations that October. The purpose was to gather intel about the Confederate Army’s location and relay it to Union troops on the ground, who could then fire on the army from a great distance without even seeing the enemy. The fleet grew to include seven balloons, some of which were tethered to barges in the Potomac River that effectively served as early precursors to the modern aircraft carrier. Though the surveillance proved strategically beneficial, many Union officers, including General George B. McClellan, were concerned about the safety of the balloons. Lowe ultimately resigned his post on May 7, 1863, and the Balloon Corps were dissolved shortly thereafter.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Bugs Bunny was named an Honorary Marine.
The title of Honorary Marine was formally established in 1992, and has since been awarded to fewer than 100 people, including comedian Bob Hope and actor Gary Sinise. But decades earlier, the distinction was unofficially bestowed upon a different breed of entertainer: Bugs Bunny. In 1943, the legendary cartoon character starred in the animated short _Super-Rabbit_ , in which he joins the Marines and sings their official song, the “Marines’ Hymn.” The actual Marines were so flattered by the portrayal that Bugs was [inducted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svmqbd&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) as an honorary member soon after, and the organization even issued the character a set of official dog tags and registration papers. Throughout the remainder of World War II, Bugs Bunny was “promoted” several times, rising to the rank of master sergeant before being “discharged” after the war.

clean_body: In 1861, shortly after the start of the Civil War, President Abraham Lincoln authorized the creation of an aerial surveillance organization known as the Union Army Balloon Corps. | I n 1861, shortly after the start of the Civil War, President Abraham Lincoln authorized the creation of an aerial surveillance organization known as the . Before the war, balloonists were usually carnival performers, but that all changed thanks to aeronaut Thaddeus S.C. Lowe. On July 11, 1861, Lowe was invited to demonstrate his ballooning skills for the president, who hoped to use hot-air balloons for aerial reconnaissance missions in the war. During his demonstration, Lowe ascended 500 feet into the air and relayed a telegraph about what he saw to Lincoln’s staff. After the successful showcase, Lincoln offered Lowe the role of chief aeronaut in the Balloon Corps, which formally began operations that October. The purpose was to gather intel about the Confederate Army’s location and relay it to Union troops on the ground, who could then fire on the army from a great distance without even seeing the enemy. The fleet grew to include seven balloons, some of which were tethered to barges in the Potomac River that effectively served as early precursors to the modern aircraft carrier. Though the surveillance proved strategically beneficial, many Union officers, including General George B. McClellan, were concerned about the safety of the balloons. Lowe ultimately resigned his post on May 7, 1863, and the Balloon Corps were dissolved shortly thereafter. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Soldiers who enlisted in the Union Army 2,762,341 | | Year of the first untethered manned hot-air balloon flight 1783 | Year of the first untethered manned hot-air balloon flight 1783 | | Average age of a Civil War Union soldier 25.8 | | Electoral votes won by Lincoln in the 1864 presidential election 212 | Electoral votes won by Lincoln in the 1864 presidential election 212 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Bugs Bunny was named an Honorary Marine. The title of Honorary Marine was formally established in 1992, and has since been awarded to fewer than 100 people, including comedian Bob Hope and actor Gary Sinise. But decades earlier, the distinction was unofficially bestowed upon a different breed of entertainer: Bugs Bunny. In 1943, the legendary cartoon character starred in the animated short Super-Rabbit , in which he joins the Marines and sings their official song, the “Marines’ Hymn.” The actual Marines were so flattered by the portrayal that Bugs was as an honorary member soon after, and the organization even issued the character a set of official dog tags and registration papers. Throughout the remainder of World War II, Bugs Bunny was “promoted” several times, rising to the rank of master sergeant before being “discharged” after the war. name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Show some love to these Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow veterans need your support.

| | |

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.

name: JD Vance
subject: I thank God every day for this victory
body:
We needed it.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apaS/?__vbtrk=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot - this is Vice President JD Vance.
**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apaS/?__vbtrk=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, friend.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apaS/?__vbtrk=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apaS/?__vbtrk=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.
[CHIP IN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apaS/?__vbtrk=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Freedom,_
**Vice President JD Vance**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apaS/?__vbtrk=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg3ODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Driverless Semis, Walmart's 'Store of the Future,' and a Plesiosaur Discovery
body:
Aurora, a Pittsburgh-based self-driving freight company, launched its first driverless semi-truck on public roads in Texas this week. It operates on I-45 between Dallas and Houston for Uber Freight and Hirschbach Motor Lines.

He and his brothers Rudy and Steve formed a vocal group known for hits like “Broken Lady,” “All the Gold in California,” and “Houston (Means I'm One Day Closer to You).” If you're driving on I-45, you might be sharing the road with a driverless 18-wheeler. ## New DFW Terminal Doubling in Size
Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport’s new Terminal F will [double in size](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdCB7sYEULq6hy7VXogWvE0sLRPYqTt7-xP8KfzkaaTTf9---3DFxOh5_cScvn3guB9XCJEJ5CTm9KTOVUmhPpSLvmKUUWUCDa7VrNSwBE38X2wS_6nAzDXkz2sFM_TDZ5umNm8YIJg6Tpi1qHEyv3dqPoTc0oAtN8teYdhqM0QZMZ4zVg72Nbo3jFh0oqykkOXMnTxL6YIn8Pd-Uu-3cG_ZPkVdR_R8Fs4K51tod6xZivWoF88WjYOZzQ1Yw4045bXi0mDKng0obYr3C68zSPlCotEJ5TwdyGxXM_dRrd7MK5ib78KqJOZVhVFY_dkz8c0J-p-7t4X8AAAD__7Omgx0) from 15 to 31 gates, according to a Thursday announcement by airport CEO Sean Donohue and American Airlines CEO Robert Isom. American is also extending its lease with the airport to 2043. The original project's price tag was $1.6 billion when it was announced in 2023, but that figure has [increased to $4 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdCDbGBMKF9fQ5dor0QavgyWD0XoDyd-fuF-4borRjN77uU93iCluz29Y0fE75GnDsyRkRpo8xQMpYSkF11hOSCsQl8KTlrqrZVdLPXmI6TOZyruH9IOq0KneWHVr7c1Ui5u9tGAHGIxGlMNs5tbbHn3AYOe2H6rorjHZSa2UVFo1ShlpzdB3j9DPodPCSPSRMzW8IOMbSkiffCA1c16r5BbmvYj2S-hR6DFk4jMTL838SvwiXGG_ikKPF5nQIxMcmK6AtMYNUo3vHbYS81b7cNYQac_EQo8VOb-fMaVYbC-MfK4Q098r_8_V4fRvAAAA__8cNYED) with the expansion. American Airlines, which accounts for 82% of the airport’s traffic, will be the new terminal’s sole tenant. DFW International Airport is also undergoing a [$3 billion renovation of Terminal C](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ_GZD2ye8zPBAQTLBftpRcig5sZS7ZB7j68-_Yn7hU2qqCkT1Xfn8_504UY8uu3SzTK17bPmSpHEqEy-xJOKpGYmVLg6mJyRZhlRo0t6BY0zt6F-D3bxo-L9g_T0Gh625nh3g22eY9kh8dj6JyzuKwrbh7v_V2jxmGwnrqlCeMF061GY7RBczPG6s4--nbZ-nVrUVlNPshebvImoS_HW_zeTyq3dU9NHN8iB6v7U-GkcKq13hLnq1M4UYa_rHCS4k6KCqfrncLJbxVcKMdeBBiESgrZRdighhhhIZAaVgLHsITXFUd0OZOHkE9iSZQFXmWvDLKDXRROrsDzaT509-ujKaM_LlDgrldWv5IL8f9Y-Znic8R_AQAA__91l5GU), which will add more gates ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The Metroplex will host nine games during the competition. Last year, 87.8 million passengers passed through DFW, making it the [world’s third-busiest airport](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu4zAQRL-G6mgsKUpyChUuoi5XHXClsBJXMQ9L0ljSZvL3B90vpJ0BBvPen4_1AwOH9PkLI83168hrolaYaiVZvYQXCVMphWIoDTmi1FLqasEOGgYNdvUY-Ht1nZ838G-mo9lMbjTXfry67j6DGfBA6IF6M21-gN75vu93sxsY0V27MJ9jMIA1Bow1F2McjO5tGrZj2o_BKgfkQ81yqXeq9IXl4O_8IrnsOXY832t9FNXflF2UXVprl1jS2Sm7UNLPouxSBV_Eyi4nnbKLP5rGII8sVWMkCTumM-CQqGgh3O_abdoTsj6y6F1yS_ovNWJdSWJIyHp7Bvb5WZVdUPTtZt5hfP_dyewfLTCHMk7KwWfEwP-v1p8Jfs32XwAAAP__LVCRIA). By the end of the decade, the airport is projected to accommodate 100 million passengers annually.
## Legislative Update
Several high-profile bills advanced in either the Texas House or Senate this week. The current legislative session ends a month from today, although [crucial deadlines](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8jAQBOCncToie3GcpHCB_l_puPbKaPFuwNLGQbYV4O1PoHuDq2c0nzTf5_mMUWK6fuHKvj6XbU78KMK1cp4px52zcCmF11geKCvmWkqdQUN30N1Bw0wY5TXbhvxF02ga9qa3zgxHN9jm5t0FhoGJexxH6ywh9F1wAcgNg3bUN9G_x3SnwRhtwLTGWO3s2HeXpQ9LB8pqpli33NYbV35iWeS17ZzbsK2N-Fut96KOJwWTgkmytJ9Se912BVMJmBKTgimgcCLMRcH0Jv8zksTEp1Djlv79pu2dliZ7uj-iSCyuV1ZfV4zy0erfPto9_AQAAP__oJN7_A) are approaching quickly. On Tuesday, the Senate unanimously passed legislation that [clarifies medical exceptions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8GuoySEPJTUGxDd7fdEoXEzFhrBpT4wszbr5h9hNsdyZ8_2efP1_QVkfB5_x1XGPi1bNMTzkrADGXKBQ8oBLVWWLGekdZYuFaetNS9kL2QesoR6T2ZNg-zzEG1MChnrPKd9aZ9DL6zi01KQggesoNgne6lMxGyXLyULQ6XTPZSKyWVVjeljLQmuH5eXFp63RgJGXkrN34AwyvWhd7bAeWWtrWl4cG816b71eix0eN5nre_xzdcw0aPsTAmgkaP11-NHveNkDFd8eMSBHesFPm7XFSct8K4PQW8EuyfNCOR2GOtUMX_lQrPyBetbRA2xC750ImsrRSmg154MyfhvDUhWu-MdW0Z8n4iEVbrGiPva0T6nM8_K_0Y9L8AAAD___L4lUs) to the state’s surgical abortion ban. Dubbed the “Life of the Mother Act,” Senate Bill 31 states that doctors can remove an ectopic pregnancy and the remains of a miscarriage. On Wednesday, the Senate passed a bill that extends the private enforcement mechanism of the state’s abortion ban to [manufacturers and distributors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGq4zAQRb_G7iZIsuzEhYrA4i7bLmxjxtboZUCWgkbPfvn7xfmF7QYGzrn3_nnMD-TI6es3buTqT8hzokMi1Upl9oV3KpFEhDaWA-OGpYrU2SjTg-pBmdkjx_dsW-8W5UfdktNXO-hbN9xs-3Ter2rohm4Yuw51CKNZb52hkfyoVjtiy-6EqV4ZrZU2-qK1VYMdr_0SrmvoTWMVea65XOqTKv2ghPjOO5XLmrc2umetL2m6e2OmxkzHcVw2SeevMRMl-JbGTGepxkyfeylMARZ-YaksmACXXCrnBGtOQkm-BTjBxwRCCStBKPgWOKWwcIxQMyyY4MUxnkgscL_rX38f-9QW518Hx8gyXBurvjbk-Ela_2_f3Zl_AQAA__-fX5H0) of abortion-inducing drugs. Approved along party lines, Senate Bill 2880 stipulates that it cannot be challenged in court before it goes into effect. In the House, lawmakers approved legislation that prohibits children under 18 from [having social media accounts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO5CAQRb_GzrCABj8Cgk2czaYbWhiKdml5WBTT7vn7lSfZD5j0lOro3vvnY_uwGDE_f9sEpr1D2TJcFKE1qJuv-IIagYggIV02JlsbUdskl5pxzbjcvMX4tanem537RfRgxKRGMT_GWfWH2Zc5yMDVqKagwXsHs97dqCcrl-D1o0dzy7jmUggupBiEUHxUy6T3MLmgZac4eGylDu2ABm9LIX6VF9TBldRHc7R2Uvf41cm1k-t1XcPft833sZPr3aaT6_cbO0vEhu4_OMonATstERDbMUa225wxP1nCXCqxUEtiroJtN6Ti0EaWwKNl1rnymdst66vx54UxIo1Tp_gzWYzf6drPNn0Z-S8AAP__I1CPfA) and requires [disclosures on political ads](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u6yAQRldjd1jMBINTULwmXV57SwuHIUYBO4JRSHZ_5Wzh9t-Pzvm5zlcXU9zu_10my--wzxu1moiZyuxLfFFJVGulHGtzKbvCtfKMEkchRyFx9i6mz6x6bxfpz9CTBaM0TCc9qX61AIuCoJTXACaoUTo8h8nT4nFBY3wf7TEmR4kAEhAGACW1OptxCeYWRuyUJB95LwOvxPR2NaTP_qIy3PbcJ7syP2t3-tfhpcNLa204EBrR4wh0eFldFd-eWNy2kRfPPUWON5dEpkxVtNWxaCQe294ESq0nlH2x_tliSrFq0yl5zy6m7yP_zdPL4m8AAAD__9sIfZo) created using AI-generated imagery.
## Driverless Semis Hit Texas Roads
Aurora, a Pittsburgh-based self-driving freight company, launched its [first driverless semi-truck on public roads](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuy4yAMhp8Gd2SEfCEuKLZxl2239GAQsWbBzgBxkrc_47zCadTon--__LvNN8uRt_tfm8jUd9jnjV4lUq2UZ5_5oByplEKJy8vGZHMtpc4I2EvoJeDsLcfP3DXeLOBH1ZBRuhvUtR2uXbOaa-iXNoDyI4y0WBe0GoYl-AGWVmmNDZsTBj2gUqBQXZTqYOhG3S9Bu9Cj6IA81z1f6kqV3raE-NkPyhe3pyaatdZHEe0fgZPAqZJbXX5ubj3fAqeTLnCC71ECJ_vMe7Yy2lNERbo9JcqObZSFYpBna97usuan-y8L5YMdSd7k11vg1GTjHy-OkcugRQf3ZDl-w9TfTXgY_AkAAP__0wyGVA) in Texas this week. It operates on I-45 between Dallas and Houston for Uber Freight and Hirschbach Motor Lines. The company transports over 100 loads a week using 30 supervised trucks. During a four-year pilot program, it logged [3 million miles over 10,000 hauls](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u4zAQhJ-G6iiQNPVXsDBwUOdrrjggjUBJS2sRSnS4a8t--0Bu8gCpZzD45vt_GS4eI27Xv34Fx8-Qhg12isAMeZgzPiBHICJYkXYfV5-ZiAejTCVVJZUZZo_xNdhidqOaO12A042tdXuqW1ssrgmtNtMEQVuYtLdVe2q7DjrfjVUdwligO8ZUpYzWShtdam1VbbumGkMzhcoIq2BGTrnkBRienkJ8pQfkckprEd3CfCNxOgvTC9Pv-16utB2ZMD1s8k7C9McpYXqGadlSTNfX0URepJcx-VmmIG-eOCOQ9PecspcLMskfA5LzffqUK0YgThtI3OQbRpjeZ3k-6z8f_8avIrv5tmOMSHUjrLquHuMblH-n9-HMdwAAAP__vlaScA). By the end of the year, it aims to scale up to a few dozen autonomous trucks on the road. Industry groups have expressed skepticism about the technology, citing concerns about “phantom braking,” insufficient testing, and limited transparency regarding safety records. Some studies show driverless semis could [eliminate up to 500,000 jobs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQBeCnwd1YQPBfQRFp5Wqz7Wq3sYgZB3QxRDAJydtfOa9wqylG-nTO-XtZLsYHH29_zI6aXltaItYSkAjzYrN_Yg5YSsHdl2rCbjKVQovksgPeAZeLNT68F9VYfeV2Eg1qMahejKd-VI3T3Sp4t25GKTkZNY0r37ia5Gi3QaFaT43XB8Y7LoXgQopWCMV7NQ3ddRvWrZNMcbSeUm7JIeHLlC280xNzu6a9CdoR3Qs7nZmcmZxrre1e4vFjcsYIj8LkbB6UjpvIYWZy_vQBkxHIfPl4A0rwoSEnYwtUTw5ighQRruh8tEAOoTrEcHAZzmfx6_-_368ma3uvPgRf-oEpftuND59k9LM9n1p-BwAA___8mYs0). According to a survey conducted by Advocates for Highway & Auto Safety, 86% of U.S. drivers are worried about sharing the road with a driverless truck. However, [proponents of the technology](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu4yAURVeDOyIeBkwKimncZdopLQzPCRocIni2k91_OVv4_dE9Ovffbbr5lNPz_tev6Oi9lOmJR8tIhHWKNe1YM7bWcE3t8Hn1lVqjSQqpudBcyCn6lD-T6qKbRbxChw4GZcD2xqru4awN2hgIA1rfezB90CCGOQDO2s4BuuTOMaGFBBAg4QKghFHXQc_LEBYtmRIYE5V6oQcSvn1b8qfsWC-hrF12D6JXY_0fJkcmx-M4Tm7HescTYHI8i5gcjb5qsEyOfquleu43Ks-ylq1xqlv4z5dUG_GI-az-8K-qqy6-jpRzamZgStxXn_JXTL-7a3fyJwAA__9Jv4Ck) say it can improve safety, reduce delivery times, and help address driver shortages.

It operates on I-45 between Dallas and Houston for Uber Freight and Hirschbach Motor Lines. | | | | | | Friday May 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1948, country singer was born in Seminole. He and his brothers Rudy and Steve formed a vocal group known for hits like “Broken Lady,” “All the Gold in California,” and “Houston (Means I'm One Day Closer to You).” If you're driving on I-45, you might be sharing the road with a driverless 18-wheeler. Check out in today's Roundup , and let us know how you feel about it in the Poll. Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | New DFW Terminal Doubling in Size Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport’s new Terminal F will from 15 to 31 gates, according to a Thursday announcement by airport CEO Sean Donohue and American Airlines CEO Robert Isom. American is also extending its lease with the airport to 2043. The original project's price tag was $1.6 billion when it was announced in 2023, but that figure has with the expansion. American Airlines, which accounts for 82% of the airport’s traffic, will be the new terminal’s sole tenant. DFW International Airport is also undergoing a , which will add more gates ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The Metroplex will host nine games during the competition. Last year, 87.8 million passengers passed through DFW, making it the . By the end of the decade, the airport is projected to accommodate 100 million passengers annually. Legislative Update Several high-profile bills advanced in either the Texas House or Senate this week. The current legislative session ends a month from today, although are approaching quickly. On Tuesday, the Senate unanimously passed legislation that to the state’s surgical abortion ban. Dubbed the “Life of the Mother Act,” Senate Bill 31 states that doctors can remove an ectopic pregnancy and the remains of a miscarriage. On Wednesday, the Senate passed a bill that extends the private enforcement mechanism of the state’s abortion ban to of abortion-inducing drugs. Approved along party lines, Senate Bill 2880 stipulates that it cannot be challenged in court before it goes into effect. In the House, lawmakers approved legislation that prohibits children under 18 from and requires created using AI-generated imagery. Driverless Semis Hit Texas Roads Aurora, a Pittsburgh-based self-driving freight company, launched its in Texas this week. It operates on I-45 between Dallas and Houston for Uber Freight and Hirschbach Motor Lines. The company transports over 100 loads a week using 30 supervised trucks. During a four-year pilot program, it logged . By the end of the year, it aims to scale up to a few dozen autonomous trucks on the road. Industry groups have expressed skepticism about the technology, citing concerns about “phantom braking,” insufficient testing, and limited transparency regarding safety records. Some studies show driverless semis could . According to a survey conducted by Advocates for Highway & Auto Safety, 86% of U.S. drivers are worried about sharing the road with a driverless truck. However, say it can improve safety, reduce delivery times, and help address driver shortages. | Flying together with our sponsor Once upon a time, we had to make lists and when we needed things. body:

| Dear Peter,

| ✉️ RSVP: On Facebook [here](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NgcHHzCrA0QwiOei3Egf4er9rONClxze1jPmJLcSzCNnk2_df1lSXCEMzMv6BGt-3foJbFLbxbo8_n7vPzH9GknmWeRQIK7-wMig1ujETNWn8i2Dmwpk6QK7rxMaLiPW2rthvTgckc1oNPqjVpHtag3aTZff69ddZaAqbenBiK6NCskMt3M4aEVTYuRoiNWtm10baKkQ7gQStvFWrItXEOAOgsWT3vpAcc40wPRxNaxryPknZDE0AIYSw0CyMZ3WWiIa00uSpqfDPHHIGVeIoOBftNGVv4y-O3ZDTFMSCa_1WnbKwkQfNvOUTQtrKXavHKWNIe0Fs1-Evcp-gvug10EAbT1v6IarmPdY8IYCu_fUUBpXfymDl4Hwf3BIic25OAy5rlG-hBGqRhIRhdTlJ_Lm4JwOf0xVgFr4WMJAkCzVWIE05FGMzc379ea8sQ1UYUtijFa1CPs=&c=GMXreSTe-0oGsbbsxq7ckXRl6YOJ0XUmXn1yF8kA199y73jxM4EKNA==&ch=XJ0koj44TjgRNHHpXh3symXGvUIOmFR6PFK-OmiALMY6qtnb-NMPlQ==)
As Massachusetts continues to battle high taxes, burdensome regulations, a crippling migrant crisis, and exorbitant energy costs, Senator Tarr is on the front lines fighting for common sense in the State Senate.
Bruce Tarr has always believed in bringing people together, standing up for our communities, and leading with principle and integrity. As State Senate Minority Leader, he is a tireless advocate for smart, effective policies that make a real difference in our Commonwealth.
Your support helps Bruce keep fighting for us -- and we can't wait to celebrate with you over a wonderful spring brunch! If you can't join us for the event, please consider a donation of $25, $50, $100, or $250 to help Senator Tarr continue his advocacy for us in the State House.
---

name: Brad Finstad
subject: 100 Days Survey
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQqfkCGIy40AggvsFGlsYDpg3d-YL6sWkBeALh_ZgGqscLWakBbau1IvrsTVs)
---
| Dear Friend,
---
President Trump just hit the 100-day mark of his second term, and he's already made serious progress on the promises he campaigned on.
But I need to hear what you think so far.

## Peddling BS Then, and Peddling it Now – HotAir
As Ed wrote yesterday in his VIP post, the original publisher of the Steele Dossier, Ben Smith, has expressed some regrets about having dropped the stinking pile of horse manure into the public realm. ## Nashville Drag Queen Middle School Teacher To Host “Drag Extravaganza” At Pride Festival Open To Kids
Image Credits: Jim Nix / CC & Nashville Pride/Facebook & Instagram The Tennessee Conservative Staff – A Nashville Middle School teacher who openly advertises his side hustle as a Drag Queen is set to host the main stage during the three-day Nashville Pride Festival at the end of June. Benjamin Slinkard, who has been employed [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/OtbezVgAgU4qj6jSkGTLR6uRArw4W46ekoat91UDCw1791CFpElg7G3Cw9Uv-lDfn2KMYpWjpMc6qJLSV9jglmHT-tTcxuQ4ZpQyPTlQPKeLN9kfh67RTBexelf_9bfVxO-ljKBJeVHppn0vbuv4XbSBHvent8cba6TeY22wIMCWKU9t-bwyYlW6uN9sis92EN2eCpkPeOsEDtzUsE_V84hvUSq4aoZ9KrTJfJA97Ifvep8SF24L-FSlkag9GKUz41kicHfP-ykXjhRIgh7xvmc7j1hXV5CTlIbEtqFS5c5CwmDaKcbDkEzbm3Zp6Vs7mfETlMEoO7nptw5XM3cbMOe8vwZIr5-wlqm_jF0DnkdSSKpAVF5-ZHJdQDxFVhFUspenQIok6rDukL7V/iXb4fetZBvE0pxLOTbyaGWii5b7cdDir/8)

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89688?t=6&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89688?t=7&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS)

**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89688?t=8&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS)

---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89688?t=11&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89688?t=12&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89688?t=13&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19721%2E878179%2Ei0GjiS).**

## Scientists discover surprising way to cook potatoes for weight loss and improved insulin resistance within weeks
New research has revealed that potatoes, often maligned as unhealthy, can actually support weight loss and improve insulin resistance when prepared properly. The findings, from scientists at Pennington Biomedical Research Center, suggest the popular vegetables can be a satisfying, nutrient-rich addition to a healthy diet. This challenges long-held misconceptions about potatoes being merely empty carbohydrates. Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=784aeb3313634703810b8b3ac19292bc&_e=18n1gJu51DVZ3Qm6lS1CeCIYtlLJTKYLAkoiwQ8UqCwn7ttEqS8cVvjucqWOromZkAGmOtMNDCpYKBk0qhDRDxCXsOMOqNjCv_7AUJ5vmM5ELJIajpgstGKRuxnX0UE7yrtw3Q7oOG7rmzKAC8ILeRLhaYvT4POQy2YA-046hx8t4KeBqP7MOVGiSMV8308ZOM-P0trozhwqE0v0AQyrwW1-U9E7puVM-bdhHTDxFMcp3gFzGUojQx_n7asA9M4YJ1paANmbRbvMLcdTGB8LgdN-1A8GVJdKeNZ8kOwF5A7mrG_un5snEWCzBO0Zk9PTslMIiS9sBkrwuPsO0wanZ_-Tt2txiUqjKA0L_hLFX8mZbIaX5GYE3SNdNbHZfG7Wdi86uRGT6AmsFw7F_XuQzw%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! → If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... → If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great... → If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department... ...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick to lead Trump 's commission on religious liberty**," Texas Tribune's **Katharine Wilson** \-- "Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** has been tapped to chair President **Donald Trump 's** new commission on religious liberty, which was announced during the National Day of Prayer celebration at the White House on Thursday.

"You are restoring the hopes and the prayers of millions upon millions of believers of all faiths," said Patrick, referencing Trump, during a speech at the event.

The commission, according to Trump's [executive order](https://substack.com/redirect/838918a3-3911-48bf-b1a2-cb887e74cfb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), will make a report about threats to religious liberty and strategies to increase awareness of religious pluralism in the country.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/8dd05a6c-b049-4939-990a-d9e9afa58394?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This commission is a part of Trump's push to "bring back religion," to the United States. Trump on Thursday touted his pardons of anti-abortion protesters, the reinstatement of military members who were discharged due to vaccine mandates, creation of a Department of Justice task force to eradicate "anti-Christian bias," and executive order against anti-semitism.

**Ben Carson** , the Housing and Urban Development Secretary in the first Trump administration, will serve as the commission's vice-chair. Other [commission members](https://substack.com/redirect/4278c632-2791-45e8-acf8-2f242bfcabe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) include television host Dr. **Phil McGraw** , Cardinal**Timothy Dolan** , various religious leaders, and **Kelly Shackelford** , the CEO of First Liberty, a Plano-based conservative legal organization. Commission members will serve at least until July 4, 2026.

Patrick approached Trump with the idea for the commission, Trump said during his speech in the Rose Garden.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/8dd05a6c-b049-4939-990a-d9e9afa58394?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Patrick, who was in Washington on Thursday for the announcement, said during his speech that the United States was "birthed by prayer," and founded on the "Judeo-Christian ethic," that people can worship without government interference. Patrick accused the Biden administration of having attacked people of faith.

"We have a magnificent inheritance of religious liberty and every believer today, no matter your faith, has a claim to that inheritance," Patrick said.

Patrick has long promoted policies to [infuse religion into public life](https://substack.com/redirect/79a9c92f-da2a-46b8-8386-d96e6a049630?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), most recently prioritizing legislation that would require the Ten Commandments to be posted in public school classrooms and allow time for prayer in public schools. Patrick has referred to the United States as "a Christian nation" and echoed many of his political allies in arguing that there "is no separation of church and state. It was not in the Constitution."

"We were a nation founded upon not the words of our founders, but the words of God because he wrote the Constitution," Patrick [said in 2022](https://substack.com/redirect/1d781782-721d-49ee-a7e2-f41a451b04a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/6dbda8ca-f2fa-4515-97f0-0b58e789ce50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED** _: As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries._
