Dan Patrick to lead Trump 's commission on religious liberty," Texas Tribune's Katharine Wilson \-- "Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has been tapped to chair President Donald Trump 's new commission on religious liberty, which was announced during the National Day of Prayer celebration at the White House on Thursday. "You are restoring the hopes and the prayers of millions upon millions of believers of all faiths," said Patrick, referencing Trump, during a speech at the event. The commission, according to Trump's , will make a report about threats to religious liberty and strategies to increase awareness of religious pluralism in the country. This commission is a part of Trump's push to "bring back religion," to the United States. Trump on Thursday touted his pardons of anti-abortion protesters, the reinstatement of military members who were discharged due to vaccine mandates, creation of a Department of Justice task force to eradicate "anti-Christian bias," and executive order against anti-semitism. Ben Carson , the Housing and Urban Development Secretary in the first Trump administration, will serve as the commission's vice-chair. Other include television host Dr. Phil McGraw , CardinalTimothy Dolan , various religious leaders, and Kelly Shackelford , the CEO of First Liberty, a Plano-based conservative legal organization. Commission members will serve at least until July 4, 2026. Patrick approached Trump with the idea for the commission, Trump said during his speech in the Rose Garden. Patrick, who was in Washington on Thursday for the announcement, said during his speech that the United States was "birthed by prayer," and founded on the "Judeo-Christian ethic," that people can worship without government interference. Patrick accused the Biden administration of having attacked people of faith. "We have a magnificent inheritance of religious liberty and every believer today, no matter your faith, has a claim to that inheritance," Patrick said. Patrick has long promoted policies to , most recently prioritizing legislation that would require the Ten Commandments to be posted in public school classrooms and allow time for prayer in public schools. Patrick has referred to the United States as "a Christian nation" and echoed many of his political allies in arguing that there "is no separation of church and state. It was not in the Constitution." "We were a nation founded upon not the words of our founders, but the words of God because he wrote the Constitution," Patrick ." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick to lead Trump’s commission on religious liberty** ,” Texas Tribune's **Katharine Wilson** \-- "Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** has been tapped to chair President **Donald Trump’s** new commission on religious liberty, which was announced during the National Day of Prayer celebration at the White House on Thursday.

“You are restoring the hopes and the prayers of millions upon millions of believers of all faiths,” said Patrick, referencing Trump, during a speech at the event.

The commission, according to Trump’s [executive order](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eIB8PTgcQUx8UQhmOEC4T6bpAPqAzAxLFS6qQuZMtUkcyrolQ8clAAlu5a8icm1pR22SskUeNCcKAd89fMCCyn7901FC1PmxxGcZTNcpMLz_0LcTHSGs-TvT2tm1ucuzmSNaVsIQLAyx4-vYzPflFj2ifpGW6mJwvZdOF_nif8oQl7oTGLFZl0Tn3C36WcamAO8XYXORMrEURhOr9-UDjV9GTU6UWK2PWmqkjE8cnSZICmILsUOqJCgaEKSqq6ddqJGMYSWW31wqy-0-FPSw6rm9K768uplOQlFb0HBtabCsNqTP_dAgFek6ec__T5xa-Nwauv_uPbn2VYRt6IgV_VILVoRbFSP_r96pWhfty8NJIgNA0M7yKZmPij6xAgJUuN-16cqVdVio3CwlmgyzWy3jVSvF7aqUmWvyDAVeYMGgzADRcUWS690ZMn9GD4rS7JjIVu7zowTQMHubA04PcriqNSR6MP7oKYkXajwbNF_7QeOMTyy1_AfMPDDLCgClsPUlp2N7HDiejCK_Z9y4y7k/4g5/81DSYId_R5qRHYz4TzSy3w/h10/h001.aYwxzfwB4-AbOiJbmlV4_f7GaWGj3AbJcGCTyVpRCbI), will make a report about threats to religious liberty and strategies to increase awareness of religious pluralism in the country.

This commission is a part of Trump’s push to “bring back religion,” to the United States. Trump on Thursday touted his pardons of anti-abortion protesters, the reinstatement of military members who were discharged due to vaccine mandates, creation of a Department of Justice task force to eradicate “anti-Christian bias,” and executive order against anti-semitism.

Patrick, who was in Washington on Thursday for the announcement, said during his speech that the United States was “birthed by prayer,” and founded on the “Judeo-Christian ethic,” that people can worship without government interference. Patrick accused the Biden administration of having attacked people of faith.

“We have a magnificent inheritance of religious liberty and every believer today, no matter your faith, has a claim to that inheritance,” Patrick said.

Patrick has long promoted policies to [infuse religion into public life](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eCyDm7YZItPaA-BvJlf4tsDORw7JRjCj-hRqNzeB5Qm36JtPXbl2_X0hrv_igTsrKW5v-HrRoVt2hCcMPX6j0jfagMJImNBWQnT3N_W6sdclWix4sUFOvdA6eNDiFpv6b0AOEHjiMgNyJvwmu2XzJsBLHqG2M_bYTahU1N9j7o7HeYamAuHn1DxVZHz-qDnYjQGtEE665KnITR2lNr8jBrWfe4sx1xCmZYLkJ0PHZi4IntzsGMv1FiMZoHHL2S5fkdR2ECPq_KqF0Pihob_XlJywp8ZQVo5MGco3s_DWMUAN5NHdnqUH1lLVsYqoXV7sJRtlv_hfimOeEOksUK8i0rdqJulQ-ZZVEK16hRfHW4RD_1AKpoDzyAXApi6zT7IlX_UlK9-xrhBQJWf40J_AKJjJFuJoCXfxGtBTjb9HyizmWeRP_bd1deT-fYHF64qUfkZ1A2CPxSWD0u13uAR6IfGedslCcPzcpsYHJ7_KvJz4/4g5/81DSYId_R5qRHYz4TzSy3w/h14/h001.Q-h_k5xfcRi72NDkEZKHksSwo_gUiuBp0cFzY_Rj7Tg), most recently prioritizing legislation that would require the Ten Commandments to be posted in public school classrooms and allow time for prayer in public schools. Patrick has referred to the United States as “a Christian nation” and echoed many of his political allies in arguing that there “is no separation of church and state. It was not in the Constitution.”

“We were a nation founded upon not the words of our founders, but the words of God because he wrote the Constitution,” Patrick [said in 2022](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Tb7ejk-5QfVnOrZFvpt2rg_oN0EA7TXi07g6Fv8NKHgoP8A3D7MVdeciRajySi9UndXoPY3ODXgtOe8RSzRw4Ffc-lGOWRqgV9O5nZn-viSduX4AuQQICErGDRIy1E-NFyuAoTYD3KFeOzpQzmJggOLnLZx4IDJrO1q_Z6b_lRukNyHwQ22wj9c8NVFfxKjddjyHn4mjmCRFLiCM5beAf-hDyr9a9jHMa4JJL5mmag4Ai3pP1U-HEOeQiaI_seY3-7jh6JElxFzFvsdTfdp9zhb_1fwk5ddPMF6VjFyhSEBYhpUi2gN6dc_sJQGkVQW8y4dopkVPF7pXu9h_flrYQ_TRROIVYLgZybZJqf0sPyvjzLAf43i8EcdcTy-U9sCwmJ8iE3FOmh7bcWSy0OnW1XsdH4Xrm48S9Td1OIVl6V0A0ULw4QmT60nr9fHemtzwnASeEAcQi8K68TB2ModIt_rDxcJ5dycDPX2GjS4qmzoMiENHCnAplyGesccm-pgw/4g5/81DSYId_R5qRHYz4TzSy3w/h15/h001.gelFgEzKGUu4vYMg18hf2tRyop07GqImXbBr5pdsVPM)." Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS "Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick to lead Trump’s commission on religious liberty ,” Texas Tribune's Katharine Wilson \-- "Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has been tapped to chair President Donald Trump’s new commission on religious liberty, which was announced during the National Day of Prayer celebration at the White House on Thursday. “You are restoring the hopes and the prayers of millions upon millions of believers of all faiths,” said Patrick, referencing Trump, during a speech at the event. The commission, according to Trump’s , will make a report about threats to religious liberty and strategies to increase awareness of religious pluralism in the country. » This commission is a part of Trump’s push to “bring back religion,” to the United States. Trump on Thursday touted his pardons of anti-abortion protesters, the reinstatement of military members who were discharged due to vaccine mandates, creation of a Department of Justice task force to eradicate “anti-Christian bias,” and executive order against anti-semitism. Ben Carson , the Housing and Urban Development Secretary in the first Trump administration, will serve as the commission’s vice-chair. Other include television host Dr. Phil McGraw , CardinalTimothy Dolan , various religious leaders, and Kelly Shackelford , the CEO of First Liberty, a Plano-based conservative legal organization. Commission members will serve at least until July 4, 2026. Patrick approached Trump with the idea for the commission, Trump said during his speech in the Rose Garden. » Patrick, who was in Washington on Thursday for the announcement, said during his speech that the United States was “birthed by prayer,” and founded on the “Judeo-Christian ethic,” that people can worship without government interference. Patrick accused the Biden administration of having attacked people of faith. “We have a magnificent inheritance of religious liberty and every believer today, no matter your faith, has a claim to that inheritance,” Patrick said. Patrick has long promoted policies to , most recently prioritizing legislation that would require the Ten Commandments to be posted in public school classrooms and allow time for prayer in public schools. Patrick has referred to the United States as “a Christian nation” and echoed many of his political allies in arguing that there “is no separation of church and state. It was not in the Constitution.” “We were a nation founded upon not the words of our founders, but the words of God because he wrote the Constitution,” Patrick ." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. # ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON SB 269
|
---
SB 269 by Senator Charles Perry, sponsored on the House side by Representative James Frank would require healthcare providers to report vaccine and drug-related adverse events. It is being heard in the House Committee on Public Health on Monday, May 5 in one of the final steps before getting this bill signed into law! **Tell members of the Public Health Committee to support this bill!** **1- Email the Committee Members**

|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov,elizabeth.campos@house.texas.gov,john.bucy@house.texas.gov,nicole.collier@house.texas.gov,charles.cunningham@house.texas.gov,james.frank@house.texas.gov,ann.johnson@house.texas.gov,jolanda.jones@house.texas.gov,mike.olcott@house.texas.gov,katrina.pierson@house.texas.gov,mike.schofield@house.texas.gov,joanne.shofner@house.texas.gov,lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20SB%20269&body=Dear%20Representative%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20support%20SB%20269%20which%20is%20being%20heard%20in%20Public%20Health%20on%20Monday%2C%20May%205.%0A%0AThis%20bill%20would%20protect%20patients%20and%20bolster%20informed%20consent.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---

## Nonsectarian Requirement for Charter Schools Faces Supreme Court Scrutiny
One of the Supreme Court’s last argued cases of the 2024-25 term may turn out to be one of its most significant. On Wednesday, the court heard arguments over whether states may insist that charter schools, which they all define as public schools, be nonsectarian. Nearly every state offers charter schools to provide an alternative [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/cr7w1PLTpaZGMqG-vJDSGC9A2fJLlQTqvRmod9YFCJnI5EC12JIxwok3Ncajh_f5EzRj3_-fDYka5HCM4_2dh21GfZ-SZqqfioB6MBw4faRIzP3PawHTGqZFn65lP4p8mhN8RnjLj-JaBKMuH5WwYkZSjf6UAtE6OFQMespLjx2eI3vQyVj-sMTfxIotGXKoVG-uOl8ulHtmZZjYDj6aJQA1O9ItTds5biBNjMAvU5lL8_WYs_exgWbBoBP9506aZqpYZtH0lnj8Ydtdxy40AwxDVEngGyzpHC6p_8Yg0wq-NaMLat3MBm9dj8GNTV898Nlx5a3EFT1yrnRLDgI493nGw0XD8ZoTvee9BNFrloRfVg/pWPeOBTAhCwG9Ldtr1Q3j_dBLILp_rf8/8)

## I Consider Illegal Aliens Among My Constituents, Lawmaker Says
Rep. Norma Torres said at a Wednesday press conference that every taxpayer in her district—including illegal immigrants—is her constituent. Hi Peter,

Did you know that eight U.S. states are considering legislation that would prosecute abortion as homicide?

According to the _19th News_ , legislators in **Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Kansas, Kentucky, Missouri, South Carolina, and Texas** , most of which already have total abortion bans in place, have introduced legislation that would impose extreme criminal penalties on both providers and patients. The worst part? Many of the states considering these bills still sometimes issue the death penalty to defendants who are found guilty of homicide.

**We are sounding the alarm:** [**Draconian bills like this are becoming more popular in deep red states; states in which men account for more than 80% of the legislators weighing in on these policies. We desperately need more pro-choice women in the rooms where these decisions are being made. At Her Bold Move, we understand our responsibility to _chip away at the male supermajorities_ in the very legislatures that are passing dangerous laws about women. While blue and purple states continue to get the most attention from the Democratic (pro-choice) party, the millions of women who live in red states are being left behind. We cannot let that stand.

**That’s why Her Bold Move has doubled down on our support for women candidates running for office in red states.** Those are the women candidates whose voices are needed most desperately.

And guess what? Our work is making a DIFFERENCE! Last cycle, 44% of Her Bold Move’s winning candidates lived in RED STATES. We want to keep expanding our impact across those states in 2025 and beyond. [**Help Her Bold Move elect pro-choice women to state legislatures in red states by chipping in $20.25 today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106944831/543127983/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250502bad_N_HBM_90DO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjZWNkMWE0LTViMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eLWxq0LHQd2zvx92XAN07Bm3NTO-qbBtYNJC_80Mdwo=)

In Georgia, lawmakers heard hours of testimony on one of these homicide bills, and it even drew criticism from those who support abortion restrictions. **As Elizabeth Edmonds, an anti-abortion lobbyist, stated, “This is a bad bill. It’s bad for women.”** Despite this opposition, **the bill garnered 21 sponsors in Georgia’s state legislature** – the most support it has ever had.

Pregnancy criminalization has been on the rise. In a recent report by Pregnancy Justice, they found that at least 210 pregnant women have faced pregnancy-related criminal charges since the fall of Roe v. Wade, and that number is only going to continue to go up.

**We are outraged by the audacity of male politicians writing laws about our bodies. There is only ONE way to fight back against these extremists: making sure there are pro-choice, pro-_women_ women in all of the rooms when decisions about our bodies are being made.**

[**We cannot afford to stand down. You can help us elect women leaders to these majority-male state legislatures by rushing $20.25 or more right now! Join our movement today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106944838/543127986/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250502bad_N_HBM_90DO_10_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjZWNkMWE0LTViMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eLWxq0LHQd2zvx92XAN07Bm3NTO-qbBtYNJC_80Mdwo=)

Onward,

Kenzie Shelstad

clean_body: There are 8 states considering this law... and many of them have something terrifying in common.| | | | | = Hi Peter, Did you know that eight U.S. states are considering legislation that would prosecute abortion as homicide? According to the 19th News , legislators in Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Kansas, Kentucky, Missouri, South Carolina, and Texas , most of which already have total abortion bans in place, have introduced legislation that would impose extreme criminal penalties on both providers and patients. The worst part? Many of the states considering these bills still sometimes issue the death penalty to defendants who are found guilty of homicide. subject: 3 Foods That Fight Memory Loss
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5951649/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNGE0UjlCVEI5Yg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDI/LbmNsckdQdTV4bg/qP2hpZHM9bmNqa1l1djhrSFczdjBscw/gaBTPrw/saj62c176e4)
| | Why do some people stay sharp as a whip as they get older, while others have trouble recalling names, dates, and even conversations?

New research from Harvard University suggests age may not be the culprit.

And one Boston medical doctor now says memory problems are often caused by the foods you're eating — or NOT eating.

Dr. George Karanastasis, MD says: _"Your brain needs fuel to create new brain cells, recall memories, and focus on tasks. And where does it get that fuel? From the foods you eat."_

However, due to a change in modern dietary habits, Dr. K says most of us aren't getting the nutrients our brain needs. He says this lack of nutrients can cause brain fog, forgetfulness, or worse.

_"When your brain doesn't receive the right nutrients, it literally starts to starve. And that's when you start to suffer those embarrassing senior moments. You might forget people's names, walk into a room and forget why you're there, or even get lost driving to familiar places,"_ Dr. K says.

Fortunately, Dr. K developed a simple protocol that can help fight memory loss.

Best of all, it doesn't require any major lifestyle changes. It just requires adding [**these 3 foods back into your diet**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.).

Dr. K recently put together a video revealing these foods. And since the video was released, it's gone viral, racking up more than 1 million views. Thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this protocol.

He says: _"I've seen this protocol work for thousands of people. People keep telling me: 'Dr. K, I feel so much sharper and smarter. Even my family noticed.' It's wonderful to hear how many lives this has changed."_

Now, what about you? Are you concerned about your fading memory? How would you like to take back control of your life?

If so, watch the video at the link below and try this protocol for yourself. You'll discover which foods can help make sure your brain lasts as long as your body.

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

==> [**Forgetful? Eat these 3 foods daily and watch what happens...**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

**ARIZONA** As we reported last week, our **Missouri Freedom Caucus** was able to force the governor to pull his nomination of a woke liberal to the State Board of Education.This week, the **Arizona Freedom Caucus** has forced Democrat Governor Katie Hobbs to withdraw not one, but TWO nominations for agency positions. One of them was Jennifer Cunico - Hobbs' pick to lead the Department of Health Services. As chairman of the committee that considers nominations, here is how AZFC Chairman Jake Hoffman [described](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjmPbPfpIZwFstTynsz30VZQ1BbIJmMYdxZ2yKeBKkhASf5o9lt3rb9pGSF17NUSIgnPedYCgMYGDuR5MZJop-2BqY-3DeoOO_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerWncQn1ZmvSwyPgbfLdeXpalP2bmC0q4nwR-2FeiSu38evrrtCV9ciT7HPJWVEmcjW0XCVWM-2Bg4RvJV11k-2FsrhzdWly-2F8gPnhalHayKHOjwNF3MxJZaD3gIW-2BKlqo03gJJvveB5juaSl8IXVF-2FSH0dlxNTeVLiUyuRW2l7BZqHLWrtg7gRpv8lxjgi7KM1T8TPZ0FHzyReE3EACf-2BUFMmcBt0Uft8lbhGrjS-2FaKaWV5zII-3D) his meeting with Cunico: _During this meeting, Jennifer Cunico double and tripled down on the systemic failures of public health officials during the COVID years, even going so far as to defend policies that even the CDC and WHO have now admitted were wrong and not rooted in science. During this meeting she was dishonest, combative, engaged in doublespeak, and out of touch with the priorities of the Arizona people._ Arizona, as with our other state freedom caucuses, continue to be the guard dogs against woke liberal appointments!
---
|

**ILLIINOIS** Our **Illinois Freedom Caucus** are masters at communicating to the public, which is especially needed in a blue state where Democrats lie and mislead the voters at every turn.During their most recent virtual town hall meeting, the ILFC hosted Cleta Mitchell, the irreplaceable conservative warrior and election attorney.ILFC and Cleta discussed the SAVE Act, sponsored by Sen. Mike Lee and Rep. Chip Roy. The bill would close various federal loopholes making it harder for non-citizens to vote in our elections. In the short video clip below, Cleta explains how the Left is gaslighting the public by claiming that women don't know how to procure an ID that would be required for a citizen to vote.

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, At the State Freedom Caucus Network , we don’t just talk about liberty—we empower state lawmakers to fight for and defend it. From protecting free speech to upholding individual rights and economic freedom, we’re on the front lines for our communities. But we can’t do it without you. Your support fuels this fight for freedom. Together, we can build a future where liberty thrives. Stand with us. Give now and make a lasting impact. And then continue reading for our latest updates! | ARIZONA As we reported last week, our Missouri Freedom Caucus was able to force the governor to pull his nomination of a woke liberal to the State Board of Education.This week, the Arizona Freedom Caucus has forced Democrat Governor Katie Hobbs to withdraw not one, but TWO nominations for agency positions. One of them was Jennifer Cunico - Hobbs' pick to lead the Department of Health Services. As chairman of the committee that considers nominations, here is how AZFC Chairman Jake Hoffman his meeting with Cunico: During this meeting, Jennifer Cunico double and tripled down on the systemic failures of public health officials during the COVID years, even going so far as to defend policies that even the CDC and WHO have now admitted were wrong and not rooted in science. During this meeting she was dishonest, combative, engaged in doublespeak, and out of touch with the priorities of the Arizona people. Arizona, as with our other state freedom caucuses, continue to be the guard dogs against woke liberal appointments! | ILLIINOIS Our Illinois Freedom Caucus are masters at communicating to the public, which is especially needed in a blue state where Democrats lie and mislead the voters at every turn.During their most recent virtual town hall meeting, the ILFC hosted Cleta Mitchell, the irreplaceable conservative warrior and election attorney.ILFC and Cleta discussed the SAVE Act, sponsored by Sen. Mike Lee and Rep. Chip Roy. The bill would close various federal loopholes making it harder for non-citizens to vote in our elections. In the short video clip below, Cleta explains how the Left is gaslighting the public by claiming that women don't know how to procure an ID that would be required for a citizen to vote. | WYOMING The Wyoming Legislature is out of session for the year, but "interim" committees convene throughout the summer and fall. First order of business for the Wyoming Freedom Caucus -led state house? DOGE-ing the State Budget. Read by clicking the image below. | We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresidentState Freedom Caucus Network |

name: Giffords.org
subject: Breaking: Donald Trump is cutting $1 billion in mental health grants
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How we respond these next 48 hours will be critical.
#

— sorry to bother you on a Friday, but we have urgent news:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250502-1-b&refcode2=10381.3935704.DsqJwc&t=1&akid=10381%2E3935704%2EDsqJwc)
After the 2022 massacre in Uvalde, Congress came together to pass the first major federal gun safety bill in nearly 30 years. This included grants so schools could hire psychologists, counselors, and mental health workers and fight America’s school shooting epidemic.
It was a historic moment. It showed that we could put partisanship aside to save lives. But now, Donald Trump is trying to undo this critical work.
[**Will you please rush any amount to help GIFFORDS PAC fight back against these attacks from the Trump administration? How we respond these next 48 hours will be critical.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250502-1-b&t=2&akid=10381%2E3935704%2EDsqJwc)
Donald Trump claims that America’s gun violence crisis is a mental health issue, not a gun issue. But even using this flawed logic, he still decided to slash $1 billion in mental health resources and gut bipartisan legislation that was created to address the issue. It’s unacceptable.
Gun violence is the number one killer of children and young people in America, and mental health support is a key tool in fighting this epidemic.
School shootings are an ever-present threat, even though these tragedies are preventable.
This decision will cost American children their lives. We cannot sit quietly while this happens.
[**If you’re able, please donate any amount right now to GIFFORDS PAC. Your donation will be put to work electing gun safety leaders who will stand up to the gun lobby and creating a world free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250502-1-b&t=3&akid=10381%2E3935704%2EDsqJwc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: DNC, DCCC Kick Off The “Fight to Save Medicaid” Month of Action
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=565d189e0c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
| | | | |
---
| | | **DNC, DCCC Kick Off The “Fight to Save Medicaid” Month of Action with New Distributed Organizing Program**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | _Democrats will target four vulnerable Republicans who are poised to gut Medicaid and other critical programs – Tom Barrett (MI-07), Don Bacon (NE-02), Mike Lawler (NY-17), and Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01)_
As House Republicans put health care on the chopping block for [80 million](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cd9325b908&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Americans in order to give billionaires trillions in tax handouts, Democrats are launching the “Fight to Save Medicaid” month of action to put vulnerable House Republicans on notice as they’re poised to once again vote to rip health care access from their constituents. The initiative kicks off with the launch of a new organizing program at the DNC, which will empower thousands of energized grassroots volunteers to make their voices heard in the fight to save our health care.

The DNC’s organizing program will empower everyday Americans with the resources and know-how to hold Republican representatives accountable and build grassroots power ahead of critical statewide and midterm elections in 2025 and 2026.

The DNC’s distributed organizing program builds on the committee’s direct action initiatives like the [People’s Town Halls](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=36988558b5&e=d6c5c7d7ec), employing both traditional organizing tactics and an innovative network organizing approach to transform passive supporters from the 2024 cycle into a fleet of active volunteer organizers and communicators. Supporters will receive opportunities to take direct action both online and offline, while developing the skills to activate their personal networks to expand our base of grassroots volunteers.

In its first campaign within its distributed organizing program, the DNC will partner with the DCCC to target four of the most vulnerable House Republicans, challenging them to listen to their constituents and vote against Trump’s budget bill and their party’s dangerous cuts to Medicaid.

Democrats will empower battleground voters to send a clear message directly to Tom Barrett (MI-07), Don Bacon (NE-02), Mike Lawler (NY-17), and Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01): A deeply unpopular vote against Medicaid cuts this month will cost you your seat come the midterms.

To accompany the pressure campaign launch, **Democrats will host a new round of People’s Town Halls in some of these vulnerable Republicans’ districts during the month of May and activate supporters across the country to put pressure on these Republican members of Congress** through:
* **Digital Pressure:** Voters engage with and share accountability content within the digital space where they already communicate.

* **Local Pressure:** Voters join – or lead their own – local visibility efforts, including [People’s Town Halls](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3336a4527b&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

* **Direct Pressure:** Voters will be activated to call and email their Republican representatives to make their outrage known.

_**Following the DNC’s new distributed organizing launch, DNC Chair Ken Martin issued the following statement:**_
“The American people are furious at Trump and Republicans’ dangerous attacks on their health care and vulnerable Republican Representatives Barrett, Bacon, Lawler, and Fitzpatrick will seal their political fate if they go along with Trump’s disastrous budget. To ensure these Republicans understand that it’s either their vote or their job, the DNC is launching its first-ever distributed organizing program to offer voters a platform to join Democrats in taking direct action — from hosting town halls to mobilizing their personal networks — against the GOP’s budget, while building grassroots power for critical elections still ahead. Our representatives must serve the people — not ignore them. Republicans will either learn that lesson now or at the ballot box.”
_**DCCC Chair Suzan DelBene issued the following statement:**_
“House Republicans have lost the trust of the American people and are on track to lose in the midterms because of their record of broken promises. They’ve consistently sold out their own constituents to please their billionaire backers, even when it means supporting catastrophic cuts to health care access. As the sole committee dedicated to taking back the House in 2026, the DCCC is eager to empower battleground voters with this new program and hold Republicans accountable.”
_Additional background on the vulnerable Republican targets:_

Recent [reporting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7ad96c35fe&e=d6c5c7d7ec) reveals that Americans overwhelmingly disapprove of Republicans’ proposed cuts to Medicaid. As their party plots to make unpopular cuts to Americans’ health care, Republican Reps. Tom Barrett (MI-07), Don Bacon (NE-02), Mike Lawler (NY-17), and Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01) are four of the most vulnerable Republicans in the House and will face voters' wrath if they cave to Trump’s budget demands. In 2024, voters within their district split tickets and also broke for Democrats on the ballot.

In the last two months alone, the DNC, in partnership with the DCCC and ASDC, has hosted more than 100 town halls in districts across the country to hold Donald Trump and Republicans accountable for their attacks on working people. To keep the pressure up, the DNC will host a new round of People’s Town Halls in vulnerable Republican districts, while employing state-of-the-art organizing tactics to activate supporters and put direct pressure on Republicans ahead of budget reconciliation votes. This will be an all-out blitz by the Democratic Party to save health care for millions of Americans.

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: Thanks for standing by me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
https://www.bonnieforcongress.com/ [https://www.bonnieforcongress.com/] We have a lot to be proud of this month. My friend Cory Booker broke the record for his longest speech on the Congress floor, protesting Trump and this Administration’s despicable actions, and I was so proud to be there.

I joined hundreds of Americans last weekend at the Hands Off Democracy rallies, urging against the undermining of our democracy by Trump and Musk. The American people are tired of incompetent governing. And our work is not over.

Can you rush a donation of $ or any amount before our deadline in the next 72 hours? We need all hands on deck to fight back against this Administration. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-april-2025?amount=]

Donald Trump ran on the promise that he would make things easier for working families and cut costs — but in reality, he’s done the opposite. Making severe cuts to Medicaid and other programs that millions of Americans rely on will negatively impact our communities’ quality of life and health.

These atrocities cannot go ignored. We need your help to keep on fighting back and take a stand against Republican incompetence. You deserve a government that fights for you, not one that puts more money into the hands of billionaires.

If you're with us, chip in $ or any amount to help us reach our goal of 750 contributions before Thursday night [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-april-2025?amount=] If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.DONATE $10 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-april-2025?amount= &express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-march-2025?amount=&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $ 50 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-march-2025?amount=&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-march-2025?amount=&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $200 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-march-2025?amount=&express_lane=true&amount=200] OTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-march-2025]

Together, we can win this. Let’s keep using our voices together. Thank you for all your support.

— Bonnie

Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc_footer2022?amount=10]

Click here to unsubscribe from Bonnie's email list. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Ys0vrJnkgEyH5A7MGfcTuQ2?unsubscribedata=tWAyzTR%2BUfdpH3coCJeXCOJ9n61zplaYXZPTQIh8cJlDdN4wh1My2dvp6rf33iWRTZjHos4dJUzqQGauNi5qZi%2FQ0D3N47hGIFO7daJPYbbiVhB%2FE9rzWtn%2Fwt5rT0OH5t6nsDr7CEBbf2jP6VkQyu%2B5M6s9fdg5v7%2F4GAFD68LpLS8g%2BSvSQBmAVROB5C6IOfoewswX5Amw8SdknjdX3j9Vg%2BvXP38HpTVwPkQGAC%2BN%2B3t2OqK%2B2jsCdyM8O0%2BkQcEoBFn7AT007GGn7u0JFrzLmmn2cJ2mjRfOk9pdZG%2BgcRy3Vsb%2FJax7%2F97tZ9JylivOVdNfkEjizq%2BFbsOgrm7SAJmoZN1oemFx0rLn%2B9PXTujdFMIdl08kOsxQLy8nOArShy4fFkAIKy64ELgRgU0eT4xQHAp9zZrvpebrR7loLswlxfWI4VfGrcVHFxY3]

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f9d7bb10-a86f-4a3e-9e95-2a3440bca9f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One hundred days into President Donald J. Trump's second term, and the man is doing exactly what he said he'd do. No excuses--just results. The American people, who grind every day and sacrifice to give their families a better life, are finally seeing a White House that works for them, not the DC elites, not China or the the globalist marxists. Finally America has a President for the working class, and it's about damn time.
For decades, we've been sold a lie: globalism is good, cheap Amazon crap from sweatshops is progress, and America's job is to keep up with the latest Apple iphone while our factories rust and our workers get canned. That's not an economy; that's a scam. Trump's tariffs are the economic reality check we've needed for a long time. It's not about punishing other countries; it's about giving America what it needs. His tariffs are forcing companies to think twice before shipping jobs overseas. They're bringing manufacturing back to places like Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Michigan--places the elites forgot about long ago.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xey61etC8Y8OrmS2jXKYNaSUSzyHScKEHubipBA-jL0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162549808)
Wall Street and the Washington elites are terrified because Trump's policies expose their game. Globalism wired our economy to prioritize convenience and cheapness over national strength and self-reliance. It's why we're drowning in debt, dependent on hostile nations for everything from medicine to microchips. Trump's tariffs are an essential course correction, a signal to the world that America is done playing the sucker. Already, 75 countries have reached out to the White House, ready to renegotiate trade deals. Why? Because they know Trump is a big dick swinger who is not playing games. The Art of the Deal is real, and Trump is the Leonardo Da Vinci of that art.
Now, let's talk borders. Under Biden, our southern border was a turnstile for chaos. Illegal crossings hit record highs, and with them came gangbangers, drug traffickers, and worse--terrorists who mean American citizens harm. Tren de Aragua, MS-13, you name it--they were effectively invited in. Trump promised to close the border, and he delivered. Illegal crossings are at historic lows. Deportations of high-priority threats--gang members, terrorists, and other bad actors--are moving at a clip we haven't seen in decades. The American people are breathing easier, knowing that the front door to our country is locked and we control who gets to come in.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below):**
* * *
**[Together With American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/4adafcef-4e55-4555-8852-96a1c0985d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **The future looks bright for retirees under President Trump.**
### **Discover how to execute the wealth-preserving measure he left open for you.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4adafcef-4e55-4555-8852-96a1c0985d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With President Trump's return to the White House, we could be primed for the start of an economic renaissance that will transform retirement for millions of Americans.
Trump's sweeping economic reforms are set to extend the historic 2017 tax cuts while implementing even deeper reforms for American workers.
**For retirees and those planning their golden years, this could mean more money in your pocket and unprecedented opportunities for wealth creation.**
This economic shift brings both incredible opportunity and hidden risks for those with traditional retirement accounts such as 401(k), IRAs, and TSPs.
A Trump approved wealth protection strategy puts the power in your hands to control the direction of your financial future. **It is detailed in our 2025 Wealth Protection Guide** **[[click here to download your copy for FREE]](https://substack.com/redirect/4adafcef-4e55-4555-8852-96a1c0985d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**..
**Inside this guide, you'll discover a wealth saving IRS loophole that Trump fought hard to preserve**. It allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a time-tested vehicle, free of chaos and market manipulation.
**[>>Get Your Free WEALTH PROTECTION GUIDE<<](https://substack.com/redirect/4adafcef-4e55-4555-8852-96a1c0985d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/4adafcef-4e55-4555-8852-96a1c0985d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
Tom Homan, God bless him, has gone above and beyond. As the man tasked with enforcing our immigration laws, he's shown what it looks like when the government actually listens to the people. Our cities and communities are safer because Homan and Trump are rooting out the nefarious actors who slipped through Biden's wide-open border. This isn't about cruelty; it's about accountability. It's about saying to the American people: your safety matters, your laws matter, your country matters. For too long, we've been told to look the other way while our communities paid the price. Those days are now over.
And then there's the dark swamp of Washington D.C. The federal government has become a bloated, unaccountable mess--a playground for left-wing activist bureaucrats who treat your tax dollars like their personal slush fund. They've been pushing ideologically driven programs that don't serve America's interests, don't promote our citizens' well-being, and frankly, don't make any freaking sense. Trump's first 100 days have been a wrecking ball to that nonsense. With Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) leading the charge, they've already slashed $200 billion in waste, fraud, and abuse from the federal budget; money that was being funneled into pet projects and woke initiatives while our infrastructure crumbled and our veterans waited in line for care.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xey61etC8Y8OrmS2jXKYNaSUSzyHScKEHubipBA-jL0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162549808)
Musk, say what you want about him, has done the American people a great service. He's not just tweeting about government waste; he's dismantling it. DOGE is going agency by agency, program by program, asking the simple question: does this serve the American people? If the answer's no, it's gone. This is what draining the swamp looks like--not just talk, but action. There's still a long way to go; nobody's yet saying the federal government is a model of frugality or fiscal responsibility. But this is a great start to a long journey ahead, and Trump and his supporters can hang their MAGA hats on it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94c875a0-0013-4e01-ae8e-ceb30873e659?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: The White House/X
The bigger picture here is trust. For too long, politicians have treated the American people like idiots, making promises they never intended to keep. Trump's different. He's not perfect--no one is--but he's real. He told you he'd secure the border, and he did. He told you he'd bring back jobs, and he's doing it. He told you he'd cut the fat from government, and he's delivering. This is what leadership looks like. It's not about fancy speeches or polling numbers; it's about results.
The elites hate this. They hate that Trump's exposing their failures and misdeeds. They hate that he's giving a voice to the forgotten--the truck drivers, the factory workers, the small-town families who've been crushed by decades of short-term thinking. They'll yell about tariffs, about deportations, about budget cuts, because they're desperate to keep the status quo. But the status quo is unacceptable. It's left us weaker, poorer, and less secure. Trump's first 100 days are a rejection of that failure, a promise that America can be great again--not for the globalists, not for the bureaucrats, but for you.
We're not out of the woods yet. The globalists won't go quietly, and the bureaucrats will fight to keep their fiefdoms. But for the first time in a long time, we've got a fighter in the White House who's on our side. The first 100 days were just the beginning. With Trump at the helm, the best is yet to come.
* * *

Congressman Eric Burlison here--_**and I 'm not going to sit by while they try to erase everything we've fought for.**_

They know Trump is winning.

They know **YOU** haven't backed down.

**And now they 're pulling every dirty trick they can before the 2026 midterms.**

**Make no mistake:**

There's a special election for Congress happening right here in Arizona — and it's coming up fast. We only have a few short months to make sure we elect the right leader.
That person is **Adelita Grijalva**. She's spent her life fighting for Southern Arizona, and we need her voice in Congress now more than ever — for all of us.

That's why I'm proud to endorse her for Congress. And if we do this right, Adelita won't just win — **she'll make history as the first Latina ever elected to Congress from Arizona.**

name: Team Ilhan
subject: More American citizens are being arrested by ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
If the government can arrest any US citizen or legal resident, suspend their due process and deport them, then nobody is safe.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1626%2E791427%2EbSjmfu)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4247?t=2&akid=1626%2E791427%2EbSjmfu)
Friend, last month, a 19-year-old American citizen named Jose Hermosillo was held in detention for 10 days after being arrested by ICE. Thankfully his family was able to produce proof of citizenship before he was deported, and Jose is now back home.
But despite this potentially devastating mistake, the Trump administration is refusing to admit any fault, instead doubling down on their reckless deportation policies without a care for due process.
It’s important to us that we keep sharing these stories with you, **because we have to remember that the Trump administration is playing with real people’s lives.**
Jose Hermosillo, Kilmar Abrego Garcia, Mahmoud Khalil — They’re not just numbers. Their situations are not just minor mistakes. Their appalling experiences are a direct reflection of the lack of compassion, competency, and accountability in the White House.
If the government can arrest any US citizen or legal resident, suspend their due process and deport them — perhaps even to a prison labor camp in El Salvador — then nobody is safe.
Ilhan is doing everything in her power to move Congress to hold Trump and his administration accountable, but she urgently needs your support if we want to move the needle on this issue. We have to show that a vast majority of Americans are outraged by the Trump administration's actions.
[**Will you add your name to Ilhan’s petition DEMANDING an end to these illegal arrests? We have to keep the pressure up until these disastrous mistakes are reversed and the arrests stop.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-ice/?source=em250502-1-180&akid=1626%2E791427%2EbSjmfu)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-ice/?source=em250502-1-180&akid=1626%2E791427%2EbSjmfu)**
Thank you for using your voice today.
In solidarity as always,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Andy Kim
subject: Donald Trump is aiming to fire thousands of civil servants in our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
He’s going to go after thousands of government employees and replace them with his own allies.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106955858/543154066/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODU4MjcyMi02NjI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Lha_U02Cf1ExPMoClopmrHzw-JDBjZ5hmts9R5vFhI=&emci=8c3d6c77-9f26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d8582722-6627-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Donald Trump's administration is changing a rule that will allow him to fire thousands of civil servants in our government. This month, the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) proposed a rule reclassifying tens of thousands of career civil servants as "at-will" employees, the White House announced in a statement. **Removing civil service protections would make workers easier to fire for purely political reasons – and he's going to go after thousands of government employees and replace them with his own allies.** I was a career non-partisan civil servant detailed to the National Security Council. Never was I asked who I voted for or what political party I associated with. _That's the way it should be._ Now, Trump, for his own personal, political retribution, is weakening our nation and putting the services Americans rely on every day at risk. Trump's assault against workers' rights and civil servants across the nation continues, and it must be stopped. I will continue to fight for our civil servants who are being wrongly attacked by this administration. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: FROM HOUSE GOP HQ
subject: Operation Swamp Drain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You've been handpicked

clean_body: “Is anyone really happy with this bizarre Electoral College system we use today to decide our president?”| | | Chuck Todd is right -- nobody is happy with the current Electoral College system and our country deserves better. The American people deserve a system where their votes directly count and their voices aren't muffled. | | | Straight from the mouth of NBC's Chuck Todd, folks: “Is anyone really happy with this bizarre Electoral College system we use today to decide our president?” The answer is no. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again. And there are legitimate ways to do it! From constitutional amendments to ideas like the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and more, we can make this happen. We just need your support. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote. It's clear that they want to use the Electoral College and more as a basis to make sure they never lose an election again. We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California. you, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Colonel Pam Stevenson
subject: McConnell is out. I am in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |

| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecdb1410-34a5-46e6-946e-7250c7c72fbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27c63b24-768d-4a6d-9d96-20e54c1da800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Peter, I have some huge news to share with you: I am running for Senate here in Kentucky to replace Mitch McConnell. In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my vision for this election — and I would love it if you took the time to read my full message. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 to help me become the next Democratic U.S. Senator? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T574ad511-0c52-419b-8af0-153830325247/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I’m a nonprofit founder for veterans in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you chip in $10 before midnight TONIGHT to fuel my grassroots campaign and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5898198f-25f9-4598-8292-0a8c01792928/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m ready to run for U.S. Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, and shelter. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way. During his 40 years in the US Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you pitch in $10 before midnight tonight and uplift my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90c3e7b2-512e-4f87-a797-1ee00e80ae7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T317a810d-48ff-4dea-8515-b46975fce08d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. Honor. Country.” I ask you to stand with me and live by “Duty. Honor. Kentucky.” Thank you, Colonel Pam
Floor Leader, House Democrats
Candidate for US Senate

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10c2c439-b012-4a85-86fd-e8dcc2ad7158/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | Dear Peter,
---
The day is finally here — our brand-new album, _Hymn of Zion_ , is OUT NOW! This album has been nearly 3 years in the making and is _my first studio album in 7 years_. _Hymn of Zion_ carries something special for this moment, and I’ve been waiting for the perfect time to release it. My prayer is for deep encounters with the Holy Spirit as you listen, worship, soak, and pray. It might be the most eclectic and diverse collection of songs, sounds, and seasons I’ve ever released—but it’s a glorious collision that I pray will bless you! This is all for You, Jesus—yet another offering of worship we lay at Your feet.
---

clean_body: Listen to "Hymn of Zion" on iTunes and Spotify!! | | | | | | | Dear Peter, The day is finally here — our brand-new album, Hymn of Zion , is OUT NOW! This album has been nearly 3 years in the making and is my first studio album in 7 years. Hymn of Zion carries something special for this moment, and I’ve been waiting for the perfect time to release it. My prayer is for deep encounters with the Holy Spirit as you listen, worship, soak, and pray. It might be the most eclectic and diverse collection of songs, sounds, and seasons I’ve ever released—but it’s a glorious collision that I pray will bless you! This is all for You, Jesus—yet another offering of worship we lay at Your feet. | | | | Can you help me spread the new sound Hymn of Zion today to bless more people? Please stream, download, share it and leave a 5 star review on iTunes or Spotify- this boosts the algorithm to launch worship to the top! Till all hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

[👉So please take our 100 Days of Winning Survey now and tell us what you think about the job President Trump has been doing and what you want to see next.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Here’s just a few accomplishments from President Trump’s first 100 days:

✅ Signed the Laken Riley Act to stop violent illegal criminals
✅ Cut DEI mandates and brought merit back to government
✅ Created over 340,000 jobs
✅ Lowered energy prices and unleashed American energy

The results are real — but the fight isn’t over.

We need your voice to help push back against the spin and help us pave the way forward as we continue fighting against the Left to help President Trump keep his promises to the American people.

[Take our 100 Days of Winning Survey now and make your voice heard.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/100-days-of-winning-/?utm_campaign=202500502&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Thank you,

Team Crenshaw

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Plus you can complete the entire certification process online...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c?message_id=IjYyNDBlZjUwLTA5YjktMDEzZS0zNTMwLTNlZjg5ZWE3MTAxNEBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/f3005f06139150a4af3ea4bd0f06090a518e7f15/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c)
---
---
|
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/5e29d71492681531100edb678200e4d32cfadf47/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/5e29d71492681531100edb678200e4d32cfadf47/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/5e29d71492681531100edb678200e4d32cfadf47/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21433/6374453/f3005f06139150a4af3ea4bd0f06090a518e7f15/864bbfcf67ad43f0d6e3d798676d64ba35658d6c)

clean_body: | | | The “pro-life” party? Republicans just deported U.S. citizen children battling critical illnesses—without any access to their necessary medical treatments! These kids, including one suffering from fourth-stage metastatic cancer, were torn from their homes and denied vital healthcare, all without consultation with their doctors. This heart-wrenching injustice must not stand. We must unite to defeat the Republicans who continue to endorse such inhumane policies. They have shown that they prioritize their heartless agenda over the health and lives of vulnerable children. At Able Dems, we are committed to electing leaders who will protect life-saving care for all kids—regardless of their backgrounds. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Despite having caregivers to stay with in the US, these kids were deported with their mothers, who have lived in the US for years. One of the mothers is pregnant. These families were detained and BLOCKED from communicating with their lawyers or family members before being deported with NO medical help! We need your support to empower Able Dems in our mission to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will champion the health and well-being of America's kids. ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. **Team, this is URGENT:**

Musk went on live television and told _lie after lie_ about Social Security ‐‐ and then he called for it to be _eliminated._

**And experts say that his lies are for one reason only: To find an excuse to shut it down.**

We can't afford to let that happen -- not as Trump and Musk's policies send prices skyrocketing and the markets tumbling. **Americans MUST stand against his insidious plan to end Social Security as we know it, so please, before midnight:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to our petition OPPOSING Musk's destructive plan to eliminate Social Security>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21382?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250502-UrgentAlert-TrumpLiesSocialSecurityPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250502-UrgentAlert-TrumpLiesSocialSecurityPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20179%2E9716520%2E81q3Pi)**

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Your support made the difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
**I want to take a moment to personally thank you, Peter.**

Our team was able to reach our April end-of-month fundraising goal — _something that wouldn’t have happened without you._

Every contribution, every share, every email you read, and every word of encouragement really does matter. Together, we're building something stronger, fairer, and better for everyone right here in Kentucky, _**and nationwide.**_

The way we make progress and ensure we have honest, for-the-people leaders representing our best interests at every level is by staying focused on our goal and working together. And that's exactly what this team has done. Now, as we head into May, I’m asking you to stay with us and continue to build on our momentum.

[**If we can get a jump on our fundraising goals for this month, we’ll be in a better position to take on whatever challenges come our way. Can I count on you to chip in anything you can to help me keep this grassroots energy going, Peter? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106959604/543164210/739826862?refcode=em25_250502_eomty_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250502_eomty_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=084d1305-6b27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg0ZDEzMDUtNmIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0H90-1jWhuALmbpKw9hLH4auSU5Hr4_MBW3VBkiYEes=) [CHIP IN EARLY FOR MAY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106959605/543164211/739826862?refcode=em25_250502_eomty_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250502_eomty_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=084d1305-6b27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg0ZDEzMDUtNmIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0H90-1jWhuALmbpKw9hLH4auSU5Hr4_MBW3VBkiYEes=) Proud to be in this fight with you,

name: Team Crow
subject: The lowest 100-day job approval rating of any president in the past 80 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

This week marked 100 days since Donald Trump’s return to office. And under Donald Trump, our country has had 100 days of chaos, rising costs, and corruption.

Prices and inflation are up.

The economy, your retirement savings, and consumer confidence are down.

And Trump has enacted one of the largest tax increases in history with his reckless tariffs and trade war.

Donald Trump has the lowest 100-day job approval rating of any president in the past 80 years — and he’ll only continue to make life worse for the hard-working Americans if we don’t stand up against his reckless agenda.

That’s why Jason is leading the fight to hold Donald Trump accountable. As the person tasked with recruiting candidates to help take back the House, Jason is working non-stop to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress.

Will you chip in to support Jason and support true servant leaders in the fights ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25]

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Team, This week marked 100 days since Donald Trump’s return to office. And under Donald Trump, our country has had 100 days of chaos, rising costs, and corruption. Prices and inflation are up. The economy, your retirement savings, and consumer confidence are down. And Trump has enacted one of the largest tax increases in history with his reckless tariffs and trade war. Donald Trump has the lowest 100-day job approval rating of any president in the past 80 years — and he’ll only continue to make life worse for the hard-working Americans if we don’t stand up against his reckless agenda. That’s why Jason is leading the fight to hold Donald Trump accountable. As the person tasked with recruiting candidates to help take back the House, Jason is working non-stop to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Will you chip in to support Jason and support true servant leaders in the fights ahead? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: 3 pressing matters to discuss…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When I ran President Trump’s first campaign back in 2016, I never had the luxury to beat around the bush or mince words around headquarters. I had to be blunt and tell it like it is...

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7u9b32dbh3eacke0h4s8c7c908martbcuioob7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

[**This might just be the single most important email I 've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to discuss with you sooner rather than later.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z30tq5v12qpg5nlb21hgkad2lkna56s1qt8tvud0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs "This might just be the single most important email I’ve ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to discuss with you sooner rather than later. ")
** 1\. ** Republicans have an extremely slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, Democrats will retake **FULL CONTROL** to blockade everything your President wants to do

** 2\. ** The DNC Chair **JUST** announced their "largest-ever investment" into Democrat state parties, giving them a major leg up

** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats raising **$37 MILLION** in the first few months of the year
When I ran President Trump's first campaign back in 2016, I never had the luxury to beat around the bush or mince words around headquarters. I had to be blunt and tell it like it is...

And that's why I'm going to say this in no uncertain terms:

I'm getting VERY worried about the Midterms. The Democrat Machine and Socialists like AOC are barnstorming red territory we have to win, we're getting crushed in fundraising and resources are drying up, and we have virtually no buffer in the House.

And if this email fails, we'll lose.

I see no other option than to ask our best supporters for some help. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to save our vulnerable House Majority before our **FINAL** May deadline?
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrta53oc4gjji4kp9vuiokrjj11f7norm4eg8rm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z78ns7rrmn999ei3klehkgvgu44vkad0nggvaoj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3usu42ec786nn596gc1vrnv4rvief7tqcgt7mko_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs)**
---
Listen, it's never my first instinct to ask folks for money.

_I 'm betting you probably get emailed often enough already (probably too much)..._

Unfortunately, I know from the campaign trail that fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat. And with the President's legislative agenda depending largely on Republican control of the House, I knew I had to email you ASAP.

Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST ten or twenty dollars.

**[If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our May deadline. Can I count on you?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49hkq47sf39su9rg8ebaugvmrj2im07tv17bbi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs "If everyone reading this gives that much, we’ll catch up just in time before our May deadline. Can I count on you?")**
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvpt63teg14aor3psd0t3qi1ieifegqpu1mvhdb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3qvl6a0vtnhg9gkv743g74i243f86hpqou18qv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjrnp5h6q671am7ffvgm37gg0kl57m946jgp0v5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkoq0skuhdi1m2tihfqna372lirvspcp4i4edj08_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs "Liberal Trump Resistance")
---

If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrjt4trpqbk6e7qt4hao42g53bqsnb62t7ns8d2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9i62oj4c1h2bs "DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW")
---

body:
Stop Republicans’ vile plan!
| **BREAKING: DONALD TRUMP JUST SIGNED AN EXECUTIVE ORDER DEFUNDING NPR AND PBS.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250502_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=19722%2E878179%2EDsd6tj) | [WE WON’T STAND FOR THIS: ADD YOUR NAME TO STOP REPUBLICANS FROM DEFUNDING PUBLIC BROADCASTING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250502_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=19722%2E878179%2EDsd6tj)
---
_NO! NO! NO!_ NPR and PBS are NOT “monsters,” friend — they’re CRITICAL news sources for millions of Americans!

**__Here’s what we’re up against:__**

→ The FCC has ordered politically motivated investigations into both outlets.
→ Trump just signed an order HALTING federal funding for NPR and PBS.
→ _Hardly ANY Democrats have signed our petition to defend public broadcasting!_

[**Please don’t abandon NPR and PBS: We need a SURGE of grassroots support to STOP Republicans from defunding public broadcasting! Add your name by midnight and join our fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250502_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=19722%2E878179%2EDsd6tj)

subject: Warning: The Silent Heist Draining Your Retirement Savings
body:
Please read the following message.

------------------------------------------------------------

Red block letters spelling 'DEBT' are crossed by barbed wire against the background of the American flag.

** U.S. Debt Crisis - A Silent Heist of Your Retirement Savings
------------------------------------------------------------

** Americans are losing wealth daily and don’t even know it. Fight back using this.
------------------------------------------------------------

There’s a major heist happening on American wealth in real time.

Except this one doesn’t involve masks or vaults. It’s quiet. Slow. And it's targeting your retirement.

The U.S. government has racked up over $36 trillion in debt, and their solution?

Print more money... borrow more... kick the can down the road.

But that road ends with your retirement savings in the crosshairs.

401(k)s and IRAs tied to the stock market are more exposed than ever. Inflation eats away your value. Market volatility crushes your growth. And when the next shock hits, it’ll be too late to act.

But there’s a way out for you and the nest egg you’ve built. (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuekkoIteknop5IcITma77xn1w&s=IEKBKHIGPOHMPJKM

A little-known IRS loophole that lets you move your savings into a private

safe haven, free of the chaos and manipulation in the stock market.

There’s less risk involved, 30+ years of steady growth, and when the economy suffers a downturn, your savings remain safe and protected from the losses in the stock market.

Due to the IRS loophole, those with a traditional retirement account such as a 401(k), IRA, Pension, or TSP can opt in without paying a cent in taxes or penalties.

We break it all down for you in the free 2025 Wealth Protection Guide. (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuekkoIteknop5IdITma77xn1w&s=IEKBKHIGPOHMPJKM

You’ve worked too hard to let your future be destroyed by irresponsible government spending and corporate greed.

The debt isn’t going away. But you can take control of your future.
