name: Team DNC
subject: A note about the importance of a strong Democratic Party:
body:
---
️Derek, ️**This moment demands a strong Democratic Party, and we’re asking for your help to keep building it.** But before we do, we wanted to send you a note about the contributions we received at the DNC this year, share a bit about how that money has been spent, and ask you to add a contribution today. This year alone, we’ve:
* Invested heavily in special elections across the country, which led to huge wins in places like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.
* Sued Trump and DOGE over their illegal power grabs.
* Launched multiple programs to meet voters where they are and fight back against the lies of the Trump administration: the People’s Cabinet, the War Room, and People’s Town Halls.
* Worked with other committees to stand against Trump’s power grab to target ActBlue, the platform that we and so many campaigns and organizations use to collect contributions from supporters like you.

And this is just the beginning. That’s why, as a key member of this grassroots team, your support right now could not be more important. We are committed to continuing to organize and mobilize against Trump while electing Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. **That's how we'll use that $3 contribution we're asking you to make today. What do you say?** [**Can you donate $3 to the Democratic National Committee today? We’ll put your contribution directly to work electing Democrats.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250502_3322_fr&refcode2=3331_22930333_Wkg4E5&akid=3331%2E22930333%2EWkg4E5) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250502_3322_fr&refcode2=3331_22930333_Wkg4E5&akid=3331%2E22930333%2EWkg4E5)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250502_3322_fr&refcode2=3331_22930333_Wkg4E5&akid=3331%2E22930333%2EWkg4E5)**
---
****
Thank you for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
| Peter, I want to thank you for making my campaign launch for the U.S. Senate a success. Your support has been instrumental in building a powerful grassroots movement committed to fighting for the change North Carolina needs. This past month, I've been hot on the campaign trail — crisscrossing the state, meeting incredible people in their communities, at town halls, grocery stores, marches, you name it. The conversations and stories I’ve heard have fueled my determination to tackle the issues that matter most to you. Whether you joined me at a town hall, completed our April Issues Survey, chipped in to finally retire Thom Tillis, or opened our emails — I appreciate you taking that time — it means a great deal to me. Thank you for uniting and working together to kick off a campaign that you can be proud of — I know I am! In a matter of weeks, we’ve demonstrated the power of our collective commitment to issues like voting rights, expanded health care access, quality public education, and support for working families. I’m grateful for your involvement and look forward to continuing this journey together. With your continued support, we can bring the bold, principled leadership that North Carolina deserves Let's keep the momentum going! name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I have a dilemma
body:
Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump’s closest confidantes, I’m certain to be one of the Democrats’ biggest targets once again. |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f59f40fbbb74c6c8c9b579e9a7361d8&_e=tm2jOXWzeYx8HR_IuzEz8QxlCr7wIlDE9T_vtgYADhBnT15a82BUSD1fIosJnrHM3w-mAjguVpszDsJk3tY5uwwEmel-KHO0NbeIHA5tHaKXJahIghpGSVSeVv2yHbqwXm5I6Tw7VQ8ML2THZsvh85PQRy-cPTop6UmuwR9ceAMXG29vCuhoucPlBBr8QdOot1I3xKnh6_bvLIqNFQHh_NynDdTcb9DuwMdrt0zdMyfg0ZQTe9SE0z664uD4rdk45zKfzgiHvSWcueGZ8qXblCTq0eg83Xr4vs5YNk8kv1vetRn09hWALYNh5OWkqDEixxSfguD_Xxnf3zBsZEL3TU6nBRnkvu7kLdByUkIZnPQMPb3AWNWsUOcFT8ZmwO4DiVy9t8OhryIt9Od0TBFPU8nVIf2Hkm2oZQA24uHrKUM%3D)
Peter,

Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. **As one of President Trump's closest confidantes, I'm certain to be one of the Democrats' biggest targets once again.**

As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I am working with the President and his team to pass sweeping legislation that will secure our border and rebuild our economy.

_**I can't wait for you to see our successes!**_

But to be candid with you, Peter, I don't have a lot of time right now to focus on my campaign.

My time is spent working to dramatically reduce government waste and inefficiencies and extend the Trump tax cuts for hard-working families and job-creating businesses, which will help get our economy back on track. Don't forget -- a stronger economy means a more secure nation, whether it's at our southern border or in the world arena.

**My dilemma here is simple:** the more time I spend helping President Trump, the less time I have to raise for what is shaping up to be an incredibly expensive re-election contest.

**[Will you do me a favor and contribute $20, $30, or even $75 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f59f40fbbb74c6c8c9b579e9a7361d8&_e=tm2jOXWzeYx8HR_IuzEz8QxlCr7wIlDE9T_vtgYADhBnT15a82BUSD1fIosJnrHM3w-mAjguVpszDsJk3tY5uwwEmel-KHO0NbeIHA5tHaKXJahIghpGSVSeVv2yHbqwXm5I6Tw7VQ8ML2THZsvh85PQRy-cPTop6UmuwR9ceAMXG29vCuhoucPlBBr8QdOot1I3xKnh6_bvLIqNFQHh_NynDdTcb9DuwMdrt0zdMyfg0ZQTe9SE0z664uD4rdk4R_WucSVw1RrGkN1hgxCwrF_hlRPfio63Vfv-Xr0f8_fHbGv6LaPjOSj6kfml7OCH74ciNv1seMhRuT5WO71Paof5-mxsuFqYqKXod41Y-uPIrv0OvjdMKdPp8j4avR9wsg9bux4rqpWgRU5FR7Fx-IOrXf760u7mrl2-gB29wWY%3D)** Your support will allow my focus to stay where it needs to be: serving the American people.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I want to connect with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Join my Grassroots Cabinet and be part of our next virtual call

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106962599/543172898/1328794144?refcode=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMGQyZjhjLTZlMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZWDjPoOOgfJuZFqY1WJyOIhlo6-TjIDY1-iPbvvNzA=&emci=9df27f71-a226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)

In times like these, community means everything. And I’m so encouraged by the community we’ve created through **Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet.** Earlier this week, we held our first-ever Grassroots Cabinet virtual call with the incredible group of monthly donors who help power this work. We talked strategy, answered some of your burning questions about the path forward, and celebrated the kind of wins that only happen when people like you organize. **We also got to hear from one of my friends, Connie Britton, and two of JanePAC’s elected climate champions in Portland! Take a look:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106962601/543172900/1824087006?refcode=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMGQyZjhjLTZlMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZWDjPoOOgfJuZFqY1WJyOIhlo6-TjIDY1-iPbvvNzA=) Our next Grassroots Cabinet call is just around the corner, and I’d love for you to be a part of it. **[A monthly contribution of $10 is what it takes to power this work and step into the room with us. You’ll officially become part of Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet — our team of everyday climate activists pushing for real change in their communities.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106962603/543172902/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMGQyZjhjLTZlMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZWDjPoOOgfJuZFqY1WJyOIhlo6-TjIDY1-iPbvvNzA=)** And when you join, you’ll also get some Cabinet-only perks: ✨ Exclusive updates from me, straight to your inbox
✨ Priority access to events and JanePAC merch discounts
✨ Invitations to special virtual events with me (just like this one!) While the perks are a meaningful part of this experience, the real impact of your $10 monthly gift is in how it strengthens the climate movement, every single day. Steady grassroots support is how we become unstoppable. And that’s exactly what we have to become with Trump back in the White House. He’s not only got billionaire buddies dumping money into races we have fought to win — he’s out to destroy the possibility of us having a future that supports human life. **So your monthly donation couldn’t come at a more critical moment. It gives us the power to plan ahead and invest _early_ in must-win climate candidates across the country. This is how we build real, lasting power, from the ground up.** **[So, what do you think? Can I count on you to chip in $10 a month and become a part of this team?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106962605/543172904/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMGQyZjhjLTZlMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZWDjPoOOgfJuZFqY1WJyOIhlo6-TjIDY1-iPbvvNzA=)** | [**Join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106962607/543172906/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.ba0d2f8c-6e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMGQyZjhjLTZlMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZWDjPoOOgfJuZFqY1WJyOIhlo6-TjIDY1-iPbvvNzA=)

body:
Will you PLEASE read my message in full?

| |

| | | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/6fjLQHop_85HgM7NOPrXnLTd2-MTX9HqOr1hq2c6rSKZgaB3mGgvrUqsG1V3Az2zP7JFWD0MQX8EZM3zuiLj-uKatLKdmcKfWgdo9_QYkjGw6mL1cXl-GatGC-jshi40U7l6Yu3J92IhfNSaYMZyPYNqUyJzISG2dW4ClbcGApRsxeWS_VUoF0kBJeHomdEvLMRNSmY-WdAGzUeYNuNW-YlmZkz_T7l9j7xEeAJMElXDnb5Xk9eclhXdo964IvnC3l0EWcAjVGlSeAD0mU4zehT7iNCksB0z9WcZ8phTG25AaBkPcNvk-yskOoRviIgfhXUqVZN6PxgYdof1JyxyfE5yEgbxvq-rMexxjJxFNLGv_AhEeGuypwLQkoqPGSpF_Rwu4_RRD4zRhFLwn3At1XIquSFEc3bokFUu0lN3EwzDcvY2UmwdRwl0VZ1cL_v8mqR0sGrfY7wUQ5114IKmgVPkkUwQzevprjZ7IuPmWacJjS3ej0hrk-zdOSs/efREQjQIAASo3IHfUYo2dT2bWIU1KcPj/8 "Marsha Blackburn")

I'll admit it, Peter...

_I'm BLOWN away!_

You're the only **ONE** out of **DOZENS** of supporters I've emailed today who's taken the time to open this message. _**[I'm so grateful for your attention, and I promise to make it worth your while.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/RZERoUmUEQmddC3iI1O3UwqitWY3WcgJAqucbmat74cC_1NaODk3TvgkZzobQcge_gqahJ9Ib8_NRVvfct-leo_h7c3aTY136U--6UhWyw_SP_3621cg2pbypL-x4pbTwkYP5EvWxz4imswaq3QJDOI36tfBBM66j4u8aRCfdeK_2bQcxoGSwOFHg-pdP_eSRt9AAZ-vgE3nQazkumydvid0qvw50Avz47Np_4Nuh3OciQoiJ11NddhkdoixHGa1fIPhq6sj0kQkonisGHLLdJy96Dh_63Z_d7TvDRx0qa482g383nUczHMqWrwXq-9kCGAu1M-y5LmzSVbvTGesxP9gScxfTjqOm61JetA3xfuNjXdWtszVBC5hw7SWdI1f4P59RyIefokIRc8sFSh5RN1wKg0s9fYm11y71kRHpM8ap1VdeE5e0WOckqjw_LjKNmelYvY-dH_lyQOerYnvNFTgXlVVasEPqf__TiiSIMHFn3YQLFRaaZ0YzLg/dMBOOB8RGDf4BTfLX9C8m-EFB6lSX7-v/8 "I'm so grateful for your attention, and I promise to make it worth your while.")**_

My name is Marsha Blackburn. You may know me as the first female U.S. Senator elected from the great state of Tennessee, but that's not all. I'm a top America First Conservative and a #1 ally of President Donald J. Trump.

**And to thank you for taking the time to read my message in full, I promise to be honest with you - _even if it's not what you want to hear._**

I've seen firsthand the energy and excitement that propelled us to victory this past election. But, Peter, I've also seen the latest numbers, and the truth is:

Things have really taken a turn since our major MAGA victory on Election Day. I thought enthusiasm would be at an all-time high, but right now, that couldn't be further from the truth!

GOP grassroots fundraising has _**PLUMMETED**_ , and I'm starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our major fundraising goal - handing a win straight over to the Democrats.

_Trust me, I know you 've done so much for our movement already, and I cannot thank you enough._

_**[But, these messages are costly to send, so I'm hoping you've made it this far and will be willing to pitch in even just $5! It would mean the world to me and go a long way in our fight to make America GREAT again.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/TCpwdUcDLLslZNl53TTxTvM9kQ4eJb5DKkdW1CLAXUHfwgca7epLXsDfUDPl86AKwp7xlxrtH1o-ol5Aph6_fFRYWLA-VksZQzfvX5XmMB8_p2N9AJaTlyplpR7v77ad1q5aq1ms6w2LkPEOlqyeYK8NuVW9UX2I6VuNrQoBk3jZjq9Gq9ZauJdQGjm9JgUicGaEoi8CxY2TgDY0iFpJjljNdbrSQ5SgOIrt2UlHhM3GprmZUTNK8iw22CWaoHn3bIO91vpdtgJvQVCjtUN3-FyLgtxQwTrY1S5UfXt64CHhCQ4p6wd-yz7FMA3c1VU7Kn5UuvXnZbIzjwnb_VaEv9BLc7XisLsj4166HX86ZAM9tflHVBFkMb0tqWz66drk0mK6RhCZwiPbsVQ6c5IEETsDfnO07voHykNqDfhexjnMw4mBK9t8rCLOhQvrKd8lFM59hg_axN2D6fw0J4mYeIJkCNIjMxgzBv73zMQWjeq3G8RltxM_ZCUbG64/6M9K2zEGdkuHMplfMRB5sLg3eWTVghOl/8 "But, these messages are costly to send, so I'm hoping you've made it this far and will be willing to pitch in even just $5! It would mean the world to me and go a long way in our fight to make America GREAT again.")**_

You're the only ONE out of DOZENS of supporters I've emailed today who's taken the time to open this message. "I'm so grateful for your attention, and I promise to make it worth your while." My name is Marsha Blackburn. You may know me as the first female U.S. Senator elected from the great state of Tennessee, but that's not all. I'm a top America First Conservative and a #1 ally of President Donald J. Trump. And to thank you for taking the time to read my message in full, I promise to be honest with you - even if it's not what you want to hear. I've seen firsthand the energy and excitement that propelled us to victory this past election. But, Peter, I've also seen the latest numbers, and the truth is: Things have really taken a turn since our major MAGA victory on Election Day. I thought enthusiasm would be at an all-time high, but right now, that couldn't be further from the truth! GOP grassroots fundraising has PLUMMETED , and I'm starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our major fundraising goal - handing a win straight over to the Democrats. Trust me, I know you 've done so much for our movement already, and I cannot thank you enough. "But, these messages are costly to send, so I'm hoping you've made it this far and will be willing to pitch in even just $5! It would mean the world to me and go a long way in our fight to make America GREAT again." | | | "CHIP IN NOW >>" I promise to NEVER forget your support. | | * | | | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Selling WH access to the largest investors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
There’s no way around it, Peter: **This Trump administration is brazenly using official power for pure corruption.** From allowing Elon Musk to slash vital programs and give his companies billions in government contracts while using the White House to advertise Tesla, to closing investigations into political allies and financial supporters while opening them into political enemies, to now offering a White House visit to the largest investors in his crypto company, Trump’s first 100 days in office have been filled with rampant corruption at every level. I first exposed Trump’s use of official power for personal gain when I served as lead counsel in Trump’s first impeachment in 2019, and now I’m working in Congress to stop this increasing and brazen corruption. My mission in both positions has not only been to hold the Trump administration accountable but also to bring their corruption schemes to light — regardless of how hard they try to keep folks like you in the dark. That’s why, every Friday, I plan to unveil an aspect of corruption within the Trump administration to make sure that nothing is being hidden from voters in New York and across the country. On this week’s agenda? **Donald Trump’s blatant attempts to sell access to the White House to the highest bidder.** Right before his inauguration, Trump launched a cryptocurrency called $TRUMP that sold quickly. That’s already a _huge_ problem in itself, but it gets worse. As the _New York Times_ exposed, Trump’s company essentially engaged in a market manipulation scheme with other companies to artificially inflate the value of $TRUMP, while secretly pocketing millions of dollars in payments for the honor of being associated with the President of the United States. Then, last week, he posted an announcement promoting an “intimate private dinner” with Trump at the White House for the top 220 investors in $TRUMP. There are no restrictions or vetting on who buys the currency. Donald Trump personally profits _every time_ the price of his cryptocurrency increases — and to no one’s surprise, its value increased by more than 60 percent following the dinner invitation. **To put it simply, Donald Trump is selling access to the most powerful office in the world for his own personal profit — a blatant violation of the Constitution and other laws.** Shamefully, Congressional Republicans who control the majority silently watch this corruption escalate, and you can be sure the Trump DOJ will never initiate an investigation. So we must continue to hold him accountable through the voice of elected leaders like me and the American people like you. **[If you believe in my work to expose this unprecedented level of corruption coming from the Trump administration, please chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106964455/543179042/-647979915?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjlkOTQ0ZC03MTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9wrOD7_GkmHVo9MaECwBjHuvZTOEK8fDTtTZY1l8Ok=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106964456/543179043/-647979915?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjlkOTQ0ZC03MTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9wrOD7_GkmHVo9MaECwBjHuvZTOEK8fDTtTZY1l8Ok=)

_How’d we even get here?_ Last fall, Justice Riggs — one of the Democracy Defenders we were proud to endorse in 2024 — won re-election to the North Carolina Supreme Court fair and square. Her victory was confirmed by a recount. Then it was confirmed by another recount. The people of North Carolina have spoken and must be heard.

But rather than concede, Republican Jefferson Griffin (the failed challenger in that election) sued to overturn the results by throwing out legally valid ballots. On top of being a sore loser, he’s attacking the sanctity of our elections.

And last month, right-wing North Carolina Supreme Court justices went along with part of his agenda and issued a bombshell ruling to throw out legally cast ballots of overseas voters and target military members from Democratic counties. **This decision puts Republicans one step closer to stealing an election.**

Like Justice Riggs said: _"These voters who are serving our country, they did nothing wrong. They followed every rule in place, including state laws that were passed by a Republican legislature in 2011 and have been used in every election since then without any challenge. We know that these voters did everything that they were told to do. And a court cannot, consistent with the federal constitution, come in and change laws after the election to disenfranchise voters."_

While Justice Riggs has petitioned a federal court to step in to protect voters’ constitutional rights, the NDRC is working to expose the GOP’s attack on democracy in North Carolina and across the country.

[**If you’re outraged by the North Carolina GOP’s attempt to silence voters and reverse the outcome of an election they lost, then please rush a donation of $30 or more right now to help push back against the far right’s anti-democracy agenda.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106964829/543180267/-1285150145?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCReduxFederalAppeal_email_20250502-NDRC-Tier1-NCReduxFederalAppeal_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250502-NDRC-Tier1-NCReduxFederalAppeal_&utm_campaign=NCReduxFederalAppeal&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyMmNhOTE0LTcyMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lgF5S2PGuuk52juJiZk6cLsOmUDjeQOA-k71YevqJU8=)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: What I said on MSNBC yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act]
Hi team,
I was on MSNBC with Alex Witt right after the news broke that Trump was removing National Security Advisor Mike Waltz from his position.
Check out what I had to say about it below, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act&nvep=&hmac=] then consider chipping in a few bucks to power our campaign! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act&nvep=&hmac=] ⬇️
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act]
Mike Waltz was partly responsible for Signalgate—when our national security leaders communicated highly classified information in a text messaging app—and he deserves to go. I also have made no secret of my opinion that Pete Hegseth is unqualified to lead our Defense Department, and he should be fired for sharing war plans and putting our troops at risk.
It's only been around 100 days of this administration, and from Signalgate to nearly crashing our economy with these reckless tariffs, we’ve seen its incompetence on full display.
Whether in the U.S. Senate or on the campaign trail, I’m going to continue speaking out against the incompetence of this administration. If you’re with me, make a small donation today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act]
In the month since Trump implemented his tariffs, I’ve heard business owners, many of whom are Republicans, say that Trump is destroying their livelihoods and hurting workers.
This week, I voted for a bill that would repeal Trump's tariffs. I am also leading a bipartisan bill that would require Congressional approval for new tariffs, legislation that Republican leadership is too afraid to take up.
Folks, I’m doing everything possible to push back against the current administration. That’s precisely why I’m running for Governor. I know it’s at home in Colorado where we can most effectively fight back against President Trump and solve the pressing challenges we face.
If you want to join my campaign, check out my appearance on MSNBC, then chip in a few bucks if you’re able. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_msnbcalexwitt?refcode=X_250502_msnbcappearance_act]
Thanks,
Michael

clean_body: [] Hi team, I was on MSNBC with Alex Witt right after the news broke that Trump was removing National Security Advisor Mike Waltz from his position. Check out what I had to say about it below, [=] then consider chipping in a few bucks to power our campaign! [=] ⬇️ [] Mike Waltz was partly responsible for Signalgate—when our national security leaders communicated highly classified information in a text messaging app—and he deserves to go. I also have made no secret of my opinion that Pete Hegseth is unqualified to lead our Defense Department, and he should be fired for sharing war plans and putting our troops at risk. It's only been around 100 days of this administration, and from Signalgate to nearly crashing our economy with these reckless tariffs, we’ve seen its incompetence on full display. Whether in the U.S. Senate or on the campaign trail, I’m going to continue speaking out against the incompetence of this administration. If you’re with me, make a small donation today. >> [] DONATE [] In the month since Trump implemented his tariffs, I’ve heard business owners, many of whom are Republicans, say that Trump is destroying their livelihoods and hurting workers. This week, I voted for a bill that would repeal Trump's tariffs. I am also leading a bipartisan bill that would require Congressional approval for new tariffs, legislation that Republican leadership is too afraid to take up. Folks, I’m doing everything possible to push back against the current administration. That’s precisely why I’m running for Governor. I know it’s at home in Colorado where we can most effectively fight back against President Trump and solve the pressing challenges we face. If you want to join my campaign, check out my appearance on MSNBC, then chip in a few bucks if you’re able. >> [] Thanks, Michael [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. **We surpassed our April end-of-month fundraising goal!**

Thank you to every person who stepped up and made a donation to power this campaign forward in April.

I truly hope you know how much your support means to me, Peter.

**But now we can’t let our momentum stall. Our Democracy can’t afford another 2 years of a MAGA trifecta.**

[**With that in mind, could you chip in $10 toward this week’s 500 donation goal? subject: Ban China, Russia, North Korea, or Iran from our Military Bases

Keep China off our military bases NOW!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=8a9ad0297479432c9eedefdb8ad6b1f1&_e=tBZhu4r5To7dFQG5cUW14zVrtcDmdGZa8Kr8rRyuLZOEeNABEVvq71IhnHv6ZVAltyd7wcBqIH9lYLuqvKlTjdNsqN2HdL6D7hoNS5enlgg9mOtGWgYQalEnXKDi7WicFpd6GdQvGpICTugU3paviTkcm8uqmc8r-bfu6ePQWFtNPe1hdYtgduV3QxiTFfX-chUV0ivFiSNcsQnm-VHUKRVquUnaU7x7-0SDTMwwgSQ03B9gbTzrG6dTFbrH4AF8dif_0LgMOZgUqohsa2bbLOeEeQcn8aSSxccG_1B6XMb573jgwaGk5HGYf7JICEh9FnOUcGUkjk8qE7qGoD9ZpdrXpaKOuDNTf8tX-CoA6eHDeJCAwGt7C743TOKesS_jka__PzVjWmrDFUzGs2GCmEO225iHzms1-aIl7lKe5L95lOM5-8hq7Q-ccHa_j2gUjHIdSl-HUKGjO6-A6UnZvJy_ZeG00xnPx6hbtaufEwE_WO5giJCzaIV-s5IyoVnRj4u9gZLwezUSWpdP14pkt-OEhk8aOcUoi-7Wj1zsTni7IwCOCV3dHvuq6KwaF6b6)
---

Patriot,

I introduced the Military Installation Retail Security Act, a bill that does what should've been done a long time ago:

_**It bans companies owned or controlled by China, Russia, North Korea, or Iran from operating on U.S. military bases.**_

It's unbelievable that the Chinese Communist Party currently owns and operates over 80 stores on our most sensitive military installations, potentially collecting personal data from our troops, including elite units like our Green Berets and Navy SEALs.

**That 's a national security threat hiding in plain sight, and it ends with this bill.**

We owe it to our servicemen and women to protect them from the moment they step onto base. That means locking down their data, cutting off foreign influence, and shutting the door on adversaries who never should've been allowed on our military bases to begin with.

**[This isn’t political. It’s common sense. Keep China off our military bases NOW!](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=8a9ad0297479432c9eedefdb8ad6b1f1&_e=tBZhu4r5To7dFQG5cUW14zVrtcDmdGZa8Kr8rRyuLZOEeNABEVvq71IhnHv6ZVAltyd7wcBqIH9lYLuqvKlTjdNsqN2HdL6D7hoNS5enlgg9mOtGWgYQalEnXKDi7WicFpd6GdQvGpICTugU3paviTkcm8uqmc8r-bfu6ePQWFtNPe1hdYtgduV3QxiTFfX-WvtpXqdLwJ38sHM_b_VDsis5taOO2NDMw_-ui1Ea1guuNnQ7xjQkA6eUbqO8GOcMPRDs-FYqjkow3pLjD4pF-RenTXES_2RzFfQZrgje6XHD1ECZiS_V9goXL15wEwLL3807MTXtsYkrx91ftZ3kgpgXf8ejF2HyhRMMBRe3U4eDD8k4TDbBgj3eR7PkgqLP0sJfmnSDYwBBkDlD7EkmFEa7AIrpLJy7-28ABaysLWTpX2mdSljpSNrsGrvOF8mgttIHzAGfr11C301No8TxiImk0mME6-ZlJ5VLAXp9hPzpsLFxqJvcN1FX2hdnrPy2s3ybaAGxUUzzaRIAsZVFX5dvWVxzh0zcEya9ouYI5CYiHHmGEm51_s_k4P0fhBVG)**

# [Sign your name: NO Military Parade for Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9da99e9-c80c-489e-bb6c-0907e2448314/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Leaked documents revealed plans for a military parade on Trump's birthday in June, which would include more than 6,600 soldiers, at least 150 vehicles, 50 helicopters, seven bands, and more. This ridiculous spectacle would likely cost tens of millions of dollars in taxpayer money – while Trump slashes important government programs that benefit veterans. Trump wants to join the ranks of other dictators who put their militaries out on display for their own egos – he's been pushing for a parade in his honor since his first term. This is NOT okay. We need to show overwhelming disapproval of this wildly inappropriate spectacle.

[**Sign your name: Absolutely NO military parade for Trump >> **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td51fa1e1-98a5-4220-84ce-6678d4f724bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: San Mateo Daily Journal (5/2): Then and now: San Mateo County hosts a very special birthday
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/306ea0f519d6/san-mateo-daily-journal-52-then-and-now-san-mateo-county-hosts-a-very-special-birthday?e=c0babbc643)

#

Then and now: San Mateo County hosts a very special birthday
By David Canepa and Mitch Postel

Every year in mid-May, the San Mateo County Historical Association hosts a special day of activities to celebrate the official founding of the county in 1856. This year, however, the historical association is teaming up with the County of San Mateo to host a spectacular 169th birthday celebration 5 p.m. Thursday, May 15, under the rotunda at the Old County Courthouse/History Museum in downtown Redwood City which is free and open for all to attend. That birthday celebration will be followed by a brief procession accompanied by the Woodside High School Band to a ribbon cutting and dedication for 500 County Center, the greenest civic building in the United States. Barely a year old, 500 County Center is already the winner of numerous Best of the Best Sustainability awards, including from engineering News Record and the American Institute of Architects. It will be a beautiful evening to celebrate the county’s storied past, the possibilities of the future and to toast the renaissance of San Mateo County with family, friends, neighbors, free food, music and activities. The evening will begin at the History Museum with a reenactment of the founding of the county featuring the individual considered to be the father of San Mateo County, New York native Horace Hawes, the former district attorney of San Francisco. While serving in the state Assembly in 1856, Hawes introduced legislation aimed at rooting out San Francisco’s corruption that was later amended to create San Mateo County. California was only 6 years old as a state and San Mateo County became its 18th county which had a total population at the time of less than 5,000 people. Hawes watched as the San Francisco to San Jose Railroad tracks took shape in the Peninsula and were brought through Redwood City in 1863, five decades before the first cars started traveling the dirt roads of El Camino Real. Those rail tracks with coal- and diesel-powered locomotives formerly running on them are home to the oldest, continuously running commuter train west of the Mississippi which since 1985 is Caltrain. Caltrain is now one of the greenest commuter lines in the entire country as its brand-new electric fleet annually reduces greenhouse gas emissions by 250,000 tons — the equivalent of taking 55,000 cars off the road. The Caltrain tracks and so many other Peninsula landmarks including the fog-swept Santa Cruz Mountains are clearly visible from the fifth floor of 500 County Center, the new home of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors and County Executive’s Office. On May 15, the board, CEO and Historical Association welcome you all to the new workplace for San Mateo County employees which is becoming a destination for large community gatherings with its immense lobby and vast courtyards that can accommodate hundreds of people. 500 County Center represents the cultural, artistic, political and economic revival of what has become the healthiest and near wealthiest county in California. We are living in this county’s renaissance as we are no longer a pit stop nor sleepy bedroom community between San Jose and San Francisco. San Mateo County is experiencing an explosion of change up and down the Peninsula from the Bay to the coast as some of the most innovative and wealthiest companies in the world are headquartered here. YouTube is expanding in San Bruno, Meta is expanding in Menlo Park, Stanford Health is expanding in Redwood City and Replit, an AI company valued at over $1 billion, relocated from San Francisco to Foster City last year. As we celebrate the then and now of this county and our amazing new civic building, we should be proud to call San Mateo County home and on Thursday May 15, we invite you all to share that pride as we step into history and toast the future. So please join us for an unforgettable evening marking the 169th anniversary of San Mateo County and the grand unveiling of 500 County Center. The event kicks off 5 p.m., Thursday May 15, San Mateo County History Museum, 2200 Broadway, Redwood City with a procession to 500 County Center at 5:30 p.m., followed by an unveiling, immersive experiences, music by DJ John Beaver, free food and more. Make this a night to show your love for this beautiful county we call home, learn a little history at the same time and make some new friends. All are welcome.

******************* David Canepa is president of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors and Mitch Postel is president of the San Mateo County Historical Association.
---
|
---
|

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party May Newsletter
body:
Primary Month!

|
### **Primary Month**
We'd like to remind everyone to vote in the PA Primary Elections on 5/20. As taxpayers, we all pay for these elections, and the results will have huge implications on who can be elected in November. We encourage you all to make your voice heard to support the candidates who represent your values. Unfortunately, [1.4 million Pennsylvanians](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=wJe7Oi2KXzCNE6T3sSKybawz_lfTKbLwknrwqOhoCWHgGYWzNZaXONp0wlNheBFe1wz5RaudUvAAXOykAz2mQNoSiwRPTQZtE8T-UDjiDTHCSbMJMkp2fIX-VrI1fY7k9Dh8hvBI1QUAoqWW2Zddz-fdgtdiHaGj8lnpJdWDnPC_JoYz65SY-kG_eHAlQGkq-dmbFwRjnvRSpSV6lNk5cuFJ2C2VlS5Jk6dNetMD8rgfmtBHWNuOa8UkCbGvQwNyKD_wRX__g_r2D9CpdA3uvuB7DKI0L9jckDRhQfjd7krchii1ljf0QJTari4LHfVEEXEGZyxfnUQPuc3yFMuuSSph5yBYAjC8La0KtPG4batP_NIEhoQbQ3JPf4CWWHCP&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_newsletter&n=1), and likely a disproportionate number of Forward Party supporters, are not registered with one of the two major parties, and therefore **not allowed** to participate. You may not realize that we are one of the very few states that still have a completely closed partisan primary system. The effort to repeal closed primaries has been ongoing and will continue. We will continue to highlight the work of [Ballot PA](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=Mms7B2UdQS1Z2nazLHo9hBfpa1ZPLPkhp5mlASWe-vo&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_newsletter&n=2) and [Independent Pennsylvanians](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=cqiRg4Sc_Pgbl68VGMz_tmHvaF5agsUUNHptysXNAWY&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_newsletter&n=3) so you can find a way to help. It's also important to remember that letting independents vote in the primary is a great first goal, but we also want to keep pushing for Ranked Choice Voting and Non-Partisan Primaries. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZWbwNLjI2OgEPmOvU5vPRV&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_may_newsletter&n=4) For all of you who can and will be voting this month, we encourage you to take the time to understand the candidates and offices on your ballot. These people are putting themselves out there to serve their community. They deserve more attention! Do you know any local candidates who align with Forward values? Reach out with some names that should be on our radar. You may also notice races with no candidates at all. These may be great opportunities for us to run candidates. We'll put you in contact with Forward Party Leadership in your area so you can improve your local representation. We are a bottom-up organization; these local elections are where we start. clean_body: Primary Month! | Primary Month We'd like to remind everyone to vote in the PA Primary Elections on 5/20. As taxpayers, we all pay for these elections, and the results will have huge implications on who can be elected in November. We encourage you all to make your voice heard to support the candidates who represent your values. Unfortunately, , and likely a disproportionate number of Forward Party supporters, are not registered with one of the two major parties, and therefore not allowed to participate. You may not realize that we are one of the very few states that still have a completely closed partisan primary system. The effort to repeal closed primaries has been ongoing and will continue. We will continue to highlight the work of and so you can find a way to help. It's also important to remember that letting independents vote in the primary is a great first goal, but we also want to keep pushing for Ranked Choice Voting and Non-Partisan Primaries. For all of you who can and will be voting this month, we encourage you to take the time to understand the candidates and offices on your ballot. These people are putting themselves out there to serve their community. They deserve more attention! Do you know any local candidates who align with Forward values? Reach out with some names that should be on our radar. You may also notice races with no candidates at all. These may be great opportunities for us to run candidates. We'll put you in contact with Forward Party Leadership in your area so you can improve your local representation. We are a bottom-up organization; these local elections are where we start. Join us May 19th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We willtoo! Click below to see more** Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Federal Cuts to Health Insurance Could Happen in Months
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169937.172649.186&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14374)
#
# **Federal Cuts to Health Insurance Could Happen in Months**
_Senator Hughes brought together over 25 federal, state, and city lawmakers and healthcare leaders to fight back against Republican plans to cut health insurance _ __ Last week, Senator Hughes hosted an intergovernmental roundtable with federal, state, and local lawmakers and healthcare leaders from across Pennsylvania. The goal was to bring a variety of leaders together to discuss what federal healthcare cuts could mean for your health insurance.
* * *
"It's important for this group to affirm the magnitude of these potential cuts. These cuts threaten access to quality healthcare and coverage, but they also threaten the well-being of our hospital systems, our nursing homes, and our healthcare workers. We need the public to understand that our healthcare system is extremely interconnected. If congressional Republicans move forward with $880 billion in cuts, our entire healthcare and health insurance system will feel it." \- Senator Hughes
* * *
In Pennsylvania, over 3 million residents, or 23% of the Commonwealth's population rely on Medicaid or CHIP for health insurance. 39% of all Pennsylvania children are enrolled in Medicaid or CHIP. Roundtable participants stressed the huge financial gap Pennsylvania will have to grapple with if federal lawmakers decide to cut health benefits. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14375) [_No State Has the Capacity to Cover Billions in Federal Cuts That Could Be Coming Our Way_](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14375)
* * *
Several roundtable participants noted that federal cuts will also hurt local economies. DHS Secretary Dr. Val Arkoosh said, "For all of us, but for rural communities in particular, hospitals are often the foundation of a community's economic viability, health, and strength. And when a hospital closes, that's often the largest employer in the community." [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14376) [_Healthcare funding can have a ripple effect on local economies, especially those in rural communities_](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14376)
* * *
It's important for everyone in Pennsylvania to understand that any cut to healthcare will impact the entire system. Dr. Cheryl Bettigole, Professor at the Perelman School of Medicine and former Philadelphia Health Commissioner, explained how healthcare cuts will have a domino effect on the entire system. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14377) _[If hospitals close and people lose health coverage, our emergency rooms and urgent care centers will become overrun and overcrowded](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14377)_
* * *
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169937.172649.186&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14378) The group of over 25 lawmakers and leaders at the roundtable agreed that now is the time to be reaching out to both Republican and Democrat lawmakers in Washington to make the case for how catastrophic healthcare cuts could be. Laura Guerra, Congressman Evans' Healthcare Legislative Assistant, noted that language about what specifically will be cut could surface around the end of May. It's time to act now! Call your lawmakers and tell them- Hands off our healthcare! **Senator Fetterman: 215-241-1090** **Senator McCormick: 215-405-9660** **US House of Representatives: 202-225-3121**
* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

funding.This is all-out war on public media and today is an urgent
all-hands-on-deck moment.

from Trump and MAGA extremism?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25233?source=email-20250502&t=1061&akid=8385%2E5885482%2EP9Lzlk ]Headline: Trump signs executive order to stop federal funding for NPR
and PBS.

Trump’s request to Congress to rescind $1 billion in funding is FAR from a
foregone conclusion: after a MASSIVE mobilization by this community,
including two rallies outside of NPR HQ, some Republican lawmakers are
starting to have second thoughts.

At least two members of Congress from Iowa and Nebraska just expressed
concern about the wisdom of defunding trusted public media outlets their
constituents rely on. We just need a few more to stop Trump from defunding
public media and momentum is on our side – but we haven’t won yet.

We need to keep up this fight and make it clear to vulnerable Republicans
that defunding PBS and NPR is unacceptable. We’re delivering our voices on
the Hill, bird-dogging members of Congress, and making this massive in the
media.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250502nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8385%2E5885482%2EP9Lzlk ]Can you urgently chip in right now to power our work mobilizing our 57,000
strong Citizen Army, taking to the streets in Washington, D.C., and
rallying lawmakers, to protect public media from Trump and MAGA extremism?

The stakes couldn't be higher. Trump's allies in Congress want to silence
independent media so that they can get away with spreading lies and
disinformation even more freely. But when public broadcasting is silenced,
the fact is that it’s rural communities, elderly Americans, and children
who most pay the price.

Trump and his MAGA backers may think they can get away with destroying
public media, but public outrage about their radical proposal to gut PBS
and NPR funding is making some conservative lawmakers nervous.

Our Revolution is standing between Trump's misinformation agenda and
independent media sources. We’re mobilizing volunteers, organizing
petitions, and turning people's protests into real political pressure in
Washington.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25233?source=email-20250502&t=1060&akid=8385%2E5885482%2EP9Lzlk ]But we can't sustain our fight without your help. Chip in what you can
today and let's stand together to protect PBS and NPR.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Governor DeSantis convened with Border Czar Tom Homan and former DHS Acting Secretary Chad Wolf at New College of Florida for a roundtable discussion on our nation’s immigration crisis last month.** And friend, they had a lot to talk about. This is one of the most important challenges our country is facing today. Too many public officials have tried to block enforcement of our immigration laws, whether through loud protest or just plain old inaction. **_[But in Florida, we’re doing something different.](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/3viuf3alUQPQQC08tdCMIEYMBlilEb8y5OSTULESlGAwUEA7So_aich73qxpTzAtXFi1nu4hG3EUCGam3yhj_tMwInabL4nlnKnzP5thtxezNoi9bvryJ3TBPiP49Peeif-eCh0tAwjONERcwQArUk_F_rG2b2gcRt_Z0b1bbosriuWxq0gHiGOteS5nCCRVS1DizS1zJYzAT4NY2XZRlnGu_5T_Oc1cpruH0orliApc7qz7Co06QwwF8GZYwPhi9EIho7jrqdRbjp4dmyQQEk2YqZXjHNyPgYixJ3SztMOIM4qr6jJjXkBzaLpM_49iCP8C45HNGIHce2kkpFzc03Z4-lkGK-cBnt6ZJF5GCHUYYsYJWkGA7V6EB423Wm3dZ88RbOZLD4Rut6CCAq5iGml1X7ml1QVrfKlQ1d8/SMT2SWEf8uGcTonwdPlBlqnGN2I2-Odg/8)_** Florida has set the example for states in cooperating with the federal government to enforce our immigration laws, restore the rule of law, and help deliver on President Trump's mandate. __We’re grateful Governor DeSantis is leading the way!__
---
[ **LET'S KEEP GOING** ](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/qCn4bnWZusRfEv_NBvnHxrEhJlfzeviDQZlkdBKDI3nTyAFGA_WdnwTv8r8vNGu2Mg4P0FKEfSKzTRajgrgPDRYS8vEm1xha23jIFNPioaPz9tRXaxRlfOs79VdWwtLT6w1RcupKCQL8DM3ew4LNP-OuAwc9Zvno0ubeOFGOy3yL1OVLNRn08E1YTMRpXTnrPbZa2acefvwf0SJxPzVHNrovwnxukWqi65UlUxhWOhPhww0_YgM2RBy3PDBUoi9OICWIlLZpy_l8RyMkUKjYZXUxZKGFP0TTlfSpIL6nNoUU-HApRIX8_i-prqDgZL0zENlKKA0KYTp3Or9BYYaD-tTpwhVCWnoUqmAuXRebRS0X0JgNUJ0wozfSHvFRCb49O_rv195kX8jDY9xMtbQzNYvDiShQHaarjyAiJuI/MMVHNjf-lleEVeEzpp9rdrs6HSTkbxV-/8)

Thank you,Florida Freedom Fund

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: See what Fauci and pharma don’t want you to know
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/j_Ax8ree2glmDoS_FL-vEMIkBPBE5nIw8dnrRnbhJzFMTIrFuX_e_103zOwzAMErpkppkA6XqQHchU0whlxjpLC-gKBYgcE-emhZ2vJarcHuAcbT_D8nyex2kJfQTskhJncyACq5_0QbqdMdrXfnFZak-Ok2R26w9wLPssp7UpRAG2hu3mDmhbMy/lWVPRi6yhM7OJ-kYhzDY_ER3HaPz7P3H/8)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/0P4xFNxAAKEpJzxA6yvv8ijOgCyLrZc1Ptblfsp3EUXa4s-JeqR6O97LQ3iW5gKrj0-R1DupcLYwzQG1fPaYNDHPTge6rzxQO_naY2Vjrhn65htgufotq1GY8880B9ZZzh_CuIiaRpRIRnEVwtGS4Ci220WZD85I145dEifBLiGboquU46xtB2Z3K73Hx1-PMwHRlUAWkp2bRNEayKalArFNultG3Cc9lo7P2qJXPDUwAuzGfo3YicfX1njsYBfJyH_pKcHrHmw0ICiNW6WECdhXd9vwdfkBr0NYfL9bDGVAFsMwf5M2QnuVlfJywxVzZRSfLm9PPs59UV6ukrdJjMutirw8Qc8jNJGrG2-PC-W8EQ6Hao7lI9LY6OT-AOWxXddxIl-atr4VFswMfOBz_LPueR1pu1uE7OP0qp1igD0KNw/RXzyR9-PJQ7Qyf4CxHhj5NTz7wjfwLL7/8)
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/99cNfv48cqK_ggK4IFvtQvDOnG7a1QJR4yEeEGJKZHsFNl8HLd67H8ar9ANJ-V-FvuR7nBRHkp-ygK-hVIjpsvJo0OWROIVv_JiJGJ9Z2ehAtmeyyizG-JOwGD7_sSwbQ18j4CJ_lK9MLxHi25DVfeJVs_6-qn0ux1pjPoVo0DBKqcUo4WJFoMXEovsQRYfxxu702sj8Hhae0iNat_X-ktVhY_58a-6hbuJ_mGf43wXrkZNGKLqsn86yTiKU8U2cmjS_dR2ZLPa926tT77_565J8vOpx9R2yseqwg7c7p3-iQsqpDDYZnlm65RONvfxgoDnGarLpQ0kLjV0yEdBAe-PoKyXXyx74sxrpzrGdeiZViJjDbdLYEZJthxmqO4r7nyFXdGVr3TdTm5qg_QLmsq_cekJBEZXmhD73G4LTpdQgiQ/v6nUhYidIEY59AXmWuw0WKA8-vN_N1Qk/8)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/j_Ax8ree2glmDoS_FL-vEMIkBPBE5nIw8dnrRnbhJzFMTIrFuX_e_103zOwzAMErpkppkA6XqQHchU0whlxjpLC-gKBYgcE-emhZ2vJarcHuAcbT_D8nyex2kJfQTskhJncyACq5_0QbqdMdrXfnFZak-Ok2R26w9wLPssp7UpRAG2hu3mDmhbMy/lWVPRi6yhM7OJ-kYhzDY_ER3HaPz7P3H/8).

## Judges gone WILD...
Activist judges are at it again - and they're not being shy.
Granted, since the beginning of Trump's second term, certain members of the judiciary have been pretty bold about their interference in executive affairs.
But last week's development really takes the cake for a new level of crazy.
Last Friday, the FBI arrested Wisconsin circuit judge Hannah Thurston for obstruction of an official proceeding.
So what exactly happened?
In a nutshell, Thurston prevented federal agents from arresting an illegal immigrant following his criminal court appearance - he isn't just here illegally, he's facing three battery charges after beating up two people.
Fox News reports that:
"Dugan demanded that the officers proceed to the chief judge's office and - after his hearing ended - escorted Flores-Ruiz and his attorney out a restricted jury door, bypassing the public area where agents were waiting in order to help him avoid arrest, per the complaint."
_FWIW: If you want the full story, check out[this interview](https://substack.com/redirect/38241e23-2fe0-4b59-b9c8-4c2987d060d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) where Pam Bondi explains the situation at length. _
You can't make this stuff up
I wish it was a lone occurrence but it's actually just the latest example of judicial overreach that's been plaguing the Trump administration since day one...

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- May 2
body:
|

---

Dear Friends,
Americans have sustained 100 days of Trump's second term - and frankly - we're sick of it. Of his callous witch hunt targeting civil servants, including the over 150,000 civil servants living in Maryland. Of his raising prices on working and middle class families with reckless and chaotic tariffs. Of his slashing Medicaid, SNAP, and Social Security. And what is the goal of all this chaos? To pay for billionaire tax cuts on the backs of hardworking families, like the family I grew up in. My father was a car salesman and my mother a receptionist. I grew up in a family where 'a little pain' went a long way. Where the rising costs of groceries could be devastating. And where cuts to programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and SNAP could leave behind generations of pain. America is full of families like mine. We won't sit back as this President drags our families into a recession while the President's billionaire friends pillage this country and destroy so much of what makes us great. We, [and the majority of the American people](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.nytimes.com%2f2025%2f04%2f25%2fus%2fpolitics%2ftrump-poll-approval.html&redir_log=574815528208489), will continue to fight back. **Sick of It Tour Launch** That's why, on Saturday May 10, I will be launching our 'Sick of It' Tour. It is paramount that we stand up to this Administration and the harm they are causing. As a mother, one of the gravest concerns is the impact we are seeing on our nation's health. As you well know, we have a public health crisis brewing in our nation - a crisis perpetrated by Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., the U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services. Secretary Kennedy is a danger to our nation. He's a danger to our children, and we the American people are _**SICK OF IT**_. This is a person who, during his confirmation hearings, did not know the difference between Medicare and Medicaid. A dangerous vaccine skeptic who not only said vaccines cause autism in children, [but told me during a hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1885036716928483424&redir_log=644271641036333) that Black people needed a different vaccine schedule than White people. Secretary Kennedy has advocated to remove fluoride from drinking water that prevents cavities and tooth decay for low income families and wants to promote raw milk, something proven to cause illness and hospitalizations at far higher rates than pasteurized milk. He has single-handedly perpetuated the spread of a measles outbreak that is killing children across the country; he has called for a registry for people with autism, and has used offensive language to describe individuals with disabilities. Above all, he's decimating government agencies that perform life saving research and oversight, which puts Marylanders and Americans at risk. Secretary Kennedy and President Trump have fired 20,000 civil servants who worked on behalf of the American people at the Department of Health and Human Services agencies. They abruptly terminated billions of dollars in critical public health grants, including $200 million to Maryland that would go towards vaccination programs, disease surveillance, and alleviating health disparities. And he slashed billions in research funding that supports new life-saving cures for Americans - from our newborns to our seniors, from children battling rare cancers to our service members injured in battle. These cuts will cost lives. Our children are in danger. Our families are in danger. If you feel the way I do, I would like to invite you to join me for our _**Sick of It**_ Rally on Saturday, May 10, 2025. We will send an RSVP link in the coming days. Ahead of Mother's Day, we will gather to demand action, and to demand that RFK, Jr., President Trump and his Administration stop endangering the lives of American families. **Fighting for Transparency** This week, I led my colleagues in releasing a report highlighting just how much seniors and people with disabilities have been impacted in President Trump's first 100 days. The President repeatedly said he would not touch the programs millions of seniors and people with disabilities count on - those he vows to "love and cherish" like Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. Over the past 100 days, we have seen the exact opposite. From slashing health care services for millions of Americans to weakening educational support for students with disabilities, President Trump's administrative actions are directly harming older adults and people with disabilities. Under the Trump Administration, decades of hard-fought gains in health services, education, public health, and retirement and social security will be lost. The report details Republican attacks on programs all Americans rely on; the mass layoff of federal employees - many of whom are our friends and neighbors here in Maryland - at the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), Department of Education (ED), and Social Security Administration (SSA); and proposals to further cut funding for programs that Americans rely on, including the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), and Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP). These programs are critical to the wellbeing of millions of American families, and I will continue to speak out, and bring transparency so that Marylanders can see exactly what this Administration is doing. Click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.kaine.senate.gov%2fimo%2fmedia%2fdoc%2freport_on_trumps_first_100_days_harming_seniors_and_people_with_disabilities.pdf&redir_log=860249699372881) to read the full report. **Trump Cuts Hurting Our Communities** On Thursday during a Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs Committee [hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1918033256391286812&redir_log=940685406383332), the devastating impacts of the Trump Administration's cuts continued to be laid bare. In Maryland alone, this Administration cut $150 million worth of flood mitigation projects - putting lives at risk in support of giving tax breaks to billionaires. The City of Crisfield competed for a federal grant to build a flood wall around the city. With climate change and heavy rains, they have experienced catastrophic flooding. Mayor Darlene Taylor expressed her concern following the hearing. "The loss of the FEMA BRIC funding for our $36M Crisfield Flood Mitigation project is absolutely devastating to our community. A community where, according to recent news reports, the majority of the residents support this Administration. I doubt they truly understand that without this funding there is a real potential for loss of life in future storms, and it is certain that our homes, our businesses, and our schools will continue to be ravaged by the increasing frequency and intensity of storm surges, tidal flooding, and changing seas," said Mayor Taylor. "Once the seafood capital of the world, our economic mobility will continue to stall, and FEMA will continue to spend millions of dollars in property damage replacement and repairs. Instead, our $36M Flood Mitigation project is about prevention, it is a comprehensive flood plan to build a seawall around Crisfield. This is a once in a lifetime opportunity that has been snatched from our hands. Without the FEMA BRIC project our small waterfront community could never have competed; we could never have conducted the research and analysis required for this highly technical application, we just don't have the resources, or the capacity. Thanks to the FEMA BRIC Direct Technical Assistance program, the culmination of 2 years of bi-weekly multi-agency collaboration engaging coastal scientists and storm water engineers, we developed a well-engineered project that earned us the #1 application in the nation for the FY23 FEMA BRIC program. Funding that is imperative for our future existence, in fact, our very survival." These decisions are impacting the people who voted for this President, the people who didn't, and the people who didn't vote at all. I think it's important for Marylanders to understand exactly who these decisions affect, and how. I will continue to pull back the veil and seek answers. **Fighting for Resources** Home ownership was a core part of the American Dream. My parents, a young, working class couple, were able to afford a modest home just a few years after they got married. Unfortunately today, young people cannot have the same expectation, and the thought of owning a home seems far out of their reach - especially for those who can barely afford these out-of-control rent prices. This week, Senator Chris Van Hollen and I announced $200,000 in federal funding for four local NeighborWorks organizations in Maryland to support efforts to lower the cost of housing, expand the local housing supply, support economic opportunities, revitalize neighborhoods, and build stronger and safer communities. We will continue to work to bring back resources because I believe Marylanders should not expect to live on the margins. I want each of you to live beyond your wildest dreams. Learn more about the funding [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-alsobrooks-announce-200k-to-maryland-to-lower-cost-of-housing%2f&redir_log=057486258936848). **Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to work with my colleagues to fight for you. Here are some of the bills I've cosponsored this week: The Major Richard Star Act
* The bill would eliminate the Department of Defense (DoD) retirement pay offset for medically retired military personnel who receive disability benefits from the VA, allowing for concurrent receipt of DoD retirement and VA disability pay. There are roughly 350,000 veterans living in Maryland. According to the Military Officers Association of America (MOAA), 737 Maryland residents would benefit from the passage of the Act.

The Assault Weapons Ban of 2025
* Firearms are the leading cause of violent death in Maryland, accounting for almost 70% of violent deaths in 2021. Of those, over 65% were homicides. When the last assault weapons ban was in effect from 1994 to 2004, mass shootings dropped in the United States by 37%.

Fairness for Victims of SNAP Skimming
* This legislation would permanently expand and extend previous appropriations language to allow state SNAP agencies to reimburse SNAP recipients of benefits stolen by skimming. It also limits replacement to either the full amount stolen or two months of benefits, whichever is less. The last extension of the language expired in December 2024. Stolen SNAP benefits have been a growing issue in Maryland. In 2021, approximately $92K of benefits were stolen. A year later, the amount was more than $1 million. As a result of the original act, Maryland was the first state in the country to receive federal approval for their SNAP reimbursement plan. At that time, the Maryland Department of Human Services planned to repay more than $2.5 million to more than 3,800 victims.

Healthy Poultry Assistance and Indemnification Act
* This legislation would ensure that all poultry growers and laying operations in highly pathogenic avian influenza control areas whose operations are affected receive compensation through USDA.
* This bill is crucial to mitigating the current wave of avian flu outbreak that is harming the poultry industry, putting farmers at risk for financial hardship, and driving up the price of chicken and eggs across America. This bipartisan bill covers blind spots in the HPAI compensation program, protecting Maryland's farmers and poultry growers.
* Maryland is a national leader in broiler chicken production, generating $1.3 billion in poultry revenue in 2023. Last year, the state produced 59 million eggs. Most of the chicken and egg production is concentrated on the Eastern Shore. Maryland has reported seven cases of HPAI, with the first appearing in January 2025.

**Legendary Fighter** This week, I was privileged to have lunch with the legend that is Senator Barbara Mikulski. Senator Mikulski is a trailblazer and a fighter in the greatest sense. I am so grateful for her mentorship and leadership that has left a lasting legacy on our state. **Stay in the Fight** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have recently been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2f&redir_log=992708218041239). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this **TOGETHER**. Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14335.7776181.5294475.7190525)

Peter, Listening first and talking second — _that’s how Democrats should be showing up in this moment._ Becca knows it’s important to not just show up and speak out, but to listen and let her constituents guide her actions in Congress. She brings the conversations she has right back to Washington, where she fights for solutions that make a meaningful difference in our lives and communities. Teams like this one make that work possible. But Trump is coming after our grassroots power directly. **Last week, Trump ordered an investigation into ActBlue — a blatant power grab designed to threaten grassroots supporters’ ability to support Democrats like Becca and mobilize voters during a crucial election year.** Trump’s goal is to give billionaires even more influence in our elections and stop grassroots movements like ours from gaining momentum. **But we won’t be intimidated. Small-dollar donations are how we’ll keep Becca fighting for our interests against Trump’s oligarchy.** **[At a time when our collective political power is under attack, every small-dollar donation can serve as a sign of solidarity. clean_body: | = Peter, Listening first and talking second — that’s how Democrats should be showing up in this moment. Becca knows it’s important to not just show up and speak out, but to listen and let her constituents guide her actions in Congress. She brings the conversations she has right back to Washington, where she fights for solutions that make a meaningful difference in our lives and communities. Teams like this one make that work possible. But Trump is coming after our grassroots power directly. Last week, Trump ordered an investigation into ActBlue — a blatant power grab designed to threaten grassroots supporters’ ability to support Democrats like Becca and mobilize voters during a crucial election year. Trump’s goal is to give billionaires even more influence in our elections and stop grassroots movements like ours from gaining momentum. But we won’t be intimidated. Small-dollar donations are how we’ll keep Becca fighting for our interests against Trump’s oligarchy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Friends,

Elissa is going to be on The Daily Show tonight!
Tune in at 11 PM EST, and check your local listings to find where you can watch live. She’ll talk about her first 100 days in office, and her plans for the future of the Democratic Party.
We’ll share the link with you tomorrow if you miss it live!
Team Slotkin

United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Why is the Trump administration attacking libraries?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Growing up in Arlington, Washington, every Wednesday night at the Larsen household was library night.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106969156/543194770/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjU4NTM2NC03YTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRc3Od77aXwwPQ_kuZ3BBReG1wqxGxq5LpbWCOE2ayE=&emci=030c9a30-b726-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=db585364-7a27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Growing up in Arlington, Washington, every Wednesday night at the Larsen household was library night. We would pile into a Chevy Impala station wagon, made when cars didn't have seatbelts, and my Dad would drive us to the library. We would bring our stack of books we read in the last week, turn them in, and then check out more books for the next week. **Libraries are very important to education and my family.** Larsen household library night built up my love for reading, which continues for me today. **Fast forward a few decades, and rural libraries like the one I went to growing up continue to be a critical resource in Northwest Washington. In some cases, a library may be the only source of free internet in a community, and a place to borrow tools or resources beyond just books.** Once again, the Trump administration is gaslighting the country. They say they are going after "waste, fraud, and abuse" in government spending — but they are actually attacking services that kids and families rely on. **Last month, I visited the Everett Public Library and to understand why the Trump administration is attacking libraries and the importance of protecting our libraries. **I met with Abby Cooley, the Everett Public Library librarian, and this is what I heard from her:
* **Libraries are not just stacks of books: Books are information and resources.** Libraries connect our community members to the information and resources they need. Libraries are a critical space of safety and engagement.

* **The budget cuts are forcing libraries to make difficult funding decisions.** One resource on the line is free internet access, and whether libraries will be able to continue ot provide this free resource that many community members rely on. Other resources on the line are information resources, such as research databases and professional skill-building databases. Finally, programming events for our youth that benefit our community and learning opportunities are also on the line with the budget cuts.

**The Trump administration and its attack on libraries is yet another part of the never-ending Republican Rip-Off.** These indiscriminate budget cuts are harmful and target key resources that many families in Northwest Washington rely on and benefit from. Protecting our access to information, resources, and community is crucial to our democracy. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

The Trump administration and its attack on libraries is yet another part of the never-ending Republican Rip-Off. These indiscriminate budget cuts are harmful and target key resources that many families in Northwest Washington rely on and benefit from. Protecting our access to information, resources, and community is crucial to our democracy. body:
I can’t thank you enough for having my back

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106969484/543195997/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE1MjU1ZS03YjI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQzl7R7rCb5KNZernPX5NuD4lC-g5XSYLvS1hdhs1kc=) I owe you a massive thank you. I know my team and I were reaching out, well, a lot ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline earlier this week. And today, I wanted to share some good news: Because of you and this incredible team of grassroots supporters, we hit our fundraising goal just a few minutes before midnight. Listen, this grassroots coalition has allowed me to win four consecutive, extremely competitive elections. But most importantly, the hard work and support of this team has given thousands of Kansans a voice in Congress — a voice I’ve proudly used to stand up to Donald Trump and fight like hell for working families across the state. Over the coming months, there is no doubt that we will face our fair share of challenges together. But with you in my corner, I know we’ll be able to move Kansas forward, despite all the forces that are trying to drag us backwards. I can’t thank you enough for having my back. [_**And if you didn’t get the chance to chip in last month, I’d be so, so grateful to have your support to help us kick off the new month on the right foot. I would never expect supporters like you to chip in to every email my team and I send out, but if it’s been a while, please know that your support really makes a difference in this fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106969485/543195998/-945052836?refcode=email_050225_Thank-you&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE1MjU1ZS03YjI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQzl7R7rCb5KNZernPX5NuD4lC-g5XSYLvS1hdhs1kc=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106969486/543195999/-945052836?refcode=email_050225_Thank-you&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE1MjU1ZS03YjI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQzl7R7rCb5KNZernPX5NuD4lC-g5XSYLvS1hdhs1kc=)

**[It's gotten so bad that the number two Senate Democrat, Dick Durbin, announced he's going to _QUIT_ rather than face the voters in the midterms!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=61df4b02aa7345b3ace08895b5fb9fb1&_e=v4CDcrcx3wdn8ya36Prs88bdTpfTt2PWlUFYsH7T0deximcrnTTZJfGRvLE-zAheDHu2GbOg5hLZGx4V8g67yzAC7aIiYwoVicg24_CnhbCXM6st8f0Tv6bnCXw5K7yRs49riuo_RiId7qghM9SHvXA1_TLY_ol3M4t8Tpr4K13TER4_Y3zh_3xlDz0y_hacjz8DIlEMur2KcV01w20HhvTGAsTS0mC6cdYfGgIG_5y0okX01ujGctDyoUhqT0NSzRbwvaxvQDDRkdjGBu1XHrgGW0c8bAsmY1sQC7cXfSfvJVfnadexiFGPBHw5yUxFdHxYG1OfbVcJx1kwsNaJ81GYAKkSelIeArrHBK463WH47ypMpgehovbPWU84yh7PyarfNPSc40Be4Dd9lpc6-RMRDiQiSq7HYKuD4kS1q4gG3Izbln8yF_X-6DhjHdCeeV5rB4ThdSblqZwb1XQqFXHIqjw5DeXTs1S2-i3QeXqN50nGMAs29pT0ZFw0KHaH)**
