# BLUE LETTER
`Independent Media For Just $1.50/Week!`
**We just launched our weekly Substack show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."** _**To celebrate, we 're offering**_ _**paid subscriptions for**_ _**just $1.50 per week!**_ **Please** **help us continue to** _**Amplify Good**_**by becoming a paid subscriber!**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.m9aLHaqP8GwpYxUHTLKbU_SiZF3OB8iFHD6bF1d8lZE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162690510)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62897d07-35c2-44f7-820b-2734caee4147?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Dumb & Comer: How Stansbury and Lynch Turned a MAGA Meltdown Into a Masterclass"
_Poor_ Jimbo-Billy-Bob Comer (R-KY). By this I mean the 1960s-Mississippi-Burning-effigy who plays a Republican "Representative" got exactly what he deserved in committee recently. This man who spent God-only-knows-how-much money chasing pics of Hunter Biden's penis--as Gimp to his [Dominant, Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/e0e8b74b-9b48-4b5b-a7d5-44fe678fe6ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in a pathetic, politicized attempt to harm Joe Biden politically--was flailing, interrupting, whining & launching spittle rockets more durable than SpaceX ([not that hard, tbh](https://substack.com/redirect/f29af1ee-4a89-41b0-a8a3-7b8ffc790fef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
To sum it up, the Chair of The House Government Oversight Committee, who presumably knows the rules re not interrupting committee members during their *time* to speak, just kinda felt like being an asshole. It's what happens [when one tries to defend cutting over $4 billion from VA health care](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1c621d-cb19-44c7-a936-50b7a898c40e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Yes, veterans, those who risked their lives for Comer's right to recite Putin talking points on command. Comer even mocked the $4B number like it was nothing, all while [Trump's charged ](https://substack.com/redirect/d55c5783-4281-4c7b-934e-4b822e98c4db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[US](https://substack.com/redirect/d55c5783-4281-4c7b-934e-4b822e98c4db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[$26 million, so far, for golf](https://substack.com/redirect/d55c5783-4281-4c7b-934e-4b822e98c4db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The tip of Trump's corruption iceberg.
Also, and I know this will SHOCK(!) you to your very core, but The Clownship Comer was so unprepared for the hearing, [it was downright second-hand embarrassing](https://substack.com/redirect/4d04ea4d-9962-44bf-b6a9-5ea22b5a325f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). At one point during this Democratic tour de force, rising star, Rep. Melanie Stansbury (D-NM,) crushed colic Comer like a MAGA-voting farmer. Hell, [he looked so lost I thought he might request a lifeline](https://substack.com/redirect/da681b87-e4ee-4cd6-b43a-107e174c934e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Or ask if he could call a friend.
Yes, James Richardson Comer, Jr. was the kid who forgot his book report, **so he couldn 't let Democrats speak, lest they share facts and cite studies to which he'd have to coherently respond**. Yet, speak Democrats still did. Result: cretin-Comer got just clobbered by [Stansbury](https://substack.com/redirect/6cf08e9c-0433-40d5-80c2-df942386193f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _But, hey, we 're not done yet!_ Rep. Stephen Lynch (D-MA) also wanted in on the party--providing [a one-two intellectual punch that transformed Comer the pudgy dingus into a MAGA mascot](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1c621d-cb19-44c7-a936-50b7a898c40e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at a Mensa meeting.
Jimmy-Boy, who perpetually looks like he's about to demand a refund at a Cracker Barrel, tried trotting out his usual conspiracy-laced nonsense, only to have [Stansbury calmly nuke it with facts, and Lynch follow up like a political bouncer](https://substack.com/redirect/7c1c621d-cb19-44c7-a936-50b7a898c40e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) escorting him back into reality. I could share the bigger wallops, but thar wouldn't do the tone of creepy Comer's beatdown justice. Below's the video in all its schadenfreude-y glory:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/be84ce28-741b-46fc-b0a3-883b2299ad6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It was, as [truculent Trump The Inept](https://substack.com/redirect/b89205ee-8362-4f4f-bbdf-6c2c41b48578?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) might say "the most beautiful hearing anyone's ever seen!" Though it was less hearing, more civic autopsy, exposing conman Comer's entire schtick as bad-faith performance artist. A Kentucky Fried fool, equal parts [Fox News audition](https://substack.com/redirect/00bc8290-679e-4d5e-bc0b-04e8fbaa42a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and drunk uncle you seat in the corner at Thanksgiving.
Key to this, as we know, this behavior becomes a virtuous cycle. Example: Leader Hakeem Jeffries would not have responded to oleaginous ogre, Ted Cruz, in this manner as recently as a year ago. But, as Deadpool would say, we've hit "Fuck It."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/496ce566-102c-420f-891c-b1e4cadf4ed2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And before the cynics say this doesn't matter, blah blah blah--**all of this MATTERS**. _**When you treat the arguments of those who operate in 100% bad faith as legitimate and actually debate them, you render them legitimate to the viewing audience.[When you mock them mercilessly and tear them a new one, you send a very opposite message](https://substack.com/redirect/7a20f907-8760-48ee-bb98-1c1fc27ac8c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ about who's authentic, will use their power and won't back down.
Courage is contagious. So is cowardice. [The more Republicans are wrecked in front of cameras](https://substack.com/redirect/99d3fdd3-37be-49e8-b071-34ce72953a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we [protest in huge numbers](https://substack.com/redirect/6c349ac0-1ac3-487c-8b09-5178ba7a7090?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Democrats filibuster, go on _more_ tours to speak to audiences across the country about Trump's unique combination of incompetence, cruelty & corruption, televise shadow cabinet meetings with popular policy proposals, propose legislation on said policy--the more we win. At this point the entire GOP agenda is poison, their messengers even worse. We just must step into the breach, project confidence, message every single damn day and take control of the narrative.
We do this, the electoral blowouts headed our way this year and next will be epic. (more on this in a coming column I'll be co-authoring).
* * *
### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_

* You'll wanna pay close attention to Gov. J.B. Pritzker of Illinois if you aren't yet. _He 's met this moment_. A Kentucky Fried fool, equal parts and drunk uncle you seat in the corner at Thanksgiving. Key to this, as we know, this behavior becomes a virtuous cycle. Calling all Pennsylvanians who want to learn about the stakes of this primary and our part in building political power that lets us call the shots so our communities can thrive.
[RSVP Here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106969860/543197413/210864258?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxMjQ1NjliLTdjMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe6ogdvb0rvwkHWqI6WbyG6Y0bofJi4wGkqPVdUv_p4=&emci=57857691-7627-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f124569b-7c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669#/registration)

# 5/20 — Last chance to vote in the primary!
There are plenty of ways to vote and vote early. Election Day is Tuesday, May 20 and 8PM will be your last chance to make your voice heard at the ballot box.
[MAKE A VOTING PLAN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106969863/543197416/1012759085?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250502_rsvp_save_team_oc_act_xx_sbt&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250502_rsvp_save_team_oc_act_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxMjQ1NjliLTdjMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe6ogdvb0rvwkHWqI6WbyG6Y0bofJi4wGkqPVdUv_p4=&emci=57857691-7627-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f124569b-7c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669)

name: Voter Verification 2025 Polling Team
subject: This is not a drill, friend
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204n15zcdwcoyp7wz6q2t3srblgyey8shgpc3yyz0t2e2gnx6r0dherw5mspb397or9triwdqkkkovvic5g&__stmp=svnat4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzewxd0yyj5zkj4carmysrmkk4vr3hhr45uehzns12a5b44qcrt4om677ii5d5ajm6n1ai7o9z9kdvb3d4q2s8ap51mkq32vsojmjli6kwa30fuo7nzim69p2a9quxcck1e8p4oin53e7smpmn14&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzewxd0yyj5zkj4carmysrml7dxhnzf9i2c8wfb37rm0vqgosz4mufybqrlh7d3l63ppbrz7on4m3zqkw9tk2gk3fk3jn1pvp3e5etifn0bxnd7v98duj5hydxvnlrmnmntx5wli66ftb5pa7lts&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svnat4&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
| |

Alluding to Chilean Fascist Dictator Pinochet’s notorious ‘death flights’ where he is suggesting migrant accused of crimes (not convicted) be killed in this fashion. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUzMzEwMjg3NTg1MzQ2NTcwLFwiclwiOjE1MzMxMDMxNDkzNzQ1MTgxOX0iLCJzIjoiZmRiNTJjY2ZiYjY5MWJlZSJ9)

| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUzMzEwMjg3NTkzNzM1MTgxLFwiclwiOjE1MzMxMDMxNDkzNzQ1MTgxOX0iLCJzIjoiZjliMzQwN2YxMDA2OTllZCJ9)
---
| Team,

Today marks the _102nd day_ of Trump's second term.****

So far we've seen green card holders deported to foreign torture prisons, the termination of 100k+ nonpartisan civil servants, and the elevation of white supremacists to the highest levels of power. Sadly, even bleaker stories await.

name: Team Kelly
subject: [SIGNATURE] Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team —
With times as tough as they are now, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
In 2020, hundreds of thousands of people signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022.
It meant the world to us, and to Mark.
Now, he needs our help again. He’s got a new mission: _Holding the Trump Administration accountable, combating Elon Musk’s illegal actions, and getting the next generation of leaders elected to the United States Senate._
**And today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he’s got a big team backing him up.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_em_may25/?source=em250502-1-90&akid=6059%2E6688874%2Eog_igg)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_em_may25/?source=em250502-1-90&akid=6059%2E6688874%2Eog_igg)**
With so much happening now, this might seem like an insignificant action. But in times like these, everything we do matters.
When you join the thousands of others who have endorsed Mark, it helps us put together a team from coast to coast that can do incredible things. It’s bigger than any one of us, and it sends an important message.
Actions like this are how we’ll get through this — how we’ll turn the tide.
Together.
[**So, please, hit this link and personally endorse Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_em_may25/?source=em250502-1-90&akid=6059%2E6688874%2Eog_igg)
Thank you!
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_em_may25/?source=em250502-1-90&akid=6059%2E6688874%2Eog_igg)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6059%2E6688874%2Eog_igg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

**I’m fighting day and night in Washington for CA-27, but we won’t be able to fully stop their agenda without a House majority.** That’s why your early support means so much, and as one of the only Democrats to flip a GOP-held seat back in November, I’ve become an early target.

George

subject: Will you sign the petition?

body:
| | | You've probably heard the **embarrassing** news, my friend! A Milwaukee County judge, Hannah Dugan, has been **ARRESTED** by the FBI for helping an illegal alien **ESCAPE** from ICE agents. **I am starting a petition to make sure Judge Dugan is held accountable to the full extent of the law.**

A former judge in New Mexico was also arrested for destroying evidence to help a suspected member of a Venezuelan gang. What is happening to our country?** Our institutions are in place to protect LAW-ABIDING Americans, not harbor criminals and illegal immigrants. I believe in the rule of law. I believe that our families deserve safety, laws deserve respect, and that our judges should enforce the law – NOT UNDERMINE IT. Thank you, Glenn Grothman** | | FOLLOW GLENN ON SOCIAL MEDIA! | | | | ---|---|---|--- Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. subject: ICYMI: The GOP is failing us! See our email from April 29th...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Team Imer PAC and is not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
The Colorado GOP, and the RNC are not doing enough to win the 2026 midterms, we must step up and take action...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U-vVhgqw8ICqsewwHVfzuvUnHoq1HFEfeB5SgktrmQadXXkWvr_MicvMW8riro3PNRC53jx2i-CUmlRLKoiFoV1uqyo6FfcH-qXGecvtXZEmWBQqraWjTteS6MZkm0eyCfz0DqnEAa7rpvAG_iRh45mEtmUMZkJDWCHN-9WnnyGxE9M8RRgAwt-A-Y-j25zV&c=SEOvyf9Z5xPnG21ugGmEOa8Fg8qJSxPg56drXq0MdE2LS5T_GKKaZw==&ch=u9Sn9S19-TUdoo268T35C0m3LiLqi3IOTu18bWuv22rLS69fFX2G9Q==)
---
---
| Friend,
The Colorado GOP is silent, the RNC is silent, the Grand Old Party is failing us all!
Tomorrow is May 1st, and that means the 2026 midterm races are in full swing. Our majorities in the US House and the US Senate are at risk if we do not activate, engage, and turn out our voters to secure our majorities.
In Colorado, we have seen disastrous policies like SB-003 that will strip the ability to obtain firearms from law-abiding citizens, as well as laws that endanger parental rights, and policies that encourage the transing of our youth.
During all of this, the party has been silent, even going so far as to say that they "are not lobbyists" and cannot engage in policy activism.
Basically, they refuse to stand up to the uniparty cabal that controls Colorado, because THEY ARE PART OF IT!
---
| |
---
| Standing up for the Second Amendment is not lobbying, standing up for Parental Rights is not lobbying, and standing up for our basic civil rights is not lobbying.
Standing up to the Radical Left is a fundamental principle of the Republican Party.
Meanwhile, the RNC is enabling our globalist, uniparty leadership and is refusing to stand up to them.
These basic tasks seem too much for the GOP to handle...
It is clear that if we want to protect our majorities and secure President Trump the ability to deliver on the America First agenda, we must do the work ourselves.
We are here to tell you that we have a plan and are charting a path forward that is America First, pro-Trump, and anti-establishment.
Here at Team Imer PAC, we are committed to doing what the GOP will not do: support grassroots, conservative candidates in races across the country, including Colorado.
But we cannot do this without supporters like you, who are sick and tired of the do-nothing leadership we are stuck with.
To achieve this, we need your financial support.
We are asking the hard-working men and women who believe in the America First movement to join us in this fight!
Will you help us fight back against the establishment and contribute any amount today?
---

clean_body: The Colorado GOP, and the RNC are not doing enough to win the 2026 midterms, we must step up and take action... | | | | | == | Friend, The Colorado GOP is silent, the RNC is silent, the Grand Old Party is failing us all! Tomorrow is May 1st, and that means the 2026 midterm races are in full swing. Our majorities in the US House and the US Senate are at risk if we do not activate, engage, and turn out our voters to secure our majorities. In Colorado, we have seen disastrous policies like SB-003 that will strip the ability to obtain firearms from law-abiding citizens, as well as laws that endanger parental rights, and policies that encourage the transing of our youth. During all of this, the party has been silent, even going so far as to say that they "are not lobbyists" and cannot engage in policy activism. Basically, they refuse to stand up to the uniparty cabal that controls Colorado, because THEY ARE PART OF IT! | | | Standing up for the Second Amendment is not lobbying, standing up for Parental Rights is not lobbying, and standing up for our basic civil rights is not lobbying. Standing up to the Radical Left is a fundamental principle of the Republican Party. Meanwhile, the RNC is enabling our globalist, uniparty leadership and is refusing to stand up to them. These basic tasks seem too much for the GOP to handle... It is clear that if we want to protect our majorities and secure President Trump the ability to deliver on the America First agenda, we must do the work ourselves. We are here to tell you that we have a plan and are charting a path forward that is America First, pro-Trump, and anti-establishment. Here at Team Imer PAC, we are committed to doing what the GOP will not do: support grassroots, conservative candidates in races across the country, including Colorado. But we cannot do this without supporters like you, who are sick and tired of the do-nothing leadership we are stuck with. To achieve this, we need your financial support. We are asking the hard-working men and women who believe in the America First movement to join us in this fight! Will you help us fight back against the establishment and contribute any amount today? | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | We need Conservatives like you to join us in this fight, and we need your help now more than ever! We have a state and country to save and a future to protect for our children and grandchildren. Will you be part of this movement? | Our Best, | Team Imer PAC | | == | | == | == == == == | == | This email was Paid for by the Team Imer PAC and is not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. www.TeamImer.com This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC, with authorization and approval by Team Imer PAC. | | | | Team Imer PAC | 16606 W 9th Ave | Golden, CO 80401 US | | | | | | |

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A sham investigation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I believe strongly in the power of grassroots movements.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4695%2E35263%2EuBSInH)
Hey Peter, A few weeks ago, Donald Trump ordered the Justice Department to begin an investigation of ActBlue, a major grassroots donation platform for Democratic campaigns — including my own. Let me be clear: **Trump’s investigation is a sham about suppressing free speech and weaponizing the government against his political opponents.** Donald Trump would rather leave power in the hands of the ultra-wealthy than in the small-dollar, grassroots donors. By limiting how and when grassroots supporters — including people like you, Peter — can chip in and support campaigns they believe in, your power to impact elections is diminished._**And that’s not how our democracy works.**_ I believe strongly in the power of grassroots movements. It’s how I was first elected to the Senate, and it’s how I was re-elected last year in one of the closest races around the country. **[I’m fighting back against Trump’s sham investigation, and I hope you will chip in your support to show Trump that you stand on the side of the grassroots movement.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4695%2E35263%2EuBSInH)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-may25.N_R_0O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4695%2E35263%2EuBSInH)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Stephen Miller just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down.

| Hi friend, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.

Last weekend, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer.

That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care.

**Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106972595/543207022/2142918278?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250502_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjg3ZDg1Yi04MTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkvTBF8bS9pdDxd2KvnG_HM46cs9dtEFsSKB9fQ--CQ=)****Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans.

The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it.

**I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers.**

**[Will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $10 between me and New Dems right now? clean_body: No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. | Hi friend, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Last weekend, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer. That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care. Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me. what Stephen is doing here. He doesn’t actually care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans. The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it. I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and New Dems will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you. name: Mark Warner
subject: I just called for an investigation into Elon Musk:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106972651/543207140/1894416887?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MuskInvestigation_250502_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM4MzY3Ni04MTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSPrQgVZ-99r1IdlX6QL4AlyVlUEVkM6t6v6379Mk8U=) Derek —

Today, I led a coalition of my colleagues in the Senate to demand Donald Trump investigate Elon Musk and the allegations that he has used his government role to improperly advance his personal business interests abroad.

Recent reporting uncovered a shocking pattern. Musk allegedly leveraged high-level access to U.S. trade policy to pressure foreign governments — including India, South Africa, Bangladesh, Vietnam, Pakistan, and Lesotho — into granting favorable treatment to his satellite internet provider Starlink in apparent exchange for U.S. policy concessions.

**Derek — if Elon Musk used his extraordinary level of access and power in the White House for his own private business ventures — it would constitute a serious violation of federal ethics laws and a profound breach of public trust.**

My Democratic colleagues and I will continue to use every resource and platform available to us to get to the bottom of this and demand accountability from the Trump administration.

I strongly urge my friends on the other side of the aisle to use their voices as well during this truly unprecedented time in Washington. We must all stand up, speak out, and fight back.

Thank you for being in this fight with me,

Mark Warner
Mark Warner is leading the fight against Elon Musk and Donald Trump — but that makes him a target in next year’s election.

We need to be prepared for Musk, Trump, and their allies to spend millions of dollars against Mark next year.

[_**Please make a grassroots donation of any amount to help Mark Warner fight back, hold his seat, and flip the Senate blue >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106972652/543207141/1894416887?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MuskInvestigation_250502_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM4MzY3Ni04MTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSPrQgVZ-99r1IdlX6QL4AlyVlUEVkM6t6v6379Mk8U=)

name: Angie Craig
subject: I'm running, Peter!
body:
It’s official, Peter: I’m launching my campaign to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate.
In a moment, I’ll share more about why I’m running. But if you’re ready to help power my campaign to take on the toughest fights in Washington, will you split a donation of $20 amount between The Real Texas PAC and me toward my $1 million Launch Week Goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?refcode=050125_2]
Button [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?refcode=050125_2]
Growing up, I never even dreamed I’d get into politics. I was raised by a single mom in a mobile home park. I watched my mom work hard and complete her teaching degree over nine years while raising us kids.
We lived just a few doors down from my grandmother, who worked into her 70s. I’ll never forget her advice:
“No matter what work you do, always do more than what they ask of you.”
I looked to those words as my guide as I worked my way through college and to help lead a major Minnesota manufacturing company.
And I’ve kept that advice in mind during my six plus years in the House representing Minnesota’s 2nd District — successfully capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare.
I’m proud of my record in Congress. But now, I’m ready to take my fight to the Senate, where I can give all Minnesotans a voice.
It’s never been more important to hold the powerful accountable, Peter .
The Trump administration is running roughshod over the middle class — working overtime for the drug companies, billionaires and Washington special interests.
And out-of-control, unelected billionaire Elon Musk is trying to take over our government — and burn it to the ground.
Donald Trump is trampling on our rights and freedoms — as he profits for personal gain.
And a cowardly Republican Party is rolling over and letting it all happen.
I know I can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate — but I’ll need your grassroots support. This Senate race could be the most expensive in Minnesota history — and I already hold that record in the House — and Elon Musk has already pledged a massive $100 million to flip seats like this one. Election experts are even calling this race a toss-up.
We can’t afford for a Republican to win this seat and be a rubber stamp for the destructive MAGA agenda. I’m asking you personally, Peter : Can you split a donation of any amount between The Real Texas PAC and my campaign to help build a strong foundation for the race ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?refcode=050125_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Angie Craig and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?express_lane=true&refcode=050125_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?express_lane=true&refcode=050125_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?express_lane=true&refcode=050125_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?express_lane=true&refcode=050125_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?express_lane=true&refcode=050125_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?refcode=050125_2&amount=25]
Let’s win this,
Angie Craig
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?refcode=050125_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-angiecraig?refcode=050125_2]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=cg8caArXWqsy2L9G6DGh%2FpYmJbC%2BXvYPf0X1t9%2BWf0NK1PA9o48C08d4n5JDPRNXm%2B9BSbehKeP9i9b03ZWGIfonqkvAvHzqzvtEH6eKgAzu7VY4DXxaCXwL7M9NYTqwAnRcpHQh8WL%2B0YYekJlBeGYA2SQs3vEe1q7P%2FGXfLQbXQdy47CdMwhJqxetcGMfvx2Zsq0L0GvLpPAhft9PaEt6%2FyiFAoL4uzovNsmN5b6SdnHZNGVhHiRJOmexsFeWX1OD9LqW6Y5KQjr2rJFtEvmZVgmVzzEutsjOYCO76Mp7dPtwahfaCDicAqD6hUcW1YckREXJ13pLGhl5JlllYCv2QEZ9YuSzuK%2F85ZiAUsQBcumhAHnFFTVjb2hDK5OK8Y7PoOnE5BCW7VgnpQBzmic4KiiT3cX58N2uXibx0LZI%3D .

name: Team Heartland Patriots
subject: what happened to online fundraising last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
A couple things that had a major impact
#
Peter,
Last month, we emailed you about how our online fundraising had slowed way down.
**But today, we want to show you what happened and explain why it matters.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88283?refcode=em20250502-8911&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8911%2E614464%2E6mv5r_)
A couple of things happened in April that had a major impact on grassroots fundraising:
1. Trump’s chaotic tariff announcements
2. The fallout from Trump’s chaotic tariff announcements

The announcements, and the weeks of economic uncertainty that followed in America, made political donations understandably low priority for so many people just trying to afford the basics like rent or groceries or childcare.
So, as you can see in the graph above, our total fundraising in April took a hit.
Many other movements and campaigns that primarily rely on grassroots donations experienced the same thing — and over the coming months, as we live through the consequences of Trump’s tariffs, this trend is likely to continue.
**If you can’t make a donation today or even this month, we don’t blame you at all.[But if you can, and if you’re ready to elect candidates who will _actually_ work to bring industry back to America without causing widespread panic and uncertainty, please consider making a donation of $10 or whatever works best for you today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88283?refcode=em20250502-8911&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8911%2E614464%2E6mv5r_)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=11&akid=8911%2E614464%2E6mv5r_). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
clean_body: A couple things that had a major impact Peter, Last month, we emailed you about how our online fundraising had slowed way down. But today, we want to show you what happened and explain why it matters. A couple of things happened in April that had a major impact on grassroots fundraising: 1. Trump’s chaotic tariff announcements 2. The fallout from Trump’s chaotic tariff announcements The announcements, and the weeks of economic uncertainty that followed in America, made political donations understandably low priority for so many people just trying to afford the basics like rent or groceries or childcare. So, as you can see in the graph above, our total fundraising in April took a hit. Many other movements and campaigns that primarily rely on grassroots donations experienced the same thing — and over the coming months, as we live through the consequences of Trump’s tariffs, this trend is likely to continue. If you can’t make a donation today or even this month, we don’t blame you at all. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Whether you’re able to donate today or not, we want you to know that you are supporting this movement simply by opening this email, sharing our message, or supporting the candidates you care about however you can. Thanks for doing your part, Peter. Team Heartland Patriots | | Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Derek Tran
subject: From Cerritos to the USS Midway: Our month in review.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106973049/543208622/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2M2Q3NzgtODIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pEGlbsZjnlWD80p5-zGt0hmhGkcnRM1ES8baR4DY15w=)
I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.

The support you’ve shown, whether you made a donation or just helped spread the word about our race, is what’s keeping our campaign going. I wouldn’t be in this fight without you.

It’s been a busy month on the ground here in CA-45, and a chaotic one in Washington. As the Trump administration stumbles from scandal to scandal, we’ve stayed focused on what actually matters: showing up, listening, and leading with a spirit of service and accountability.

Below are a few highlights from this past month. I hope you enjoy the updates, and if we haven’t yet met on the trail, I hope we get the chance to soon!
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106973050/543208623/2039042026?refcode=em-5.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2M2Q3NzgtODIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pEGlbsZjnlWD80p5-zGt0hmhGkcnRM1ES8baR4DY15w=)**
---

* * *

**I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund!** With so much dysfunction in Washington, we can’t afford to lose focus on clean air, clean water, and green jobs -- for our kids, for our future, and for the health of our communities in Los Angeles and Orange Counties.

**I hosted two in-person town halls in Buena Park and Cerritos.** We discussed everything from affordable housing to standing up to the administration’s cruel attacks on working families. While Republicans dodge their constituents, I’ll always show up and take tough questions. That’s the job.

**It was an honor to speak aboard the USS Midway to mark the 50th anniversary of the fall of Saigon and Operation Frequent Wind** , which helped evacuate thousands of Vietnamese civilians at the end of the war. As the son of refugees, this moment was deeply personal. I’ll never forget the courage of those who made it possible for my family -- and so many others -- to chase the American dream.

**I joined a national town hall on CNN to talk about the state of our union.** My message was simple: the American people want leadership that’s on the side of working families, not billionaires. The Trump administration is failing that test, and I’m fighting to create a government that works for the people who make this country run.

We’ve got big goals ahead, and the truth is that keeping this seat blue in 2026 won’t be easy. We flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes, and the Republican machine is already gearing up to take it back.

**[If you didn’t get a chance to chip in last month, I hope you’ll consider making a grassroots donation to help us kick off May on strong footing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106973051/543208624/2039042026?refcode=em-5.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2M2Q3NzgtODIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pEGlbsZjnlWD80p5-zGt0hmhGkcnRM1ES8baR4DY15w=)**

Thanks again for being in this with me.

-Derek
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106973052/543208625/2039042026?refcode=em-5.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2M2Q3NzgtODIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pEGlbsZjnlWD80p5-zGt0hmhGkcnRM1ES8baR4DY15w=)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Sign on to protect the USPS from privatization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Listen -- the Postal Service is a constitutional promise, a critical part of our public infrastructure, our economy, and one of the most beloved and trusted public institutions in American life. It delivers to over 168 million addresses every single day, and employs more than 630,000 people in a postal workforce where nearly 30% are Black, and over 40% are women.
This isn't something to be privatized and gutted for parts like a private equity vulture. The USPS is a crucial public service.
Help save the USPS: Tell your representatives in Congress to stop Trump's privatization plan ASAP >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=jTX3xJ+XaePOvfV1uKIJDYJdP9wzA6TGmq2zOwlqLN2+JOzPMUmiOF++NzV/x0G+eBLTOOoKUGc70UV5nFGzrs/U1Kiu4H6p2jGuu291JOY=]
Folks -- We know Donald Trump is attempting to take over the United States Postal Service and make it part of the Commerce Department. But now we know his true endgame.
Trump and his greedy billionaire buddies on Wall Street are trying to fully privatize the USPS. Their goal is simple: break it apart, and sell it off for its parts to the highest corporate bidder that has zero interest in continuing to serve every ZIP code.
Now, we have a real opportunity to have Congress take a stand and vow to stop Trump’s USPS privatization plan and save the people’s post office .
Almost 200 members of Congress have already co-sponsored bipartisan resolutions that would draw a clear line in the sand that Congress intends to take every measure to ensure the Postal Service remains an independent public institution.
Tell your representatives in Congress to support the bipartisan bills in the House and Senate to stop this shady privatization scheme before it's too late >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 reaffirm the founding principle that the USPS exists to serve the people, not greedy corporate billionaires . These resolutions are proof that protecting our public post office is a bipartisan concern, with support from Democrats and Republicans alike. From Republican Rep. Don Bacon and Sen. Thom Tillis, to Democratic Sen. Maggie Hassan and Rep. Gerry Connolly, lawmakers across deep red and blue districts are rejecting privatization.
Leaders in both political parties know exactly who privatization would hurt: rural families, veterans, seniors, postal workers, Black-owned small businesses, Indigenous communities, and many more. The loss of the people’s post office and the public services it provides to folks across the country would be devastating.
Trump and his billionaire cronies tried dismantling the post office for their own profit before -- and we stopped them . But now they’re back with an even more aggressive plan. We can’t stay silent, Congress must hear from us that we will not allow a hostile takeover of the people’s post office to succeed. The damage will be irreversible.
Congress must act before it’s too late. This is our chance to once again show Wall Street our broad, bipartisan support for the defense of the Postal Service from being gutted for corporate gain.
Urge your members of Congress to co-sponsor and pass bipartisan H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 to stop Trump's privatization plan now! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=jTX3xJ+XaePOvfV1uKIJDYJdP9wzA6TGmq2zOwlqLN2+JOzPMUmiOF++NzV/x0G+eBLTOOoKUGc70UV5nFGzrs/U1Kiu4H6p2jGuu291JOY= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=jTX3xJ+XaePOvfV1uKIJDYJdP9wzA6TGmq2zOwlqLN2+JOzPMUmiOF++NzV/x0G+eBLTOOoKUGc70UV5nFGzrs/U1Kiu4H6p2jGuu291JOY=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=jTX3xJ+XaePOvfV1uKIJDYJdP9wzA6TGmq2zOwlqLN2+JOzPMUmiOF++NzV/x0G+eBLTOOoKUGc70UV5nFGzrs/U1Kiu4H6p2jGuu291JOY=]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=GRm%2FoukyJDgeZocKlUGBYIrRxC6gir01DL4xN1vniJmHX2XZW8jhwM9lw%2FpbH6mHyc%2BvXFgxbasrarnBpn5bWwEM2zNb1VM0gsIctxBxwy%2FRXo0AEVdRMT11jLVfDH5ZcmxDiVyR%2B5IUxRo1stx8%2F0EJg6aufEeJ0ni44Z%2BLytQY7hnhfsnGGBGwm7HUKxHU3tdpAgT25QbV9P5NAgcw7D2dILuVLUtzvJza%2BSNQMNo6eRYPG%2FChQLaR2UUYhishsLbRLABwnEJMmTLDZW5BtGrpbWzbB0nEAF7w61CEzRTXex2TLz8BQhQXgqgiQZDr4Kc2D%2Beg3wMs7psgAkxFLzV4HGo5aqrCAUI8G%2Fnxyh9K4eEq8B0Ru3%2FmxFivVN3wCBuzI5Laf1G5mDB6QalJ%2BAiAGcft0eg7R1I5SXC6rW0%3D .

Congress must act before it’s too late. This is our chance to once again show Wall Street our broad, bipartisan support for the defense of the Postal Service from being gutted for corporate gain. Urge your members of Congress to co-sponsor and pass bipartisan H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 to stop Trump's privatization plan now! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Peter,

Three years ago on this day, the draft opinion of the Dobbs decision was leaked to the public.

Weeks later, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade — ripping away bodily autonomy, personal choice, and reproductive healthcare from millions of Americans.

Today, three years later, we’re living with the horrific consequences. Women have limited access to abortion in 19 states, with no exceptions for rape or incest in 12 states. 380 bills have been introduced across the country to restrict reproductive care and countless women have died as a result of these extreme measures.

But the story doesn’t end here — Republicans are trying to further undermine our freedoms by attacking access to IVF, contraception, and more.

As a member of the Pro-Choice Caucus and Democratic Women’s Caucus, I’m fighting back in Congress to stop these attacks on our bodily autonomy and pass legislation to restore reproductive healthcare nationwide and defend access to contraception.

This is a fight for our rights, our bodies, and our futures — and I’m in this for the long haul, Peter. name: Maxwell Frost
subject: Are you still with me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/yxx67Mbprh2CexOfEQp_NQ~~/AAPPABA~/uJASrTDVpU1kWsVfOPlK7Fds6t0NE3hQDXJ269tAWKKkMD6qMr3jzY_2aY7gUy8whha_OMiTjQCckMc6D4FZpTkRjKZKXdbWaVoHNfkW6uP575mBds1-d_Ku1CdjaCWEevjhliZ2PW6f9x8nLVodXTU-36jF7DCTisbeT9-MfP7P2-9_NExRCYyVHHe6taQagtph1gpkv9rEWTL2Bhlj_aiAxR2MEvb20D1-Cu9sUR05uz-Njk_Xko0zrC4phYbpzbcmfvK3Q9biaxprodImJZVL3qn4TJ-LEL9grQYrRCM8qxVw8Zfb_DRGdjkbnRjztWa2HRG-zKMPiJ21VqPcLi7EBjxCRb0IUV4ZaIhguSc~)

| **Are you still with me, Peter?** I’m checking in because I know that a _lot_ has happened this year... and it's only May. I know that people are seeing their healthcare, retirement security, and job protections get stripped away to make room for billionaire tax breaks. I know that this administration's mass deportation plan is disrupting communities and turning neighbors against each other. And I know that fascists in Tallahassee and D.C. are pushing the limits of their power, and will _keep_ pushing until people either accept their extremism or give up. **But Peter, I want YOU to know that I’m standing ten toes down against this cruelty. And I need you to stand with me.** **The beginning of a new month is our chance to show the world that one election didn’t defeat our movement, and _every_ donation powers our comeback.** [**_So Peter, if you’re still with me, will you please donate whatever you can by midnight to send a message that our movement is still strong? name: David Flippo
subject: The Law Applies to Everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
I’ll stand with President Trump to hold corrupt judges accountable. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f99f6a1ba98a/welcome-to-team-flippo-10337464?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=675bf500c3&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Friend,
---
| **President Trump is doing what the American people have been demanding for years: draining the swamp and enforcing the law**—even when it means **holding activist judges accountable.**

One radical Left judge in Milwaukee and another in New Mexico were arrested for allegedly helping illegal immigrants and gang members evade federal authorities.

These judges weren’t protecting justice—**they were undermining it.**
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=20cf734ed9&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Let me be clear: **No one is above the law.**
We need more **Constitutional fighters in Congress who are fully on board with President Trump’s mission to secure our border **and to clean up our broken system.

**That is exactly why I’m running.** We cannot allow radical judges to use the gavel for their own political benefit. But my campaign cannot win with the right ideas alone.

**Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today so my campaign can hold corrupt officials accountable and send a clear message that Nevada is DONE with lawless leadership?**
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=fc39edfe03&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Every dollar helps my campaign power our mission to **restore law and order, defend our Constitution, and protect Nevada families.**

Let’s remind Washington D.C. that justice is __**not**__ optional.
---
| For Nevada,

David Flippo
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=bbe18775d6&e=273c9a71fb)**_

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria is living rent-free in their heads.
#
Fox News launched an all out assault on Alexandria when she was first elected — running negative segments about her for 42 days straight, roughly 75 times per day.1
It’s happening again: Fox News has mentioned Alexandria **every single day** since the Fighting Oligarchy Tour began six weeks ago.
**The MAGA movement is scared**. And Alexandria is living rent-free in their heads.
They know that our movement will not comply with Donald Trump and his billionaire donors turning this country into their personal slush fund.
They're terrified that hundreds of thousands of people across this country have stood up to agree with Alexandria and Bernie. **And we're just getting started**.
[Will you chip in $5 today to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? Every dollar keeps us on Fox News mind while we mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.** **[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250502.LW10T0&refcode=em20250502-8749-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8749%2E2526796%2EYB6riy)** **What's happening right now is special**. Everyday people are coming together to defend democracy, fight for one another, and build a better future for all. Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with us. Onward, Team AOC

1 - [**AP News** : Study: Fox News is obsessed with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32481?t=21&akid=8749%2E2526796%2EYB6riy)

# [From Virtuous to Vicious: Self-Fulfilling Dynamics During the NFL Draft](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162661687&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjYxNjg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyMTA2NDIsImV4cCI6MTc0ODgwMjY0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.P2Qovx4FEjbjaox7cQRmJNkaiKnRMSS-1buj_K26YnM)
### Exploring the anatomy of a hype bubble
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| May 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162661687&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjYxNjg3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjIxMDY0MiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4ODAyNjQyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.u1yc9RQSTnqT45L7J59loa0ZH_RTPg2WAiMJb1crufA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162661687&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjYxNjg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyMTA2NDIsImV4cCI6MTc0ODgwMjY0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.P2Qovx4FEjbjaox7cQRmJNkaiKnRMSS-1buj_K26YnM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/from-virtuous-to-vicious-self-fulfilling?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a376c7e8-3f57-4342-a07c-72d576902e0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On the first night of the NFL Draft, the entire sports world sat enraptured as Colorado State star quarterback Shedeur Sanders - the son of NFL legend Deion Sanders - was passed over repeatedly as team after team opted for other athletes. At the end of the night, he still had not been picked; he was also passed over during the second and third rounds. It wasn't until the final day of the draft that he was finally chosen, in the fifth round, the 144th overall pick. Projected to be one of the top prospects at the top position in the sport, it is perhaps the most spectacular drop in the history of the NFL draft.
As one who has studied and [written](https://substack.com/redirect/529302d3-836b-47f5-a9d7-3fb26acba692?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about financial bubbles, I was fascinated by the way this all played out. While the sports world scratched its collective head and apoplectic sports analysts lost their minds, blaming everything from stupidity to collusion to racism, I concluded the Shedeur Sanders hype was a bubble, and on draft night, it popped.
**The Shedeur Sanders hype was a bubble, and on draft night, it popped.**
My 2011 book, _**BOOMBUSTOLOGY: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_ , suggested using multiple lenses to analyze a situation might reveal bubbly dynamics in action. And in fact, applying some of these lenses to the Sanders situation suggest the bubble analogy holds.
One of the hallmarks of almost all bubbles is a self-fulfilling dynamic that ultimately proves unsustainable. What does that mean in plain English? Well, if higher prices lead to more demand which leads to higher prices, either the item of value will approach infinite value, or it's a bubble about to burst. Well, did Sanders have any self-fulfilling dynamics?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/adb78846-680a-4d45-ac14-16cc5e653cee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: "**The long wait is over: Shedeur Sanders drafted by Cleveland in fifth round " LA Times, April 26, 2025: [https://www.latimes.com/sports/story/2025-04-26/shedeur-sanders-selected-nfl-draft](https://substack.com/redirect/7677d0b7-a2a9-4883-92f5-2d34f0e7f0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Prior to the draft, speculation about Sanders dominated the news. To say that his father is a high-profile figure would be putting it mildly. Deion Sanders long ago mastered the art of commanding the spotlight and managing the media circus. Colorado State - where the elder Sanders is the football coach - isn't considered one of the top football schools in the country. The celebrity of Deion Sanders brought a lot of attention to the school, and to his son. Each news story upped the ante; coverage begot coverage, hype begot hype. He was increasingly [ranked](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd5adf9-4ac8-4c3e-b99d-8d169b6d1d57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as one of the best players in the draft. Top ESPN analyst Mel Kiper, Jr. not only had him [ranked](https://substack.com/redirect/cd443762-c9fb-4628-8143-3b40c1db708d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as the fifth best player overall, he even had him as the top QB prospect, ahead of Cam Ward - who was actually chosen first.
This was classic herd behavior. The reporters and analysts were in an echo chamber, only talking to themselves and feeding off one another. It was a bubble, inflating Sanders' stock well beyond what its eventual value ended up being. The hype drove his "price" so high that no one was willing to pay it. He wasn't worth a number one or top five pick. And then when the market saw others not paying that price, they decided they didn't want to risk a top ten pick, or top 20, and so on. What did the others know that they didn't?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._j7UlzAw9LcQP_I_0MOiN4DZgpOxRS8epTMRAHMk-J8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162661687)
That first night, Cam Ward was the first one off the board. Picks were announced in quick succession; Sanders didn't go in the top five, nor in the top ten. Teams that needed quarterbacks were opting to draft for other positions. You could feel the tension building; Sanders not being picked was becoming the story and it generated increasingly heated discussion amongst the panels of reporters and analysts covering the event.
A pivotal moment came at the 21st pick when the quarterback-needy Pittsburg Steelers passed on Sanders to draft a defensive tackle. The tension hit a fevered pitch. There were only eleven more first round picks left that night; could it really be that Sanders wouldn't be picked in the first round?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fe9bbef5-e015-4f71-a69a-3e5d503f3688?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: NewScientist, [https://www.newscientist.com/article/2238125-weve-figured-out-why-bubbles-make-a-pop-sound-when-they-burst/](https://substack.com/redirect/8de00d95-8e1b-49b7-a106-41630b6f80bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Then it was announced that the New York Giants, just as desperate as the Steelers for a quarterback, traded up to get the 25th pick. Everyone held their breath; surely this was it. The team had long been speculated as one of the top landing spots for Sanders but had already passed on Sanders once when they took a defensive end with the third pick. It would make sense for them to now move up in the draft and take the quarterback they so desperately needed. But the Giants did not select Sanders; worse, they selected a different QB instead. That was the moment the virtuous cycle turned vicious.
Pandemonium broke out. The analysts were apoplectic. Kiper melted down, tearing apart the NFL as a whole. Even President Donald Trump weighed [in](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ca587b-ec1a-4c43-9571-10452aba7219?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Sanders was in freefall. Pick after pick was announced and his name wasn't called. The first round ended, then the second, then the third, then the fourth. With each pick, teams began to assume there must be a reason for this drop, wondering, "What do they know that we don't?"
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/982383bc-01e8-4fa5-b45e-276eb4df3939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
As everyone tried to understand what was happening, it was clear to me that no one was picking Sanders because...well, no one was picking Sanders. Just as hype begot hype - kicking off a "buying" frenzy that inflated the bubble - now panic begot panic, and a "selling" frenzy grabbed hold of the "market". It was a social contagion, tearing through NFL draft rooms. Lesser known, less able quarterbacks started being drafted, and even teams that had him on their draft boards started removing him.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._j7UlzAw9LcQP_I_0MOiN4DZgpOxRS8epTMRAHMk-J8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162661687)
Just as during a stock market crash, sooner or later the floor is hit when someone realizes that they can make money at the price being asked. And so it was with Shedeur Sanders, who was eventually selected by the Cleveland Browns, on the third day, in the fifth round, with pick 144. Not only wasn't he the first QB picked in the draft, he wasn't even the first QB picked by the Browns.
Just as he was the biggest story heading into the draft, Sanders is now the biggest story coming out of the draft, although for all the wrong reasons. Even now, a week later, it is still dominating [coverage](https://substack.com/redirect/cd2ef049-aa46-428c-9943-9bd7cb5a543e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of not only the draft, but of the NFL itself. Wild conspiracies abound, trying to find an explanation for what happened. But the truth is that regardless of intrinsic value, in the end all anything is worth is what people are willing to pay for it, and that is deeply influenced by crowd psychology.
And in the case of Shedeur Sanders, that was pick number 144.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/5377ca58-c9cd-4b69-a8eb-8c5e3c930d91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/8cec62da-98f8-4a69-aba0-272f03914431?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/8ce87d81-d09a-4810-879e-3e5594f25f8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

clean_body: Exploring the anatomy of a hype bubble | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Exploring the anatomy of a hype bubble | | | May 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- On the first night of the NFL Draft, the entire sports world sat enraptured as Colorado State star quarterback Shedeur Sanders - the son of NFL legend Deion Sanders - was passed over repeatedly as team after team opted for other athletes. At the end of the night, he still had not been picked; he was also passed over during the second and third rounds. It wasn't until the final day of the draft that he was finally chosen, in the fifth round, the 144th overall pick. Projected to be one of the top prospects at the top position in the sport, it is perhaps the most spectacular drop in the history of the NFL draft. As one who has studied and about financial bubbles, I was fascinated by the way this all played out. While the sports world scratched its collective head and apoplectic sports analysts lost their minds, blaming everything from stupidity to collusion to racism, I concluded the Shedeur Sanders hype was a bubble, and on draft night, it popped. The Shedeur Sanders hype was a bubble, and on draft night, it popped. My 2011 book, BOOMBUSTOLOGY: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst , suggested using multiple lenses to analyze a situation might reveal bubbly dynamics in action. And in fact, applying some of these lenses to the Sanders situation suggest the bubble analogy holds. One of the hallmarks of almost all bubbles is a self-fulfilling dynamic that ultimately proves unsustainable. What does that mean in plain English? Well, if higher prices lead to more demand which leads to higher prices, either the item of value will approach infinite value, or it's a bubble about to burst. Well, did Sanders have any self-fulfilling dynamics? | | ---|---|--- Source: "The long wait is over: Shedeur Sanders drafted by Cleveland in fifth round " LA Times, April 26, 2025: Prior to the draft, speculation about Sanders dominated the news. To say that his father is a high-profile figure would be putting it mildly. Deion Sanders long ago mastered the art of commanding the spotlight and managing the media circus. Colorado State - where the elder Sanders is the football coach - isn't considered one of the top football schools in the country. The celebrity of Deion Sanders brought a lot of attention to the school, and to his son. Each news story upped the ante; coverage begot coverage, hype begot hype. He was increasingly as one of the best players in the draft. Top ESPN analyst Mel Kiper, Jr. not only had him as the fifth best player overall, he even had him as the top QB prospect, ahead of Cam Ward - who was actually chosen first. This was classic herd behavior. The reporters and analysts were in an echo chamber, only talking to themselves and feeding off one another. It was a bubble, inflating Sanders' stock well beyond what its eventual value ended up being. The hype drove his "price" so high that no one was willing to pay it. He wasn't worth a number one or top five pick. And then when the market saw others not paying that price, they decided they didn't want to risk a top ten pick, or top 20, and so on. What did the others know that they didn't? That first night, Cam Ward was the first one off the board. Picks were announced in quick succession; Sanders didn't go in the top five, nor in the top ten. Teams that needed quarterbacks were opting to draft for other positions. You could feel the tension building; Sanders not being picked was becoming the story and it generated increasingly heated discussion amongst the panels of reporters and analysts covering the event. A pivotal moment came at the 21st pick when the quarterback-needy Pittsburg Steelers passed on Sanders to draft a defensive tackle. The tension hit a fevered pitch. There were only eleven more first round picks left that night; could it really be that Sanders wouldn't be picked in the first round? | | ---|---|--- Source: NewScientist, Then it was announced that the New York Giants, just as desperate as the Steelers for a quarterback, traded up to get the 25th pick. Everyone held their breath; surely this was it. The team had long been speculated as one of the top landing spots for Sanders but had already passed on Sanders once when they took a defensive end with the third pick. It would make sense for them to now move up in the draft and take the quarterback they so desperately needed. But the Giants did not select Sanders; worse, they selected a different QB instead. That was the moment the virtuous cycle turned vicious. Pandemonium broke out. The analysts were apoplectic. Kiper melted down, tearing apart the NFL as a whole. Even President Donald Trump weighed . Sanders was in freefall. Pick after pick was announced and his name wasn't called. The first round ended, then the second, then the third, then the fourth. With each pick, teams began to assume there must be a reason for this drop, wondering, "What do they know that we don't?" | | ---|---|--- As everyone tried to understand what was happening, it was clear to me that no one was picking Sanders because...well, no one was picking Sanders. Just as hype begot hype - kicking off a "buying" frenzy that inflated the bubble - now panic begot panic, and a "selling" frenzy grabbed hold of the "market". It was a social contagion, tearing through NFL draft rooms. Lesser known, less able quarterbacks started being drafted, and even teams that had him on their draft boards started removing him. Just as during a stock market crash, sooner or later the floor is hit when someone realizes that they can make money at the price being asked. And so it was with Shedeur Sanders, who was eventually selected by the Cleveland Browns, on the third day, in the fifth round, with pick 144. Not only wasn't he the first QB picked in the draft, he wasn't even the first QB picked by the Browns. Just as he was the biggest story heading into the draft, Sanders is now the biggest story coming out of the draft, although for all the wrong reasons. Even now, a week later, it is still dominating of not only the draft, but of the NFL itself. Wild conspiracies abound, trying to find an explanation for what happened. But the truth is that regardless of intrinsic value, in the end all anything is worth is what people are willing to pay for it, and that is deeply influenced by crowd psychology. And in the case of Shedeur Sanders, that was pick number 144. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to .
