And despite the popularity of this great, unfinished work, the “wild and terrible” side of Mozart has generally been obscured in the public mind, in favor of his seemingly “lighter” works: Eine Kleine Nachtmusik, the overture to [...] |

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Let’s commit - together - to doing more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
I want to share some thoughts with you about the vision the DNC recently announced for the road ahead - and why our shared commitment to that vision is more important than ever.
The DNC is embracing a bold “57-state strategy,” grounded in a powerful truth: when we organize everywhere, we create the conditions to win anywhere. No state should be considered a lost cause - when we write off entire communities, we hold back our own progress.
But here’s the key: this strategy only works if we all buy in. When we act together, when we commit to a shared plan and carry it out at every level - from school boards, to select boards and all the way to the White House - we accelerate the path to real, lasting change. Collective action isn’t just powerful, it’s transformational.
We have to compete in every race, in every district every time. No race is too small for investment or organizing. Victory comes from showing up - early, often and everywhere.
This announcement is great news. It only reinforces the MassDems’ commitment to organizing every precinct and community in the Commonwealth, 365 days a year - and not just in election years - to build our party through increased participation and engagement.
Think about the people in your own community. Who do you know with leadership potential? Encourage them to run for local office. Our democracy depends on everyday people stepping up.
Let’s commit - together - to doing more in our neighborhoods and communities. Whether you give your time, your voice, your vote or your dollars, every action contributes to the larger movement.
If you can, please chip in today to support the MassDems current efforts to support local races in the Commonwealth and critical elections across the nation. Together, we can organize - and win - everywhere.
Chip In Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/massachusetts-democratic-state-committee---federal-account-1]
Onward, together,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Stephen Miller just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down.

|
---
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.

Last weekend, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer.

That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care.

**Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106977403/543223140/-1407608639?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250502_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNDBiY2RhLThiMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TcLXfvcFCaAwKe8qI_jkWQ83GYVK1RSYdsUUinGMKi8=)****Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, _or_ anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans.

The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it.

**I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, Peter. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers.**

[Peter, will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $10 between me and Democracy On The Line right now? Every dollar helps us fight back — and stay laser-focused on what matters.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106977410/543223147/-1407608639?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250502_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNDBiY2RhLThiMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TcLXfvcFCaAwKe8qI_jkWQ83GYVK1RSYdsUUinGMKi8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106977416/543223153/-1407608639?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=DOTL_20250502_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNDBiY2RhLThiMjctZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TcLXfvcFCaAwKe8qI_jkWQ83GYVK1RSYdsUUinGMKi8=)

clean_body: No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. | Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Last weekend, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer. That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care. Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me. what Stephen is doing here. He doesn’t actually care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans. The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it. I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, Peter. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | = = = = Thank you. Your support means so much to me. Sarah | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Hello Derek

The Young Democrats of America are gathering for our Spring Meeting from**May****9-11** in**Minneapolis****, Minnesota. We’re** excited to welcome young leaders from across the country for a weekend of organizing, training, and building power together.

The hotel block closes today. Book your room by**May 2, 2025** , to get the discounted rate. This gives attendees extra time to finalize their travel plans and secure lodging.

To get the most out of the weekend, we encourage everyone to book their stay at the Royal Sonesta Minneapolis Downtown, our official meeting hotel. We’ve secured a special group rate to ensure a convenient and affordable experience for all attendees. [**Reserve your room now by clicking this link**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYVTJ3gaXEQhNrFAZPhr6sabsSNHnk0fk6DOOTQdyE3JosLT_nADN5jURGejAj_8zTcSx74oOvq8JuRihLimg-UNatSKqLMYoZzw9A4pGLtetcBrME2x_39Q18TEOJTZpjU1WmVSNQDLRZ509r2sctFK5lV6s5q8bwkJIM7GpOslHchmDjh6QteDbGElCboM_mbgkT8fNGa_RflOawyJ5bchK2FiIU2vL90deBWkNQZQCluyjs8O5LhtnHFajAXZIfMcLPjmtGta4-ttXQQC3JnkZQCzbwhIleJf6SsuGgmVzAWkIfL-bfidG4_2QBzjj_QtRSkUl4x0FEkuswGmyKWyPIE-GkSPOMOEgEm6hSWmIhx91OmFzrGUjoraSZ2iUrmxclxkIHtApS39xHb0CFatJQshk0_vc1vx1U7pmtv9Eeif7vNNfQ1oHfRZCYLqGNQRHoZJ6ibgCXZzuplu11-nE9VnnDpmWosEuUp6fznmR6kyf7ToYc-QRW5WZOD44w/4g5/mAkahm2lQlWtroqFwmCygg/h1/h001.1fngV1fOTgdOrCfZi6ZQN5SjZgw43bWakP6vm_pJ9Hc).

Here, you’ll find details about caucus meetings, trainings, speakers, and other weekend highlights. More updates will follow soon.

name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Paralyzed Finish, Adventure Cat, and Skiing Down the Aisle
body:
Darren Awol, 42, a London man paralyzed from the waist down after a 2011 shooting, [took on the London Marathon last week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOqyAYhZ8Gdxj4xVoXLLoxNzfTbqZJlwblR5lSaIBq7NNP7CvM9uTk5Hzf7dyflXXWTxf1QGkm02cTeo9rcpgzxv6ponLbG7Wx3qZZ6QV9fkUce2BQU1ZTBr1W1m29KLQ0iIBVgZI34gBcCCGKWaLBYeCg2uNBGz0M_FgJbEUlRtOM1VEUVu5rrGbA20qwqqwVbwFYiw1ww9VIBENtc4jlT7A-z2jcFhaM5RgehZNzzs9EqhOBjkC3rmuZXt5v6b699waBbgpB052LQFc3dUOg-55Dpiev6TU4Tf8h1fSCC0Z6U-5OT5Oyfk__v1Km3YceNb3OSL-C18HTs4oqz8EXUernap2z6dAQwaaHsu5zLP_Z6CLhNwAA__95tI0k). He walked part of the course with crutches and used a wheelchair for the rest.

# Friday, May 2, 2025

## Paralyzed Man Defies Odds in Marathon
Darren Awol, 42, a London man paralyzed from the waist down after a 2011 shooting, [took on the London Marathon last week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOqyAYhZ8Gdxj4xVoXLLoxNzfTbqZJlwblR5lSaIBq7NNP7CvM9uTk5Hzf7dyflXXWTxf1QGkm02cTeo9rcpgzxv6ponLbG7Wx3qZZ6QV9fkUce2BQU1ZTBr1W1m29KLQ0iIBVgZI34gBcCCGKWaLBYeCg2uNBGz0M_FgJbEUlRtOM1VEUVu5rrGbA20qwqqwVbwFYiw1ww9VIBENtc4jlT7A-z2jcFhaM5RgehZNzzs9EqhOBjkC3rmuZXt5v6b699waBbgpB052LQFc3dUOg-55Dpiev6TU4Tf8h1fSCC0Z6U-5OT5Oyfk__v1Km3YceNb3OSL-C18HTs4oqz8EXUernap2z6dAQwaaHsu5zLP_Z6CLhNwAA__95tI0k). He walked part of the course with crutches and used a wheelchair for the rest. Shot in the back during an unprovoked attack, Awol suffered a severe spinal cord injury and lost control and sensation below the waist. [Told he’d never walk again](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvgzAQBeBfY7Yg-2wgDB66sKVrR-uwz-EiB0fGBaW_vqJ_oduTnvRJ733d3A058Xr_xCfZeI-uxuxWOrZEtVJxLyyY3j8UIq-8LRh2Wut3Ie9AQneR3UWCC8jp7UwTbCQC0g1ZNZgelDHGNIvVIfgh-qhnNePc-x6oH6-KUKO_4qwbtqcmOwlq1EbqtkM1AsiRBlBRoRdGUuCaS_vIvNaFYnrnnUrr87NJdqn1tQn9IWASMB3H0c6zPzsB0zlGwISlsk90Rj_ulNbrKOmRm2LD6-CUeOsHYeT9iZz-1PrvO3YLvwEAAP__Sbx2Qw), he endured years of physical and mental hardship, at times contemplating suicide, before slowly rebuilding his strength. He credits his recovery to relentless gym therapy, the motivation of having a young son, and pure determination. Along the way, he lost 140 pounds. Awol is raising funds to build a rehab center for people with spinal cord injuries, strokes, MS, and cerebral palsy. He says he hopes his story shows others that even when the odds are stacked against you, it’s still possible to turn up for yourself. [Follow him on Instagram here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQgOGnMVuQfTYEBg-VKrZ07Whd8BmuMnZkXFD69FX6Ct1_fcP_eXM35Mhp-cCNbFiCqyG7ROceqVYq7oEF4_OHfODE-4r-oFS_C80OJHQX2V0kOI8cn8403gYiIN2QVVfTgzLGmGa14-D9fTC9GaTpOqX7MOshqAElGDneqWH70mQnQY3aSN12qEYAOdIVVFA4CyPJc82l_cqc6kohPvNBpZ3z1kS71vrYhX4TMAmYzvNsOe0Vl4LbqxAw4Zmj23LlAyvn9Ar1tEah3yk1xfrHyTHy3l-FkcuGHP_k-u8lh4XfAAAA___1Qnah).
## Indiana Boy Rescues Stranded Calf
Nine-year-old Wyatt Ban is being praised for his quick thinking after [rescuing a stranded calf](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSnDAQAF8D2VBiELsmUOBks3PqkBqkERqfkLYkHdT69a71F-4DXd39-2P9IImS9l90sPG7X5vPa-KrRm6Ny_qkQvH1l52XJDWQOzm1r8J2RYUzqBkUro4kvlbdO-OZkaeezXjXNxy11roPRqPbftyXRetlnLfZjmrjm_V409bjtOlezJumZoXjMmk1DTONC6Ja-I6jH8l2WrGTlsvwJ0tqgX185ZPLYPPRRxNae9Zu-tnho8PHdV3DnrN7ZyRuVy6fQy57h48FXkwFcnSw8V4hSIUjH9AyuCInw0b2E8g3LlCZJe3gC6UmFmy-oAVOUOnkCgSWoofA4PNXciAJnDQbOnz0xbjnJTFKvd07rfaDJP4Xbd8-fBr8FwAA__8Ho5Qr) along a rural road in Indiana. Driving home with his mom, Morgan, the boy noticed a distressed cow and persuaded her to turn around. Acting fast, he slipped through a barbed wire fence and found the cow's calf stuck in a steep creek bank. With his mom, [filming from the car](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQfZyhDB66sKVrR8vB53CVsZFxoenTV8krdP_006f_59VeHUdO9w-3kgn3YGvINtG5R6qVit1ccfHxSz5w4n1x_qBUvwvNFiToi9QXCdY7jg-LjTeBCKhryKgBe1CIiM1ihqEflXPUj33At3C7eR1UN6DWNFOPoWHz1KSWoMYOZddqp0YAOdIAKig3C5TkuebSfmVOdaEQH_mg0s55baJZat120b0LmARM53m2r0trrpzTcyNgOthTFjD9jLzkLTfF-O3kGHnvB4HyvjqOL67-u8Nh4C8AAP__0O1z_g), Wyatt carefully nudged the calf up the bank and out of the water. The calf and mother were safely reunited, and Morgan beamed with pride:_ "He knew just what to do."_
## Gary the Adventure Cat Goes Viral
Gary, [a 10-year-old rescue cat](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQANCvgQ10PkxcBg9dsqVrR-uCz-DI4Mi-BtGvr9pf6A-84X3e3I1iivvyQRvbsAQnIbudj5pYhIt7UqF0frMPcY91Jf_iXb4Kzw4Bxw7GDtB5iul0uvU2MCMPLVtl9AWV1lq3q52UN6MnAhMwaHgzYb6bEe4zXO5aBdNG-6vBCKimQcPQj6QmRJjYoAqK5kYD-yi59I8cd1k5pDO_uPRz3tpkV5FnbYb3Bq8NXo_j6JecfR9rg9eFytnJyt1M0j1o49oxVVlpa4v1zyOmFOvFNBqWjWL6E-XfFS-LPwEAAP__-8J0zQ) from Alberta, has gone viral for joining his owner, James Eastham, on outdoor treks—hiking, skiing, and paddling through the Canadian wilderness. He walked part of the course with crutches and used a wheelchair for the rest. | | | | | | Friday, May 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Ever find yourself replaying your wedding day in your mind? Maybe wondering—just for fun—what you’d do differently? We did too, especially after seeing a . Yes, skis. White dress. Snowy slope. Ceremony in motion. And somehow, it totally works. See a video below. Have a great weekend! If you're looking for advice on how to come out on top in today's market, check out this afternoon's sponsor, . | Paralyzed Man Defies Odds in Marathon Darren Awol, 42, a London man paralyzed from the waist down after a 2011 shooting, . He walked part of the course with crutches and used a wheelchair for the rest. Shot in the back during an unprovoked attack, Awol suffered a severe spinal cord injury and lost control and sensation below the waist. , he endured years of physical and mental hardship, at times contemplating suicide, before slowly rebuilding his strength. He credits his recovery to relentless gym therapy, the motivation of having a young son, and pure determination. Along the way, he lost 140 pounds. Awol is raising funds to build a rehab center for people with spinal cord injuries, strokes, MS, and cerebral palsy. He says he hopes his story shows others that even when the odds are stacked against you, it’s still possible to turn up for yourself. . Indiana Boy Rescues Stranded Calf Nine-year-old Wyatt Ban is being praised for his quick thinking after along a rural road in Indiana. Driving home with his mom, Morgan, the boy noticed a distressed cow and persuaded her to turn around. Acting fast, he slipped through a barbed wire fence and found the cow's calf stuck in a steep creek bank. With his mom, , Wyatt carefully nudged the calf up the bank and out of the water. The calf and mother were safely reunited, and Morgan beamed with pride: "He knew just what to do." Gary the Adventure Cat Goes Viral Gary, from Alberta, has gone viral for joining his owner, James Eastham, on outdoor treks—hiking, skiing, and paddling through the Canadian wilderness. What started as leash training became a social media hit, with over 600,000 followers tracking Gary’s escapades. See . The feline’s fame has led to brand deals, including a Jeep partnership, while inspiring cat owners to explore safe, enriching outdoor time for their pets. . | Flying together with our sponsor If you're an investor....mark our words: —and the Fed just lit the fuse. body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106977654/543223946/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyYTg5Yi04YzI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysd_Z7UhMq3DQe4JvZcBW3VNK7yXVYfjmqltfbmRkVc=)
Hi Friend,
Tomorrow, I’m heading to Palm Springs, right into the heart of Republican Congressman Ken Calvert’s district. Since Donald Trump took office, Calvert has gone silent, hiding from the very people he was elected to represent. I refuse to let him, or any Republican, off the hook. So I'm bringing the fight directly to his backyard.
For more than 100 days, Trump and his administration have attacked the foundations of our democracy. Republicans in Congress are nowhere to be found. They know just how angry their constituents are, and they’re doing everything they can to avoid accountability.
But I won’t back down.
[Can you support our trips into Republican districts across the country. Our average contribution is $21 and any donation helps us go into these districts and hold Republicans accountable. Will you help me keep going by making a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106977655/543223947/2133160978?refcode2=d3e2a89b-8c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyYTg5Yi04YzI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysd_Z7UhMq3DQe4JvZcBW3VNK7yXVYfjmqltfbmRkVc=)

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106977656/543223948/2133160978?refcode2=d3e2a89b-8c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyYTg5Yi04YzI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysd_Z7UhMq3DQe4JvZcBW3VNK7yXVYfjmqltfbmRkVc=)

While in Palm Springs, I’ll also be standing in solidarity with local activists and labor organizers to celebrate May Day. In this moment, it’s more important than ever to lift up the labor movement and protect the right to organize. The Trump administration is trying to undo decades of hard-won progress for working people and we can’t let that happen.
If you’re in the Palm Springs area, I hope you’ll join us. Whether in person or through your support, we need everyone to keep showing up and demanding better.
[Together, we can hold these no-show Republicans accountable and restore real democracy in America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106977657/543223949/2133160978?refcode2=d3e2a89b-8c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyYTg5Yi04YzI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysd_Z7UhMq3DQe4JvZcBW3VNK7yXVYfjmqltfbmRkVc=) [Thank you for standing with us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106977658/543223950/2133160978?refcode2=d3e2a89b-8c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyYTg5Yi04YzI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysd_Z7UhMq3DQe4JvZcBW3VNK7yXVYfjmqltfbmRkVc=)

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106977659/543223951/2133160978?refcode2=d3e2a89b-8c27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UyYTg5Yi04YzI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysd_Z7UhMq3DQe4JvZcBW3VNK7yXVYfjmqltfbmRkVc=)

Our former allies are distancing themselves, unsure of their standing with a leader who prioritizes personal vendettas over diplomacy. The human cost of his policies is harrowing; children battling cancer have been deported, and innocent men have been renditioned to a brutal El Salvadoran prison.
Trump's administration has weaponized the Department of Justice to target political adversaries and silence dissent.
**He is no longer the leader of the free world but rather a brutal and criminal dictator who must be held accountable. The time for action is now — he must GO.**

clean_body: | | | TRUMP: EPIC FAILURE. In just 100 days, convicted felon and conman Donald Trump has plunged our nation into a crisis of unprecedented proportions. Prices are soaring, markets are plummeting, and the very freedoms we cherish have been systematically eroded. Our former allies are distancing themselves, unsure of their standing with a leader who prioritizes personal vendettas over diplomacy. The human cost of his policies is harrowing; children battling cancer have been deported, and innocent men have been renditioned to a brutal El Salvadoran prison. Trump's administration has weaponized the Department of Justice to target political adversaries and silence dissent. He is no longer the leader of the free world but rather a brutal and criminal dictator who must be held accountable. The time for action is now — he must GO. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Indiana GOP
subject: 100 Days of Freedom and Opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**100 Days of Freedom and Opportunity**_
---
Friends, This week, our party celebrated an exciting milestone—100 days of Freedom and Opportunity under the strong leadership of Governor Mike Braun! Joined by his Cabinet, members of the media, and leaders from across the state, Governor Braun marked this moment with a clear message: Indiana is moving forward with bold, conservative reforms that deliver real results for working families. In just 100 days, the Governor has made incredible progress on his _Freedom and Opportunity_ agenda—cutting taxes, empowering parents, eliminating woke ideology from government, protecting public safety, and restructuring state government to serve Hoosiers more efficiently, transparently, and effectively. From historic tax relief and universal school choice, to health care reforms and new economic growth strategies that reach every corner of the state, Indiana is leading the way in conservative governance. This administration is not only keeping its promises—it's raising the bar. We’re proud to celebrate this 100-day Hoosier success story and look forward to the continued momentum as we build a stronger, freer, and more prosperous Indiana together. Thank you for standing with us and with Governor Braun as we keep working to make Indiana the best place to live, work, and raise a family. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
_**Governor Braun Highlights 100 Days of Leadership**_
---
**Governor Mike Braun** , on Wednesday, joined his cabinet, media, and leaders from across the state to celebrate 100 days of Freedom and Opportunity! **What he said** : “In 100 days, we’ve made tremendous progress on the Freedom & Opportunity agenda: cutting taxes, giving parents more choice in education, drawing a clear line against extreme wokeness and illegal immigration, putting public safety first, and making state government more efficient, transparent, and accountable to work harder for you." \- **Governor Braun** , via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/B7tKIzL5Be6ZqXxHBBfKtASaC7l5IGdltn_pZhRF-C2hBVyDw8juwsypN0a9-zPv4TiS1igiBk3ta6KmrA_jxn5ooDNai5Xcd8VAVBPiPhqWwK7HLVWeolKjF2CqKfYh7je9cZg5gZxWJ2Ic-0wa9EmNbsg0GgLVMw4lhbuVhGnJgdAakr4nsN7ESyRwD791v6F-ikKBE-oWbSz-Rs3gqBu09Ua9Qh4aD3jW4Kv8gAgv-jRhQ0IwqWLbI2ywUCURJYooecWywFZgFW5LIdTc9hRIntcVzx5v6easHWhxWDuOpE17d5KQgz2GGmT68MYSWE6Cgz8T5z1V5tIzkEYyiNQeoX6OYArvJAuMvHP3DjZPblx55ruVNHltPhho6vf37pTRUn9-Zobj8UA-RiopPNytqM2a-VOD0T_8EH-s75HNPG-azEKvoh9WLdsrg2ksul8G/mscqME5sEYgxyu2sanwuXzq4vdeKZgTh/8). During the event time, Governor Braun highlighted his administration's greatest accomplishments on behalf of Hoosiers:
* Restructuring state government to operate more efficiently by streamlining agencies, finding cost savings, and cutting 25% of burdensome regulations to reduce red tape for Hoosiers.
* Passing a balanced, fiscally responsible budget that safeguards Indiana’s surplus, protects the state’s AAA credit rating, and prioritizes investments in education, public safety, and tax relief.
* Delivering nearly $1.5 billion in historic property tax relief, putting money back into the pockets of homeowners, farmers, and small business owners.
* Replacing divisive DEI programs with a fair, merit-based system built on excellence and innovation, ensuring equal opportunity for all Hoosiers.
* Taking bold action to lower health care costs through price transparency measures and reforms targeting surprise billing and pharmacy middlemen.
* Launching the Make Indiana Healthy Again Initiative, alongside Secretary Kennedy and Dr. Oz, to promote nutritious eating, end junk food subsidies, boost physical activity, and study chronic illness for a healthier, longer-living Indiana.
* Empowering parents and students with universal school choice, increasing teacher pay, implementing clear accountability for schools, and ensuring age-appropriate curriculum in classrooms.
* Introducing a new economic development strategy focused on increasing wages and creating job opportunities across all 92 counties.
* Strengthening public safety by increasing penalties for violent offenders, enhancing border enforcement, and improving working conditions for correctional officers.
* Positioning Indiana as a national leader in nuclear energy and securing the honor of hosting the 2025 NGA Nuclear Summit and setting the stage for future energy innovation.

Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Summer and Fall Internship Program!

✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning
✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections
✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana

Apply Today! Spots are limited!

**📱 _News You Can Use_ **
---
**Governor Mike Braun **[commemorated](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/q7yP1wzDgk28vKNE-7D7z0kqJk2iaEmyt_yRkmGxg2eijznpioVPAQ_TXTXlnqIII8HJress_3r0XzuNsGzLsJFzuhSCa2vl6TqwVkofBeZ5H32PMfmHn147_NIzoGuzM9Ns70xWDyX-oK5dfbb1SRdktzubrNWshvjfx7j_wMbCKVuT3Y8sF-4J7WADsDxksP1ztKtG37QLtaOGPUAOzj7GV-JFsXIUFdFS-7Aynt-xZHMmuOL6TX_OZQkq4nSkWB92kmiF9Iun1BidCBfYHlwPLAJHE0H3PZtBS4xySa3y/EftNurC8opl0Xp_xHdUumEfus8mWOznK/8) the National Day of Prayer from the Statehouse, emphasizing the importance of prayer for guidance as an elected official. **Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith **[celebrated](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/XYVByWNM8lk12HRZoAtQZ6QHcF8Zm0hUrTo6y0hsVmZsIYUVUEcVEDSlxpg8EFqT3GYafuXXPgXvvB1Qkyeef-H5eOxPkDvV_vEmn_jPHg72Ggil-OIq6GSCVHqKLhUo-BqYlAbtxMKgYasnwPRpG_fEjKSCycDfdmG7YNLb4S8JigC33nzjhBoMO11WL764DerOUMoTpLgPE-uquRkUet3RN5T2qstimAwo9vjZqTGJvHzc6sy7igzBQEG8jdx-32dRguJ2HFRknrB7yk8vm4zdNtTar7DhKrjHx4-q6trKjy7Kl-w2CA/TbYfC4PQ1V8RqnRYdsiLiINO4da07c9h/8) the end of the legislative session and the opportunity to meet Hoosiers from across our state. **Secretary Diego Morales** clean_body: | | | | | | | 100 Days of Freedom and Opportunity Friends, This week, our party celebrated an exciting milestone—100 days of Freedom and Opportunity under the strong leadership of Governor Mike Braun! Joined by his Cabinet, members of the media, and leaders from across the state, Governor Braun marked this moment with a clear message: Indiana is moving forward with bold, conservative reforms that deliver real results for working families. In just 100 days, the Governor has made incredible progress on his Freedom and Opportunity agenda—cutting taxes, empowering parents, eliminating woke ideology from government, protecting public safety, and restructuring state government to serve Hoosiers more efficiently, transparently, and effectively. From historic tax relief and universal school choice, to health care reforms and new economic growth strategies that reach every corner of the state, Indiana is leading the way in conservative governance. This administration is not only keeping its promises—it's raising the bar. We’re proud to celebrate this 100-day Hoosier success story and look forward to the continued momentum as we build a stronger, freer, and more prosperous Indiana together. Thank you for standing with us and with Governor Braun as we keep working to make Indiana the best place to live, work, and raise a family. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Highlights 100 Days of Leadership Governor Mike Braun , on Wednesday, joined his cabinet, media, and leaders from across the state to celebrate 100 days of Freedom and Opportunity! What he said : “In 100 days, we’ve made tremendous progress on the Freedom & Opportunity agenda: cutting taxes, giving parents more choice in education, drawing a clear line against extreme wokeness and illegal immigration, putting public safety first, and making state government more efficient, transparent, and accountable to work harder for you." \- Governor Braun , via a . During the event time, Governor Braun highlighted his administration's greatest accomplishments on behalf of Hoosiers: Restructuring state government to operate more efficiently by streamlining agencies, finding cost savings, and cutting 25% of burdensome regulations to reduce red tape for Hoosiers. Passing a balanced, fiscally responsible budget that safeguards Indiana’s surplus, protects the state’s AAA credit rating, and prioritizes investments in education, public safety, and tax relief. Delivering nearly $1.5 billion in historic property tax relief, putting money back into the pockets of homeowners, farmers, and small business owners. Replacing divisive DEI programs with a fair, merit-based system built on excellence and innovation, ensuring equal opportunity for all Hoosiers. Taking bold action to lower health care costs through price transparency measures and reforms targeting surprise billing and pharmacy middlemen. Launching the Make Indiana Healthy Again Initiative, alongside Secretary Kennedy and Dr. Oz, to promote nutritious eating, end junk food subsidies, boost physical activity, and study chronic illness for a healthier, longer-living Indiana. Empowering parents and students with universal school choice, increasing teacher pay, implementing clear accountability for schools, and ensuring age-appropriate curriculum in classrooms. Introducing a new economic development strategy focused on increasing wages and creating job opportunities across all 92 counties. Strengthening public safety by increasing penalties for violent offenders, enhancing border enforcement, and improving working conditions for correctional officers. Positioning Indiana as a national leader in nuclear energy and securing the honor of hosting the 2025 NGA Nuclear Summit and setting the stage for future energy innovation. | Hendricks County Freedom and Family Day Howard County Century Club Breakfast Orange County Lincoln Day Clark County Lincoln Day Chairwoman's County Visits: 30 | Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? Spots are limited! 🔗 | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun the National Day of Prayer from the Statehouse, emphasizing the importance of prayer for guidance as an elected official. Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith the end of the legislative session and the opportunity to meet Hoosiers from across our state. Secretary Diego Morales the passage of HB 1593, critical legislation aimed at reducing business identity theft fraud and strengthening protections for Hoosier businesses and consumers. Treasurer Daniel Elliott "" the Orange County 911 Operations Center, thanking them for their service during the recent storm outbreak that hit Southern Indiana and for all the work they did to keep their fellow Hoosiers safe. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla several pieces of legislation which her office supported, aimed at tackling the national debt, streamlining the process of tax revenue distributions for local government, and readdressing tax distribution for several cities. Attorney General Todd Rokita out against the proposed Terre Haute hospital merger, saying, “the creation of a regional monopoly would impose a negative impact on Hoosiers in the area seeking quality health care and affordable costs.” Senator Todd Young ** the Shipbuilding and Harbor Infrastructure for Prosperity and Security (SHIPS) for America Act , legislation to revitalize the United States shipbuilding and commercial maritime industries. ## The 7 virtues tied to Old Glory * WorldNetDaily * by Jerry Newcombe
There has been controversy lately over the American flag. Marcus Lemonis is the CEO of Camping World, with some 210 locations across the nation. He loves the USA, his adopted country, and shows his love by flying huge American flags at his businesses. An activist judge has ordered Florida to stop the enforcement of their recent law allowing misdemeanor charges for illegal aliens who enter Florida to evade immigration authorities. ## Local Elections Show Reform UK’s Rise Amid Tory, Labour Losses
Nigel Farage’s Reform UK Party made big gains in Thursday’s local elections and gained another seat in Parliament as it positions itself as a new right-leaning party of opposition to the reigning Labour Party. Reform UK gained hundreds of new local council seats, while the Conservative and Labour parties conversely lost hundreds. ## CNN Data Analyst Harry Enten’s Brutal Numbers on Trump Approval Will Devastate Dems – RedState

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Did you see this news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
In case you missed it:
#
In case you missed it:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250502-1?refcode=em20250502-1964&refcode2=1964_21716_4_G3KR&akid=1964%2E21716%2E4_G3KR)
Last week, Donald Trump signed a presidential memorandum directing Attorney General Pam Bondi to go after ActBlue — the platform used by countless Democratic campaigns, including mine.
Let’s be honest: Donald Trump doesn’t want everyday people funding campaigns. He wants billionaires and right-wing super PACs calling the shots — not teachers, nurses, or retirees chipping in a few bucks at a time.
**So when Trump attacks ActBlue, he’s not just attacking our infrastructure. He’s attacking your voice — your right to donate and shape the future of this country.**
**That’s why our grassroots response matters so much right now.** [**If you can, chip in $1 or any amount you’re able to. Let’s show him we’re not giving in to his fear or distraction.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250502-1?refcode=em20250502-1964&refcode2=1964_21716_4_G3KR&akid=1964%2E21716%2E4_G3KR)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250502-1?refcode=em20250502-1964&refcode2=1964_21716_4_G3KR&akid=1964%2E21716%2E4_G3KR)**
We know what this is: an authoritarian tactic designed to distract, cast doubt, and scare people into silence.
But Trump is afraid. He’s afraid of the grassroots energy in Delaware and across the country and the momentum we’re building to push back against him and the GOP.
And he should be.
Thanks for being part of this fight,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250502-1&t=1&refcode2=1964_21716_4_G3KR&akid=1964%2E21716%2E4_G3KR)**

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: RIGHT NOW: Congress preparing to gut climate programs and sell off public lands
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI0NTA2NjUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIyMDAzNjk2MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL CONGRESS: PROTECT PUBLIC LANDS AND CLEAN ENERGY PROGRAMS

Republicans in Congress are promising to gut our most important climate
initiatives and sell off our public lands.

Tell your members of Congress to vote against ANY attempt to gut environmental and public lands protections and clean energy incentives. https://links.messages.lcv. TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ This is important, Peter — This week, we’re watching the House closely as Republicans kick off voting on
their budget reconciliation bill, which is chock-full of handouts to polluters
and billionaires and is on track to be one of the most harmful, costly, and
sweeping pieces of legislation in recent history. Republicans in Congress want a bill that will open more public lands to
destructive fossil fuel drilling. They want a bill that will increase costs to
consumers by cutting clean energy tax incentives. They want a bill that will
make our air and water dirtier. And they want a bill that will give massive tax
breaks to billionaires and Big Polluters. Time and time again we have seen that people, especially those in districts
represented by Republicans, want current clean energy initiatives to be fully
funded. And they want to keep our public lands in public hands, not in polluters
and real estate developers’. We have the power to make a difference and protect
federal clean energy investments and public lands. Tell your members of Congress to vote against ANY attempt to gut environmental and public lands protections and clean energy incentives. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ The Republican polluter and billionaire handouts bill wish list halts the clean
energy investments that will lower costs and produce more clean energy here in
the United States. We can’t afford to let them put our economy and our future at
risk. We can’t afford to let them sell off our public lands to their oil and gas
polluters and billionaire cronies. They have made abundantly clear that they are out of touch with what people want
by advancing legislation that prioritizes Big Oil and Big Polluters over our
health and safety. Our families deserve clean air and water. Our families deserve cleaner, cheaper
energy and more efficient homes and vehicles. Our families deserve to visit our
cherished public lands without being blocked by drilling rigs and mining pits. The profits of billionaires and corporations shouldn’t take priority over our
health and futures. Send a message to your members of Congress urging them to VOTE NO on cutting essential environmental and public lands protections and clean energy programs. https://links.messages.lcv. We’ll keep you posted on further developments. LCV Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12450665&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDAzNjk2MwS2&spReportId=MjIyMDAzNjk2MwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12450665&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDAzNjk2MwS2&spReportId=MjIyMDAzNjk2MwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcpy0wZC~

clean_body: Dear Derek, Republicans are taking the California governor race seriously, and we can’t take anything for granted. Here’s the playbook from Republican candidate and former Fox News host Steve Hilton: One million doors knocked by a Republican candidate. To win next year, we’ve got to redouble our efforts to reach voters where they are and make sure they know that Katie Porter is the candidate who will bring down costs and improve our state. Thanks, Team KP Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

From gutting critical infrastructure funding to slashing foreign aid, Trump and his allies – including Elon Musk – are pushing an agenda that leaves working families behind.

But we’re not sitting back. I’ve worked to stand up to this administration’s blatant abuse of power by introducing the CLEAR ACT, which would demand oversight and accountability of DOGE and Elon Musk. There’s so much work left to do, and defending MI-03 in 2026 is a big part of it.

**Republicans are emboldened to cover more ground, and last quarter’s FEC reports show they have the momentum to do so. name: Haley Stevens
subject: My announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106980292/543233314/289657007?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM3OWY4MS05NTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEBVK5WI3SdCL6LmbBU8mdA3W6YWzjtN7ECPKbJjGxA=) Hi, folks – this is Congresswoman Haley Stevens writing to you with exciting news: I’m launching my campaign for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat. Winning in Michigan is essential to regaining our Democratic Senate majority, and right now The Cook Political Report is rating our race as a “Toss Up.” That means we’re already one of the GOP’s top targets for defeat. Just last year, they spent nearly $80 million trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat and came up only 0.3% short, so I need your early support to win. [**Folks, I want to tell you a bit more about myself and why I’m running. But if that’s all you needed to hear and you’re ready to get to work, please chip in whatever you can – split between my campaign and Seth Moulton – to help hit our $1 million launch goal and become a Founding Donor of my campaign to keep Michigan blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106980294/543233315/289657007?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM3OWY4MS05NTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEBVK5WI3SdCL6LmbBU8mdA3W6YWzjtN7ECPKbJjGxA=) I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander. I learned the value of hard work by watching my parents – who owned their own landscaping business – build things. Heavy machinery equipment, bobcats, plows, dirt, grease, and grime – it was all part of my childhood. Later in life, I got the call to give back to the state I love during a time of great uncertainty: the Great Recession. **I can’t tell you how unfathomable it was to hear the words “bankruptcy” and “General Motors” in the same sentence.** So I stepped up to do my part and served as chief of staff for the Auto Rescue initiative under President Obama. We brought workers, corporations, and union leadership around the same table to stabilize the auto industry. On Friday nights, I’d stay in the office until the late evening and return every call from every Michigander who called our office worried about the future. _In the end, we saved 200,000 Michigan jobs._ I can’t help but see parallels between then and now as we find ourselves in another moment of great uncertainty, thanks to the chaos forced on us by Donald Trump and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk. People are rightly concerned about rising costs, shoot-from-the-hip tariffs, and attacks on our personal freedoms. **Michiganders need a fighter in their corner – and that’s who I’ve been my entire life.** [**If you’re ready to fight with me – to win this battleground race, take back the Senate majority, and stop Trump – can you split a grassroots donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton? Every dollar counts toward my $1 million campaign launch goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106980295/543233316/289657007?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM3OWY4MS05NTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEBVK5WI3SdCL6LmbBU8mdA3W6YWzjtN7ECPKbJjGxA=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106980296/543233317/289657007?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM3OWY4MS05NTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEBVK5WI3SdCL6LmbBU8mdA3W6YWzjtN7ECPKbJjGxA=) I know a thing or two about winning competitive races when the odds are stacked against me. Back in 2018, I flipped a battleground House seat from red to blue and helped usher in a Democratic majority to serve as a check on the first Trump administration. I was also just recognized as the most effective Michigan congressperson in the House. I’m taking that tenacity straight to the campaign trail. But I need you with me. Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, is running again – and we know Republicans will spend tens of millions of dollars to buy this Senate seat for Trump. [**That’s why we must build the strongest possible campaign from day one: Help me hit this $1 million campaign launch goal by making a gift of $25 (split with Seth Moulton). With your support, we’ll win Michigan’s open Senate seat, take back the Senate for Democrats, and stop the chaos and uncertainty of the Trump administration.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106980297/543233318/289657007?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ImRunning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM3OWY4MS05NTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AEBVK5WI3SdCL6LmbBU8mdA3W6YWzjtN7ECPKbJjGxA=) Thank you for being a part of this team right from the get-go. I’m so grateful for your support. Haley
---

name: dpwillis67@gmail.com, Nancy Pelosi
subject: re: our plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106980301/543233323/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250502_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjUwNDdjYy04ZDI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zltp3dAiNx-AbdOVa_NePZxk1Rt5Duprjq-PzJT1p28=)
---
I need you to hear it from me:
Donald Trump’s chaotic and senseless tariffs are driving prices higher. They’re draining families’ savings and retirement accounts. They’re pushing our country to the brink of a recession.
Hardworking Americans are helplessly watching as Donald Trump recklessly crashes the economy – because his misguided notions of how to “make America great again” revolve around making his billionaire MAGA donors richer on the backs of the American people.
But, we won’t let Donald Trump’s disgraceful plot go unanswered – because the wellbeing of every American hangs in the balance.
**[_Donald Trump’s deliberate actions are tanking our economy, but I have a plan. Together, we can send an UNMISTAKABLE message to Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers in Congress by taking back the House in the midterms and holding him ACCOUNTABLE! Please – I’m personally asking. Every dollar you give moves us closer to retaking the House Majority and building a legislative firewall against Donald Trump’s most hateful impulses. body:
Eric Trump is coming to Colorado, plus an update on HB25-1312...
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
We have a BIG ANNOUNCEMENT for you today... We're thrilled to invite you to the FIRST ANNUAL **Mountain Majesty Gala** , with **special guest ERIC TRUMP**! This event will take place on June 21st at 6pm in Golden, Colorado. This is a major moment for Colorado conservatives—and seats are limited. **Tickets go on sale Monday** , so set a reminder and get ready to be part of something big!
---
Now onto the news, and there's lots of it. Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** HB25-1312 [advanced out of the Senate Judiciary Committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after more than eight hours of emotional testimony on Wednesday night. Critics—ranging from doctors to parents—warn the bill would override parental rights and impose radical gender mandates across Colorado institutions, even with [six added amendments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Former CD8 Rep. Yadira Caraveo faces allegations from former aides of [emotional abuse and a toxic work environment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Colorado now ranks [8th for drug problems](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), highlighted by a [fentanyl bust](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) near a Western Slope school. Meanwhile, Adams County residents are pushing back on a [reformulated gas storage](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) plan over health and cost concerns.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump unveiled a major [rare earth minerals agreement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with Ukraine, positioning the U.S. to aid in reconstruction while securing critical resources. And after speculation he had been fired, Mike Waltz was instead named [U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), replacing the previously floated nomination of Rep. Elise Stefanik.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Bob Cooper dives into what could be [Colorado’s biggest identity theft case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), revealing thousands of suspicious political donations tied to residents likely unaware their names are being used. And Mike O’Donnell highlights how Colorado now [leads the nation in personal debt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), driven by high housing costs, inflation, and a web of hidden fees that lawmakers won’t call taxes.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, May 2, 2025.
– Team RMV
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Doctors, parents, pastors say HB25-1312 “crosses line” as Senate advances bill after midnight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY TORI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
HB25-1312, also known as the “Kelly Loving Act,” proposes major changes to how Colorado law handles gender identity. After more than eight hours of emotional testimony that went past 1:00 a.m., the Senate Judiciary Committee advanced the bill on a 5–2 party-line vote.
The bill would expand the state’s anti-discrimination laws to include gender identity and expression in areas like public spaces, schools, and legal proceedings.
Bill sponsor Faith Winters described it as a “crash couch for the state,” a metaphor meant to convey safety and refuge for at-risk individuals.
Despite several amendments adopted during the hearing, critics argue the bill still threatens parental rights, religious liberty, and First Amendment protections.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[Cooper: The biggest identity theft in Colorado history? Victims may have no idea](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Up to 4,000 Coloradans may unknowingly appear in federal campaign finance records, potentially as part of a massive political money laundering scheme involving platforms like ActBlue.
* Elderly residents are listed as making tens of thousands of small donations—some averaging 20+ transactions per day—totaling hundreds of thousands of dollars, raising red flags of identity misuse.
* A new searchable database by The America Project lets users look up suspicious donation activity by ZIP code, revealing what may be one of Colorado’s largest identity theft and campaign finance scandals.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[O’Donnell: It’s costly to live in Colorado—and now we top the charts in personal debt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado now leads the nation in personal debt. Households owe an average of $90,540 in consumer loans—more than those in California, Texas, or New York—driven by sky-high housing and living costs.
* Rising inflation and state-imposed “fees” (avoiding the word “tax”) have added to the burden, with Coloradans increasingly reliant on mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards to stay afloat.
* With a negative GDP report to start 2025, O’Donnell warns that if the economy dips, many Coloradans may find themselves in serious financial trouble.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Yadira Caraveo’s former aides say they were mistreated, traumatized by Colorado congresswoman](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Former staffers accuse Rep. Yadira Caraveo of creating a toxic work environment and ignoring mental health safety concerns after two apparent suicide attempts witnessed by aides in 2024.
* Caraveo had one of the highest staff turnover rates in Congress. Aides say they were pressured to manage her crises or resign, and some needed therapy after leaving.
* Despite losing her 2024 race and being urged not to run again, Caraveo is campaigning for her seat in 2026—without endorsements and with growing concerns over her leadership and behavior.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The COvid Chronicles April 16–30: From tattletales to tyranny in just 14 days](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD****| COMMENTARY | MAY 2** _If the first two weeks of April 2020 made it clear to Coloradans their state was forever changed and would not be going back to the way it was any time soon, the later part of the month crystalized just how difficult earning back any God-given constitutional rights and freedoms would prove to be._
__
**[“Drawing the line”: School boards warn HB25-1312 oversteps on parental rights, brings policy chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | APRIL 30** _More than 70 school board members and education leaders have signed a letter urging lawmakers to reject HB25-1312, also known as the Kelly Loving Act._
__
**[Walcher: We built it, and they still won’t come](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY GREG WALCHER | COMMENTARY | APRIL 29** _Building a new subdivision is complicated. Almost every city and county in America have master plans dictating “conforming uses” of land. Most specify lot and home sizes, rules for vehicle access, water supply, sewage disposal, flood control, affordable housing, and park space. Those are addressed in lengthy application processes and public hearings, all preceding building the infrastructure, and then the homes._
__

clean_body: Eric Trump is coming to Colorado, plus an update on HB25-1312... | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi folks, We have a BIG ANNOUNCEMENT for you today... We're thrilled to invite you to the FIRST ANNUAL Mountain Majesty Gala , with special guest ERIC TRUMP! This event will take place on June 21st at 6pm in Golden, Colorado. This is a major moment for Colorado conservatives—and seats are limited. Tickets go on sale Monday , so set a reminder and get ready to be part of something big! Now onto the news, and there's lots of it. Listen to today's Mountain Minute Podcast , or watch on or ! Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates... HB25-1312 after more than eight hours of emotional testimony on Wednesday night. Critics—ranging from doctors to parents—warn the bill would override parental rights and impose radical gender mandates across Colorado institutions, even with . 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Former CD8 Rep. Yadira Caraveo faces allegations from former aides of . Colorado now ranks , highlighted by a near a Western Slope school. Meanwhile, Adams County residents are pushing back on a plan over health and cost concerns. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... President Trump unveiled a major with Ukraine, positioning the U.S. to aid in reconstruction while securing critical resources. And after speculation he had been fired, Mike Waltz was instead named , replacing the previously floated nomination of Rep. Elise Stefanik. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... Bob Cooper dives into what could be , revealing thousands of suspicious political donations tied to residents likely unaware their names are being used. And Mike O’Donnell highlights how Colorado now , driven by high housing costs, inflation, and a web of hidden fees that lawmakers won’t call taxes. This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, May 2, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY TORI GANAHL, HB25-1312, also known as the “Kelly Loving Act,” proposes major changes to how Colorado law handles gender identity. After more than eight hours of emotional testimony that went past 1:00 a.m., the Senate Judiciary Committee advanced the bill on a 5–2 party-line vote. The bill would expand the state’s anti-discrimination laws to include gender identity and expression in areas like public spaces, schools, and legal proceedings. Bill sponsor Faith Winters described it as a “crash couch for the state,” a metaphor meant to convey safety and refuge for at-risk individuals. Despite several amendments adopted during the hearing, critics argue the bill still threatens parental rights, religious liberty, and First Amendment protections. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Up to 4,000 Coloradans may unknowingly appear in federal campaign finance records, potentially as part of a massive political money laundering scheme involving platforms like ActBlue. Elderly residents are listed as making tens of thousands of small donations—some averaging 20+ transactions per day—totaling hundreds of thousands of dollars, raising red flags of identity misuse. A new searchable database by The America Project lets users look up suspicious donation activity by ZIP code, revealing what may be one of Colorado’s largest identity theft and campaign finance scandals. | Colorado now leads the nation in personal debt. Households owe an average of $90,540 in consumer loans—more than those in California, Texas, or New York—driven by sky-high housing and living costs. Rising inflation and state-imposed “fees” (avoiding the word “tax”) have added to the burden, with Coloradans increasingly reliant on mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards to stay afloat. With a negative GDP report to start 2025, O’Donnell warns that if the economy dips, many Coloradans may find themselves in serious financial trouble. | Former staffers accuse Rep. Yadira Caraveo of creating a toxic work environment and ignoring mental health safety concerns after two apparent suicide attempts witnessed by aides in 2024. Caraveo had one of the highest staff turnover rates in Congress. Aides say they were pressured to manage her crises or resign, and some needed therapy after leaving. Despite losing her 2024 race and being urged not to run again, Caraveo is campaigning for her seat in 2026—without endorsements and with growing concerns over her leadership and behavior. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ RMV EDITORIAL BOARD| COMMENTARY | MAY 2 If the first two weeks of April 2020 made it clear to Coloradans their state was forever changed and would not be going back to the way it was any time soon, the later part of the month crystalized just how difficult earning back any God-given constitutional rights and freedoms would prove to be. JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | APRIL 30 More than 70 school board members and education leaders have signed a letter urging lawmakers to reject HB25-1312, also known as the Kelly Loving Act. GREG WALCHER | COMMENTARY | APRIL 29 Building a new subdivision is complicated. Almost every city and county in America have master plans dictating “conforming uses” of land. Most specify lot and home sizes, rules for vehicle access, water supply, sewage disposal, flood control, affordable housing, and park space. Those are addressed in lengthy application processes and public hearings, all preceding building the infrastructure, and then the homes. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? Southern California experiences around 10,000 earthquakes each year , but most are too small to be felt. Only 15 to 20 typically exceed a magnitude of 4.0. However, large quakes can trigger aftershocks that last for months. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Some say that spirit no longer exists. But I have seen it — I have felt it — all across the land; in the big cities, the small towns and in rural America. The American spirit is still there, ready to blaze into life if you and I are willing to do what has to be done." – Ronald Reagan | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. You may have heard me talk before about big, structural change. My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change to our political landscape. 40 years ago, Ellen Malcolm and the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List had a vision to change the face of American politics by investing in women candidates in the _earliest_ days of their campaigns, when it matters most. Thanks to that vision and decades of work, _thousands_ of women have been elected to office nationwide, up and down the ballot. And it's made a real difference.

I know firsthand how powerful support from EMILYs List can be. That's why I'm reaching out today to ask for your support. EMILYs List is entirely donor-supported, so your contribution makes their work electing women like me possible.

clean_body: My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change. | = Hi Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren. For 40 years, EMILYs List has shown us what it looks like to truly invest in the future we want. This organization has helped elect thousands of women, at every level of government, all across the country. I'm one of them , and I've seen how their support makes a real difference. = | = You may have heard me talk before about big, structural change. My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change to our political landscape. 40 years ago, Ellen Malcolm and the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List had a vision to change the face of American politics by investing in women candidates in the earliest days of their campaigns, when it matters most. Thanks to that vision and decades of work, thousands of women have been elected to office nationwide, up and down the ballot. And it's made a real difference. I know firsthand how powerful support from EMILYs List can be. That's why I'm reaching out today to ask for your support. EMILYs List is entirely donor-supported, so your contribution makes their work electing women like me possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. [Upgrade to paid](https://substack..iw9_kuwMUaNgtx8bwfECQGneo5B6Em-05eHQBEethzA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162721894)
Did you know that we've officially surpassed 400 articles and podcasts on _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid?_
I launched _Let 's Address This_ just over a year ago to ensure my readers had timely, critical, and accurate information on the human rights issues that impact us all. We now surpass a movement of more than 130,000 subscribers, more than 2 million monthly reads, and more than 400 published pieces.
You. Made. This. Possible! Thank you!
And, I wanted to know what matters most to you? So, I partnered with a polling firm to listen to you and ask you what matters most? Your feedback has been vital, and I want to share the four most important learning lessons below. **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..iw9_kuwMUaNgtx8bwfECQGneo5B6Em-05eHQBEethzA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162721894)
## Four Lessons Learned
1. **You Trust Me and My Scholarship:** You shared that you subscribe to Let's Address This because it provides timely and trustworthy information on the human rights issues we all care about, especially as corporate media ignores them. I am truly grateful to have your trust, as that currency is priceless. You can count on me to continue to provide accurate and timely information, always.
2. **You Want Organization and Communication:** You want better organization and access to my published writing. An easier way to find past articles or interviews, especially when you want to share with your network, on social media, or to look up a receipt. We have a solution! We've built a page that allows you to quickly search these 400+ and growing pieces of content, and share at will. This page will be regularly updated with new content as it happens:
[Qasim's Published Archive](https://substack.com/redirect/5ea1cac3-6edc-4e09-98e7-000c734f24da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This page also improves communication, as it allows you to submit questions and suggestions directly to me on topics you'd like me to cover in the future.
3. **You Want More Calls to Action:** More than 70% of you stated that while you appreciate the petitions, public marches, and candidates for office to support in response to the growing fascism in our country--you want MORE. More ways to uphold justice. More actions to demand accountability. More calls to protect our Constitution. This is powerful and inspiring, and you have my promise to share more opportunities on how you can get involved to elevate your communities.
4. **You Want to Know How You Can Support Me:** Many shared that you immensely trust my content, but don't know how to support, or how to subscribe, or donate? I answer this below. Your contributions help me maintain integrity, as I remain funded by you (my readers). They help me invest the critical time necessary to research these changing developments as they happen--that includes reading and analyzing new proposed laws, studying and breaking down Supreme Court decisions, and researching the impact of new policies impacting our rights. Your donations help drive Let's Address This. Therefore, I leave you with the below three calls to action.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..iw9_kuwMUaNgtx8bwfECQGneo5B6Em-05eHQBEethzA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162721894)

## My Three Calls To Action
_I hope you choose to complete at least 1 of these three calls to action_. Your support has gotten us this far, and your support will elevate _Let 's Address This_ to new success.
1. Jump in. Become a paid subscriber at a cup of coffee ($6) a month or $50 a year.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..iw9_kuwMUaNgtx8bwfECQGneo5B6Em-05eHQBEethzA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162721894)
2. Grow our community. Gift a subscription to a friend or loved one.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..iw9_kuwMUaNgtx8bwfECQGneo5B6Em-05eHQBEethzA?&gift=true)
3. Maximize our reach. Share this post on your social media, in your family group chat, or simply like and comment. Engage and help boost its visibility.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=162721894&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzIxODk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyMjA5MTEsImV4cCI6MTc0ODgxMjkxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3vsTiV4lBrIvKoFXK4NsBXXSPjkJVXL3CazEn_XCxrc)

## **A Final Word**
My mission remains clear and firm--uphold absolute justice and human rights in all I do and advocate, and do so without billionaire support. Instead, do so with the people, by the people, and for the people. This is why I seek and want your support. Help me build a future more committed to justice and universal human rights. Subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union.
Thank you for your trust.❤️
Sincerely,
Qasim
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid exists because of thoughtful readers like you. Join us and subscribe at $6/mo or $50/year.**

clean_body: Here's what I learned from a comprehensive poll of you, my amazing Readers | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Here's what I learned from a comprehensive poll of you, my amazing Readers | | | May 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | Did you know that we've officially surpassed 400 articles and podcasts on Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid? I launched Let 's Address This just over a year ago to ensure my readers had timely, critical, and accurate information on the human rights issues that impact us all. We now surpass a movement of more than 130,000 subscribers, more than 2 million monthly reads, and more than 400 published pieces. You. Made. This. Possible! Thank you! And, I wanted to know what matters most to you? So, I partnered with a polling firm to listen to you and ask you what matters most? Your feedback has been vital, and I want to share the four most important learning lessons below. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Four Lessons Learned 1. You Trust Me and My Scholarship: You shared that you subscribe to Let's Address This because it provides timely and trustworthy information on the human rights issues we all care about, especially as corporate media ignores them. I am truly grateful to have your trust, as that currency is priceless. You can count on me to continue to provide accurate and timely information, always. 2. You Want Organization and Communication: You want better organization and access to my published writing. An easier way to find past articles or interviews, especially when you want to share with your network, on social media, or to look up a receipt. We have a solution! We've built a page that allows you to quickly search these 400+ and growing pieces of content, and share at will. This page will be regularly updated with new content as it happens: This page also improves communication, as it allows you to submit questions and suggestions directly to me on topics you'd like me to cover in the future. 3. You Want More Calls to Action: More than 70% of you stated that while you appreciate the petitions, public marches, and candidates for office to support in response to the growing fascism in our country--you want MORE. More ways to uphold justice. More actions to demand accountability. More calls to protect our Constitution. This is powerful and inspiring, and you have my promise to share more opportunities on how you can get involved to elevate your communities. 4. You Want to Know How You Can Support Me: Many shared that you immensely trust my content, but don't know how to support, or how to subscribe, or donate? I answer this below. Your contributions help me maintain integrity, as I remain funded by you (my readers). They help me invest the critical time necessary to research these changing developments as they happen--that includes reading and analyzing new proposed laws, studying and breaking down Supreme Court decisions, and researching the impact of new policies impacting our rights. Your donations help drive Let's Address This. Therefore, I leave you with the below three calls to action. My Three Calls To Action I hope you choose to complete at least 1 of these three calls to action. Your support has gotten us this far, and your support will elevate Let 's Address This to new success. 1. Jump in. Become a paid subscriber at a cup of coffee ($6) a month or $50 a year. 2. Grow our community. Gift a subscription to a friend or loved one. 3. Maximize our reach. Share this post on your social media, in your family group chat, or simply like and comment. Engage and help boost its visibility. A Final Word My mission remains clear and firm--uphold absolute justice and human rights in all I do and advocate, and do so without billionaire support. Instead, do so with the people, by the people, and for the people. This is why I seek and want your support. Help me build a future more committed to justice and universal human rights. Subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union. Thank you for your trust.❤️ Sincerely, Qasim Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid exists because of thoughtful readers like you. Join us and subscribe at $6/mo or $50/year. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: What Pramila wrote in The Nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
For too long, Democrats have been comfortable with cozying up to billionaires and corporate special interests.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250502-5006-footer&t=1&akid=5006%2E420207%2EcUeRIh)
Peter, this week Pramila penned an op-ed for The Nation about why Democrats have lost the trust of working people and what we need to do to win that trust back:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/49710?t=2&akid=5006%2E420207%2EcUeRIh)
**[Read Pramila's Op-Ed in The Nation](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/49710?t=3&akid=5006%2E420207%2EcUeRIh)**
For too long, Democrats have been comfortable with cozying up to the same billionaires and corporate special interests that are responsible for rigging the system against working people.
Until that changes, we’ll keep losing to chaos agents like Trump, whose supporters voted for him precisely _because_ he promised to break that system.
**Click the button above to read how Pramila thinks we can navigate our way out of this mess and finally create a government that puts working people first.**
[**And when you’re done reading, please consider pitching in $3 or whatever you can to support Pramila’s work. body:
The Trump administration made a secret deal between the Department of Homeland Security and the IRS to share taxpayer information to target immigrants, and they’re refusing to release the full details to Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106982587/543241205/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTA5YzRiNi05ZTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRnSlufhZHk2T-CvsdlwaAf0_4bTsHV6ZAv_szxDrUc=)
---
| Hi Peter, I need you to hear this directly from me.

The Trump administration made a secret deal between the Department of Homeland Security and the IRS to **share taxpayer information to target immigrants** , and they’re refusing to release the full details to Congress.

The agreement is redacted, hidden, and shrouded in secrecy. Even legal experts say it likely violates federal privacy laws.

Let’s be clear: **immigrants contribute billions in taxes every year.** Many file using ITINs, paying into systems like Medicare and Social Security—benefits they can’t even access. And now, the government wants to use that same information to punish them?

That’s wrong. It’s un-American. And I’m fighting back.

I joined more than 40 of my colleagues to demand the full, unredacted memo. [👉 _**Will you sign my petition demanding transparency and protections for immigrant taxpayers?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106982588/543241206/-1321827440?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTA5YzRiNi05ZTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRnSlufhZHk2T-CvsdlwaAf0_4bTsHV6ZAv_szxDrUc=&emci=52c4e5a4-a426-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=ca09c4b6-9e27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6681226)

Linda

body:

| | Peter — did you see Mike’s important message? Republicans in Congress want us to slash Medicaid by $880 billion dollars — just to fund tax giveaways for those who need it the least. We must stand with working families as the Republicans in Congress continue to abandon them.

**_[Stand with us today, Peter. Click here to sign our petition before tonight at midnight>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106982717/543241878/910779405?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250502_PT_Medicaid_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_Medicaid2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDkyZjgzYS1hMDI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xfysGfB8NBQDaQK91MlJueXcAHZmC4IUsg9pOjmR3o4=&emci=a2f61497-0326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d92f83a-a027-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2678920)_**
