Drastic cuts to Medicaid and its expansion will have devastating effects on the American people. _Half of American children depend on Medicaid_ for healthcare, along with the elderly and other vulnerable populations. Working families depend on these critical services, and we cannot abandon them.

Instead of protecting American families, Republicans in Congress are providing tax giveaways for those who need it the least. It’s up to us, instead, to fight for these programs. But I need your support.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Yesterday in Tuscaloosa, Alabama
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Trump wants us to feel hopeless and powerless.

But we, the people, are the real power in this country and at this
critical moment we represent its last best hope. What we do, or what we
fail to do, will determine our future, our fortune, our fate. We cannot be
found wanting.

The truth is, we have the power to overcome these challenges. We know this
because we’ve overcome them before against much greater odds. Overcoming
is what we’re made of, it’s who we are, it’s how we have become the
greatest country the world has ever known.

They know this in Tuscaloosa, Alabama where Doug Jones and I just joined
over 1,500 people to fight for our country right now, when it matters and
where it matters.

How’d we decide on Alabama? When University of Alabama students told me
that Donald Trump had invited himself to speak at commencement, trying to
steal their big day, and asked if I’d stand with them in solidarity and
protest, I had to say yes.

[1]Image of the rally in Tuscaloosa. College students are seated on
benches and grass in a circle surrounding a small square for speakers
.Beto is standing in the

[2]Beto speaking with Senator Doug Jones at the Tuscaloosa rally.

I want to stay on the road, whether it’s hosting town halls in Texas or
showing up across the country to stand with those ready to fight for
America. No place too “red” to be written off; nowhere too “blue” to be
taken for granted. This country is in crisis and we must show up
everywhere for everyone.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250502.UvtKsk&refcode=ema20250502-240096&t=1001&akid=240096%2E444211%2E5x21c0 ]If you can, please chip in $5, $10, or $20 today to help ensure Powered
by People has the resources to continue to meet voters in person. I don’t
take a salary from Powered by People; so your donation will be put to the
best possible use to help us organize.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250502.UvtKsk&refcode=ema20250502-240096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=240096%2E444211%2E5x21c0 ]DONATE $5

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=240096%2E444211%2E5x21c0

It's Friday and we have an amazing show to end the week with. As we celebrated the Trump administration's first 100 days in office, the list of accomplishments was exceptional. Trump 2.0 is a cohesive team working in harmony with one another, with a Republican majority in the House and the Senate, it is up to President Trump to get Speaker Johnson and Leader Thune to work together on budget reconciliation and getting longer term tax cuts through. Well, today, Congressman Byron Donalds sits down with me to discuss the Trump 2.0 team and getting the House and Senate to move the Trump agenda forward. Rep. Donald is looking to cut $1.5 Trillion in spending and have budget reconciliation and permanent tax cuts buy June 2025. After that, veteran campaign advisor Tim Murtaugh walks us through the decade long absolute failure of the mainstream media. Ever since Trump came down that escalator, the corporate-controlled media has woken up every day to write a story about how Trump is bad. Even after the people spoke in the November 2024 election, the mainstream media is still spinning "orange man" bad tales. Thankfully President Trump is fearless and has insulated himself with a dream team and is quite literally doing the will of the American people.
Featuring
**Rep. Byron Donalds**
U.S. Congressman | Florida, District 19
https://donalds.house.gov/
**Tim Murtaugh**
Campaign Advisor | Trump 2020, 2024
https://x.com/TimMurtaugh

Team, Republicans are hellbent on slashing Medicaid and cutting health care coverage for millions of Americans to pay for billionaire tax handouts. There are 780,000 people in New Mexico alone whose health care access depends on Medicaid. If Republicans succeed, 83,000 rural residents will lose their coverage, 95,000 children will lose health insurance, and more than 1 in 5 seniors will lose nursing home care. **My fellow Democrats and I are working tooth and nail to block Republicans’ cuts to Medicaid’s funding. ** **[Please add your name today and join me in the fight to protect our health care from Republican attacks>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106983008/543242689/1588037210?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDFiNjJmMy1hMDI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nft-ZDNpO1kVRWqm3xw65saGwvLqyohLpaucUxJGS4=&emci=ea1b62f3-a027-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f41b62f3-a027-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=252045)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106983009/543242690/1588037210?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDFiNjJmMy1hMDI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nft-ZDNpO1kVRWqm3xw65saGwvLqyohLpaucUxJGS4=&emci=ea1b62f3-a027-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f41b62f3-a027-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=252045)

body:
Thanks to you and this grassroots team, we were able to not just meet, but exceed our fundraising goal for April.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106983342/543243949/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjdjMjVlZC1hMTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msIxaP4HhHVrw0NXY9twgrZalES5InJUdMnuTpBybVo=) **I’m reaching out to say thank you.** Thanks to you and this grassroots team, we were able to not just meet, but exceed our fundraising goal for April. **Your support comes at a critical moment.** Just over 100 days in, Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda is causing lasting damage to our country. His tariffs are wrecking the economy. Musk’s DOGE is destroying the federal government. And Trump is continuing to defy federal courts to ship people overseas. **But we’re starting to see cracks in Trump’s armor.** Americans are taking to the streets to oppose his authoritarian agenda. Trump’s approval ratings are plummeting as Americans see no end to his chaos. His administration continues to lose case after case defending its illegal actions in federal court. And your support is laying the crucial foundation to flip the House in 2026 and hold him accountable. There’s so much cause for all of us to feel outraged and exhausted. **But we should never feel hopeless. This grassroots team— _and all Americans who are stepping up to meet the moment_ —are just one reason.** We may not be able to win every fight, but with this grassroots team by my side, we have the power to make a real difference. subject: This is as important as it gets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106983440/543244310/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU2ZDVkMzQtYTIyNy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7M5Fa2xDjMahQd7diIsZ2PFULibHGAlytDhIjGO1SuI=)

Peter,

I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: **this one is as important as it gets.**

The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.

Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.

As family and friends gathered in the Oval Office on Wednesday to witness Secretary of State Marco Rubio officially swear in Warren Stephens as Ambassador to the United Kingdom, another familiar face was also in attendance – U.S. Senator Katie Britt. While Stephens is an Arkansas native, he also has ties to the state of Alabama. In 1975, Stephens graduated from Trinity Presbyterian High School in Montgomery, Britt’s hometown. The Senator also met with Stephens ahead of his confirmation.

| | **Sen. Britt introduces bill to make breast cancer diagnostic tests more affordable**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=c5b1d36c0fab427391f802c42e1bdfbd&_e=dlmYyOpCgge6HNQJvDuulUir5FVTOiqzNgxPPKg9iKBvBNNVLkZwilmy8W-R4uy3dnXYogJNNVVD4Z5KA4nNYAeagsTcVN9LAp3Cq_K8wdcu5M4RuK-AuitZtGJcM_xcthWs8j7xcRgTsnQe-n6yXydmW1BpkFpBLJbJxwqryM_X2YBU1XClDULaBs1Qw5-d6QHR1v_JHOCWycql9IwI1LFsel9Ds-aYQRYvjNEBlOgWPE8iMwS_xZzOPfUY0otdDOxbqXr364nB5DhBeyRfCc2fHxM_aWD5RolB5cyF8_K8EAApktpT7tVR3-jhcsierRtfd1PDN7LbY3zcQD0SNA%3D%3D)

U.S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Alabama, joined Senator Jeanne Shaheen, D-N.H., in reintroducing the Access to Breast Cancer Diagnosis Act. The bipartisan, bicameral legislation would eliminate out-of-pocket expenses for diagnostic breast cancer tests, making them more accessible and affordable. “The ABCD Act would provide greater access to mammography so women can be diagnosed as soon as possible, giving them the widest variety of treatment options and the best chance to defeat this disease,” said Senator Britt.

U.S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Ala., a member of the Senate Committee on Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, on Thursday led 10 of her Senate colleagues in introducing S. 1544, the Insurance Data Protection Act. This legislation, which Senator Britt first introduced last Congress, would correct the Federal Insurance Office’s efforts to overstep into the state-regulated insurance industry and return FIO to its original intent of supporting state insurance officials. “Our state insurance regulators have more than proven their ability to effectively and responsibly supervise the American insurance industry for over a century,” said Senator Britt.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Katie Britt joins Rubio, Trump in Oval Office for U.K. Ambassador’s swearing-in As family and friends gathered in the Oval Office on Wednesday to witness Secretary of State Marco Rubio officially swear in Warren Stephens as Ambassador to the United Kingdom, another familiar face was also in attendance – U.S. Senator Katie Britt. While Stephens is an Arkansas native, he also has ties to the state of Alabama. In 1975, Stephens graduated from Trinity Presbyterian High School in Montgomery, Britt’s hometown. The Senator also met with Stephens ahead of his confirmation. | | Sen. Britt introduces bill to make breast cancer diagnostic tests more affordable U.S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Alabama, joined Senator Jeanne Shaheen, D-N.H., in reintroducing the Access to Breast Cancer Diagnosis Act. The bipartisan, bicameral legislation would eliminate out-of-pocket expenses for diagnostic breast cancer tests, making them more accessible and affordable. “The ABCD Act would provide greater access to mammography so women can be diagnosed as soon as possible, giving them the widest variety of treatment options and the best chance to defeat this disease,” said Senator Britt. | | Sen. Britt leads legislation to prevent federal overreach into state-regulated insurance U.S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Ala., a member of the Senate Committee on Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, on Thursday led 10 of her Senate colleagues in introducing S. 1544, the Insurance Data Protection Act. This legislation, which Senator Britt first introduced last Congress, would correct the Federal Insurance Office’s efforts to overstep into the state-regulated insurance industry and return FIO to its original intent of supporting state insurance officials. “Our state insurance regulators have more than proven their ability to effectively and responsibly supervise the American insurance industry for over a century,” said Senator Britt. | | | | | | | | | Gulf of America Hat Celebrate conservative leadership and show your patriotism with this unique, high quality, Made-in-America hat. | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. By participating, you agree to the terms & privacy policy for auto dialed messages from Britt for Alabama to the phone number you provide. Msg&data rates may apply. body:
---
Derek, As DNC Chair Ken Martin says, millions of Americans are depending on us right now. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250501_3340_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3340_22930333_GQPb7p&akid=3340%2E22930333%2EGQPb7p) They need Democrats to meet this moment. They need leaders willing to check Trump’s power at all levels — in their cities, states, and districts. They need people willing to take on Trump and his allies in court. They need a strong Party committed to organizing _everywhere_ , year-round — not just in the lead-up to Election Day. **With your help, that’s exactly what the DNC is doing.** Your support has enabled us to win key elections in states like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania, take on Trump in court, and invest a historic amount of money in Democratic state parties nationwide. [**But we can only keep up fights like these with your support. So we’re asking: Can you chip in $3 to help fund the DNC’s work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250501_3340_fr&refcode2=3340_22930333_GQPb7p&akid=3340%2E22930333%2EGQPb7p) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250501_3340_fr&refcode2=3340_22930333_GQPb7p&akid=3340%2E22930333%2EGQPb7p)**

body:
Have you seen this, Peter?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250502-1&t=1&akid=2073%2E587540%2Eoyeyr8)
Have you seen this, Peter? Our co-founder David has been in the news lately:
[ [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250502-1?refcode=em20250502-2073&:amount=5&refcode2=2073_587540_oyeyr8&akid=2073%2E587540%2Eoyeyr8) It’s no surprise our plan to primary ineffective Democrats is making headlines. _It’s a big deal._ We’re upending the status quo and bucking the unwritten rule granting politicians their seats for life. **We are electing a brand new generation of leaders.** Here’s the thing: Our plan for 2026 requires a $20 million investment. That’s not chump change. It’s a HUGE influx of resources that can make a real difference in elections across the country. And we can only raise these funds with your support. We don’t have right-wing billionaires and corporate PACs bankrolling our efforts like the other side, Peter. We have everyday Americans like you fighting alongside us. **[Will you help fund our efforts to replace ineffective Democrats with the next generation of progressive leaders? Make a $5 contribution right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250502-1?refcode=em20250502-2073&amount=5&refcode2=2073_587540_oyeyr8&akid=2073%2E587540%2Eoyeyr8)** **[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250502-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250502-2073&refcode2=2073_587540_oyeyr8&akid=2073%2E587540%2Eoyeyr8)** Thank you, Leaders We Deserve

body:

| | | **- FROM THE DESK OF SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON-**
The real battle has just begun, Peter.

**As your Speaker of the House, I'm officially sounding the alarm: We just missed our April 30th deadline. **

**This comes at the worst possible time because the Radical Left is more determined than ever to undermine our values, destroy our economy, and dismantle our constitutional freedoms.**

**Here's the situation:** Top Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Hakeem Jefferies have already raised a staggering amount of money to try and take back the House and impose their radical agenda on America. **We need to do everything in our power to stop them.**

That's why I'm turning to you today. We need your help to reach our goal and stay ahead of the Radical Left's money machine.

_This April goal is a one-time opportunity to supercharge our efforts and keep our House majority safe from liberal attacks as we charge into the summer._

Peter,

As we reflect on April, I just want to take a moment to thank you for stepping up to help me and to help our country.

Every time you open an email, chip in a few dollars, or share our message with your friends and neighbors, you’re helping this local pediatrician stay in office, and helping to power a people-first movement that puts our communities at the heart of everything we do.

Representing you in Congress isn’t about me or anyone one person—it’s about all of us. It’s about protecting access to healthcare, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure every family can thrive, no matter their zip code. And right now, it is also about nothing less than protecting our democracy and putting a check on the power of the presidency.

I’m so proud of what we accomplished together last month. Together, we're building the resources we need to stand up to special interests, fight for working families, defeat extremism, and win back a blue House majority in 2026—**I couldn’t be more grateful to have you fighting alongside me.**

There’s still so much important work ahead, but if the past month is any indication of our capabilities, _I know we’re ready for it._ Thank you for believing in this campaign, in our values, and in each other.

[**If you can, please consider chipping in $5, or whatever makes sense for you, to help us keep up the momentum and get ahead of our fundraising goals for May. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106985903/543251139/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250502_eomty_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250502_eomty_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7920bde3-a927-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIwYmRlMy1hOTI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3OKFKd0VjBaHHIWkm2yakQ0AaZgS165BqUtyw8_8mdI=)

Thank you,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. body:
These are the questions I faced a few months ago

| | | [](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a94d6eccd9ac4210b082bdcca6c715a9&_e=NWcmZNXmREaZ6yQLUMjTe0b9AFtl0xV1TiRR6_bPdmyf9wDrcpRsuYlR714vNhw0RyJZBMmGcBi3kRPZulXg-98IrJpUyfELOx59HayvybSNMCbFbuayXRuf99S6a3FkjqpFaggm_WeUH0WqK33bB5OEHBRGib3FPuRMuchnLEKeOnAFQ-YrmlpmZ3_RsV6_tR0q_y8ZpeN-czPSAaHWvnPGegP9W1Tn2QvP9IiT_Gp15r8O9SaRC7liZ0ptKBqIVlLeffgm5GQHKvC81Ytab-gs0jdCSAxLywoLZg_rQmVHgoXagB6GldwsQrL2QXgH5_kYOZR6sEoxWq01hsTHiphYCtrjCDcvveyJElxpTXyF_Ym00936OQ_0F2-cCxlz_0t69j9MvJSxeDnWxreb5sUTgRlT8-fFLY786hzusJgJLOxt9n-wBLrfh2ei60DG)
---
**_Friend,_** I know you get asked for money a lot. So before I ask for anything, I want to tell you about the questions I was being asked just a few months ago. **_ _** People asked me again and again what my plan was after November 5th. **_ _** **_“Where do we go from here?”_**** _ _****_“What are you going to do now?”_**** _ _** There were so many questions about what was next for me in life. I had poured every ounce of energy I had into Mike Rogers’ campaign for U.S. Senate. **_ _** When most of the country went to bed on November 5th, Mike was holding off his radical leftist opponent. We were truly optimistic.**_ _** But the next day, a pile of new mail-in ballots all but sealed Mike’s fate. There was no re-count. His radical left lunatic opponent had pulled ahead by the thinnest margin of nearly any Senate race in the country. **_ _** Today I’m not writing to tell you about the past. **_ _** _**[_**In fact, this is a letter I wanted to send first and foremost to the patriots that have not abandoned Mike since his last campaign. Thank you for sticking with us through thick and thin! I hope we can count on you for support today!**_](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a94d6eccd9ac4210b082bdcca6c715a9&_e=NWcmZNXmREaZ6yQLUMjTe0b9AFtl0xV1TiRR6_bPdmyf9wDrcpRsuYlR714vNhw0RyJZBMmGcBi3kRPZulXg-98IrJpUyfELOx59HayvybSNMCbFbuayXRuf99S6a3FkjqpFaggm_WeUH0WqK33bB5OEHBRGib3FPuRMuchnLEKeOnAFQ-YrmlpmZ3_RsV6_tR0q_y8ZpeN-czPSAaHWvnPGegP9W1Tn2QvP9IiT_Gp15r8O9SaRC7liZ0ptKBqIVlLeffgm5GQHKvC81Ytab-gs0jdCSAxLywoLZg_rQmV7tWHreLZfJkmpRnvcQDjE8OgweDgtN4S0ohu4LKbinmBL00T6QPh8J8UMBXuNRK7l2KaFFNl4a6G8lbTpn75lkv0SfBZ7OUmwzsP3U-1jmIKS1YTbqlO0wEZWncamIFKEnAEKX7ylkIQHj0Bv-hB8)**_ **_ _** **_Not only is Mike Rogers back and ready to take the gloves off in his race to expand President Trump’s Senate majority, but so is the rest of his team here on the ground! _****_ _** I’m back with Mike for his new campaign for U.S. Senate because **I’ve believed in him from day one.****** And the results of last November haven't taken away an ounce of faith that I have in him. **_ _** I believe in Mike because he’s a fighter. Service, grit, and sacrifice are all core principles that he lives by. **_ _** Mike knows the value of hard work and service. Serving his country is all he's ever known in life. **_ _** Mike’s a straight shooter. For too long Michigan has been represented by two-faced cowardly politicians. Mike will do whatever it takes to put the American people first. **_ _** **[Thankfully, I’m not alone in this thinking! That’s why we are so thankful for our team of incredible supporters like you. To have you still with us is immensely appreciated.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a94d6eccd9ac4210b082bdcca6c715a9&_e=NWcmZNXmREaZ6yQLUMjTe0b9AFtl0xV1TiRR6_bPdmyf9wDrcpRsuYlR714vNhw0RyJZBMmGcBi3kRPZulXg-98IrJpUyfELOx59HayvybSNMCbFbuayXRuf99S6a3FkjqpFaggm_WeUH0WqK33bB5OEHBRGib3FPuRMuchnLEKeOnAFQ-YrmlpmZ3_RsV6_tR0q_y8ZpeN-czPSAaHWvnPGegP9W1Tn2QvP9IiT_Gp15r8O9SaRC7liZ0ptKBqIVlLeffgm5GQHKvC81Ytab-gs0jdCSAxLywoLZg_rQmWQ3n_4h0yzWW_0vn_nxABTD5Wbk9mpW8WbaobW8kmLCuZ7aWpwoiZ8_7dUqUqRYo75H7Hep_8LLuFlngWkLaws0gziEgn_4QCU9x_WpD9hC-kJeePWKkqDzsSxB9lBGYJQ-_L0Hd80St72ecMkF2jM) ****_ _** But the truth is, we haven’t seen the initial response that we’d hoped for during our launch! **_ _** We know times are tough. And truly, if you can’t give today, we’re just as thankful to have you reading these messages as we are for a donation. But if you do have the means, every single dollar you give will make a critical impact in this campaign. **_ _****This will be the closest race on the map, and if we want to grow President Trump’s Senate majority it starts right here, right now. ****_ _** _**[Can we count on you to help us up our fundraising numbers? We can’t afford to fall behind this early!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=a94d6eccd9ac4210b082bdcca6c715a9&_e=NWcmZNXmREaZ6yQLUMjTe0b9AFtl0xV1TiRR6_bPdmyf9wDrcpRsuYlR714vNhw0RyJZBMmGcBi3kRPZulXg-98IrJpUyfELOx59HayvybSNMCbFbuayXRuf99S6a3FkjqpFaggm_WeUH0WqK33bB5OEHBRGib3FPuRMuchnLEKeOnAFQ-YrmlpmZ3_RsV6_tR0q_y8ZpeN-czPSAaHWvnPGegP9W1Tn2QvP9IiT_Gp15r8O9SaRC7liZ0ptKBqIVlLeffgm5GQHKvC81Ytab-gs0jdCSAxLywoLZg_rQmXF-F8lZbMOUCfi_60q_JjOb9O94uGZ3bB0fJtxssaA4LsJYy5kTSaFzboPj5vLvjStJgmQ2E1hCqR4OoOwi56OGumMyDInXAHq3rVLnXdlSvmNyo1yZFoUd_JJKvDKb-6tBoy0fX834a66zwcVcwql)**_ **_ _** Thank you for your continued support.**_ _** Sincerely,**_ _** Tom Campaign Manager

clean_body: These are the questions I faced a few months ago | | | Friend, I know you get asked for money a lot. So before I ask for anything, I want to tell you about the questions I was being asked just a few months ago. People asked me again and again what my plan was after November 5th. “Where do we go from here?” “What are you going to do now?” There were so many questions about what was next for me in life. I had poured every ounce of energy I had into Mike Rogers’ campaign for U.S. Senate. When most of the country went to bed on November 5th, Mike was holding off his radical leftist opponent. We were truly optimistic. But the next day, a pile of new mail-in ballots all but sealed Mike’s fate. There was no re-count. His radical left lunatic opponent had pulled ahead by the thinnest margin of nearly any Senate race in the country. Today I’m not writing to tell you about the past. Not only is Mike Rogers back and ready to take the gloves off in his race to expand President Trump’s Senate majority, but so is the rest of his team here on the ground! I’m back with Mike for his new campaign for U.S. Senate because I’ve believed in him from day one.** And the results of last November haven't taken away an ounce of faith that I have in him. I believe in Mike because he’s a fighter. Service, grit, and sacrifice are all core principles that he lives by. Mike knows the value of hard work and service. Serving his country is all he's ever known in life. Mike’s a straight shooter. For too long Michigan has been represented by two-faced cowardly politicians. Mike will do whatever it takes to put the American people first. ** But the truth is, we haven’t seen the initial response that we’d hoped for during our launch! We know times are tough. And truly, if you can’t give today, we’re just as thankful to have you reading these messages as we are for a donation. But if you do have the means, every single dollar you give will make a critical impact in this campaign. This will be the closest race on the map, and if we want to grow President Trump’s Senate majority it starts right here, right now. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Tom Campaign Manager | | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.commailto:mark@convert-digital.com. Don't want to receive these emails anymore? Click for Senate P.O. Box 132 St. Joseph, MI 49085 Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

Peter,

This is a massive, unlawful breach of privacy. ADD YOUR NAME: Tell the Supreme Court to protect Social Security data. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: May is AANHPI Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, May is AANHPI Heritage Month, marking a time to recognize and honor the significant impact that generations of Asian Americans, Native Hawaiians, and Pacific Islanders have made on our country. Around this time last year, the Senate unanimously passed my resolution recognizing the importance of May as AANHPI Heritage Month to both honor our communities’ contributions and acknowledge the challenges we’ve overcome and continue to face. **Recognizing the important role the AANHPI community has played in our nation’s history, and the contributions our communities have made, cannot be overstated here in Donald Trump’s second term as president.** Trump has always been about dividing our nation, attacking the diversity that makes America great. In Trump’s America, children are not allowed to learn about history that isn’t centered on straight, white, males — leaving our keiki to question their own worth and place in our society. **This cannot stand.** I’m committed to building an equitable future where all people are treated with dignity and respect. I refuse to stand by as Donald Trump’s regime tries to create and widen differences between Americans — whether it is railing against the made up “woke agenda;” attacking diversity, equity, and inclusion; or terrorizing immigrant communities, just to name a few of the many outrageous things this lawless administration tries to get away with. But as Republicans are allowing Trump’s hateful agenda to harm our communities, my Democratic colleagues and I are doing everything in our power to stop them from rolling back our progress and rights. Through it all, I will never forget where I came from, who I fight for, or why I’m in this fight. **Our communities have always played a major role in shaping our nation’s history. As long as the Republican supermajority continues to try and tear us apart, I will continue to speak out bluntly about the danger they pose to the AANHPI community, immigrants, and other vulnerable groups.** **[Peter, my work has always been powered by grassroots supporters like you, and I wouldn’t have it any other way. If you’re able today, please chip in a donation of any amount to keep me fighting in the U.S. Senate for our working families, our freedoms, and our future.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106986620/543253291/-434956623?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzJjNDgwOS1iMDI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DoKM_kwCDsd3hAOGI0kB0WnRAq9n6n6Wm4IEQg_ClZA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106986621/543253292/-434956623?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzJjNDgwOS1iMDI3LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DoKM_kwCDsd3hAOGI0kB0WnRAq9n6n6Wm4IEQg_ClZA=)

clean_body: | Peter, May is AANHPI Heritage Month, marking a time to recognize and honor the significant impact that generations of Asian Americans, Native Hawaiians, and Pacific Islanders have made on our country. Around this time last year, the Senate unanimously passed my resolution recognizing the importance of May as AANHPI Heritage Month to both honor our communities’ contributions and acknowledge the challenges we’ve overcome and continue to face. Recognizing the important role the AANHPI community has played in our nation’s history, and the contributions our communities have made, cannot be overstated here in Donald Trump’s second term as president. Trump has always been about dividing our nation, attacking the diversity that makes America great. In Trump’s America, children are not allowed to learn about history that isn’t centered on straight, white, males — leaving our keiki to question their own worth and place in our society. This cannot stand. I’m committed to building an equitable future where all people are treated with dignity and respect. I refuse to stand by as Donald Trump’s regime tries to create and widen differences between Americans — whether it is railing against the made up “woke agenda;” attacking diversity, equity, and inclusion; or terrorizing immigrant communities, just to name a few of the many outrageous things this lawless administration tries to get away with. But as Republicans are allowing Trump’s hateful agenda to harm our communities, my Democratic colleagues and I are doing everything in our power to stop them from rolling back our progress and rights. Through it all, I will never forget where I came from, who I fight for, or why I’m in this fight. Our communities have always played a major role in shaping our nation’s history. As long as the Republican supermajority continues to try and tear us apart, I will continue to speak out bluntly about the danger they pose to the AANHPI community, immigrants, and other vulnerable groups. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for reading and supporting my work today. Mahalo, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii
